subject: setting our sights on taking back the House and Senate!

body:
If we want to flip the House and Senate in 2026, we must begin investing in critical battleground races as early as possible to put us in the best position for success.

| Fight for Progress is dedicated to building a more progressive America and has raised over $200,000 for Democratic candidates. If you would like to donate to a deserving Democrat, you can do so _[here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100024380/521518395/838935893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmMjQ2OGNmLTUzY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=unvZLBFrxDkEiI3jRpGJx7Sbf75o6YbVvWeYm7QH57U=&emci=222468cf-53cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=2f2468cf-53cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=22408598#candidate-inner)_ And of course, you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.everyaction.com/p/z4lkEUrOvESaGxr1QVEGJw2?unsubscribedata=Fndw9nhfWChelTdSPB44O5YliDuz4eA864TMO%2BBsfQyrWgjxan01LlSpi3VLdp5GRRmouJA6Hzs2qbINPoNNs5F9tZSTzbq1OT9sumMz8lAeLOrdIETkcl06DR5Yt1fcoN9MqNf8kXZkmNIZs%2FonKX2z6efpNnmUtszgA7eHUkqjHDT5ZGf%2F2F3gpUDrnkgilHTakK2rVkkvLie%2FXTGjCEZVaNtmtRDCHZtomV9JnSNhZxcQhDLcjekqXqCX4x3XOFhNYt5SWwm3hY6BkPtJHzuj4ocKCcMuUPH%2BqXB2yekhf65od5IM6KyjbJ6TtqlJk%2BWQWBFcNtz1aRiDdRd33A0lvfXLA5Bqk%2BAGMozTxo9KX8GNY%2FKMLb8cB98z5CwRo9Xtd4gOWErieqWEfEnvPNvc7iuiy7UGrbLt8mU%2BiCw%3D) at any time.

| Peter,

Republicans will take full control over Washington when Donald Trump is sworn into the White House on January 20th.

Our team at Fight for Progress is doubling down on our efforts to hold Trump and his MAGA allies accountable. That’s why we’re setting our sights on taking back the House and Senate in 2026!
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100024382/521518412/-1565964854?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-01-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmMjQ2OGNmLTUzY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=unvZLBFrxDkEiI3jRpGJx7Sbf75o6YbVvWeYm7QH57U=)
Last cycle, we raised over half a million dollars to uplift progressive voices and build up Democratic power across the country to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot.

If we want to flip the House and Senate in 2026, we must begin investing in critical battleground races as early as possible to put us in the best position for success.

[_**Will you join our team as a 2025 Founding Donor so we can lay the foundation we need to prepare for the fights ahead by chipping in $5 or anything you can today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100024383/521518425/-1565964854?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-01-07_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmMjQ2OGNmLTUzY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=unvZLBFrxDkEiI3jRpGJx7Sbf75o6YbVvWeYm7QH57U=)

name: THREE SPECIAL ELECTIONS [From House GOP]
subject: Of all the emails you’ve received today, this is BY FAR the most important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Please don’t underestimate the seriousness of the situation.
We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.
| |
---
| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

**_[Friend- we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3a15eec777bf4736aa542289fd0a7381&_e=1tpUkynH0wBLIJ_0Dqo3SCz3hecqm0t1vCLSZPRxEExaHSwJQFNMSdB5z64xWWhSdDa6LmlkN-IacR_T_lj9BC7fqoTuz-9rQ2IZsSDJ7ixnffwFAwUrEnyHYI2SvJxMxZgy5y2tQnS0_hIywTsfXGtmWN12ljns2w4XJbHvWFBgz4ET4vh9fIQr6glX_5S89fszVx7djRKyQShbIEV1oa2QUyiL6N8OOb7NviPyoaLtuV5i6tky1gVigs0Ez_OUTPRQRk6S2sBQwBsKL3FFSb2lnlq7efedGX9SYq4AH3qHDG0n0iJuiXgB0wyLFXx1tkZhXQsbRWFCQeAH6I0xT840g7GcpNqv1OaHSviOvBTku1YUvux0pJZgdEx18Tal5ne3dYyyxIJN9rtdH7-AHmT7hlw_67hlMgb8ylImDH0%3D "Friend – we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.")_**

If there was ever a moment to pitch in a few bucks, that moment is right now. Our Conservative House Majority - and the fate of President Trump's legislative agenda - hangs in the balance.

name: David Horowitz
subject: I’m not saying this to scare you
body:
The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5a08f3023fea40caabb1abdd11564968&_e=z5AV7goNPnAmwN5atSjTlOBqElvriAFTRS3b8z0xCIXLPYRCxUHvDJnMzw7q8Q9yuPWTSV5mRVQpDss9SEDXC2s6gdEMrSL3rRr2Uf2XSzVO_cJtgf9rxbvKWVkeTagtWI0RQ83A-PlwD9hyo_GtTY9rBPUie8EGyWKPPtVUJXwRKY_fhaUlfMn3mVC98r3k69_i6w8q8rsPeava2sqBUsJmBwX1DOY1vaBZctAPMjFfK00WWgvZq-sqCLEuXCigW6T-64c12s3hi7U_cByLJQdbmT5QNl_JXWlAAE094HdncyTMQmjipMyoK0Bi8Q1_Noi9LjLJLayejEpKH42stseniVs1Ji-8qBIIX5RHcN3dkL-mb9ouaju16xzsBfUWZUEa7LcW-2Xxlj1UuyqpgA%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5a08f3023fea40caabb1abdd11564968&_e=z5AV7goNPnAmwN5atSjTlOBqElvriAFTRS3b8z0xCIXLPYRCxUHvDJnMzw7q8Q9yuPWTSV5mRVQpDss9SEDXC2s6gdEMrSL3rRr2Uf2XSzVO_cJtgf9rxbvKWVkeTagtWI0RQ83A-PlwD9hyo_GtTY9rBPUie8EGyWKPPtVUJXwRKY_fhaUlfMn3mVC98r3k69_i6w8q8rsPeava2sqBUsJmBwX1DOY1vaBZctAPMjFfK00WWgvZq-sqCLEuXCigTWZ_KTWqIL3eD8jOnFqUq-4tKnT-B5Ye-0wDUi9ck3Om22tMYBZwct2kye2KNkBiLWVGNxBCA7fCZUG7crJjSvH8AWcRgZo0TxnAEqc12ArBNVvB-uu5INSYWVJt5E61sRGT4vFL5ROiIMY1Y6q0CA%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5a08f3023fea40caabb1abdd11564968&_e=z5AV7goNPnAmwN5atSjTlOBqElvriAFTRS3b8z0xCIXLPYRCxUHvDJnMzw7q8Q9yuPWTSV5mRVQpDss9SEDXC2s6gdEMrSL3rRr2Uf2XSzVO_cJtgf9rxbvKWVkeTagtWI0RQ83A-PlwD9hyo_GtTY9rBPUie8EGyWKPPtVUJXwRKY_fhaUlfMn3mVC98r3k69_i6w8q8rsPeava2sqBUsJmBwX1DOY1vaBZctAPMjFfK00WWgvZq-sqCLEuXCig3uEYW3X0yUVMWgSQS-PdQgUZbkxf9jjHisff6zH7YqfVSeCApPwNVR3wTDOu05Frff7K8oRrWeZVkjH5t8p8Wi5rbYep0Xl6bwmNb_k6jk4336R8HMbIYsps_W6tSQ4P9n1RiVjMn14ZJU3m5nlkfA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against.| | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.orgP.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | |

clean_body: You better act fast Our phones have been ringing off the hook for the past week for the chance to sign President Trump's Inaugural Congratulatory Card. We plan to give this to President Trump on the day of his inauguration, congratulating him on becoming the 47th President. However, as his BEST supporter, we figured your name should be ON TOP. You better act fast, because the opportunity to be on TOP closes at midnight. AND, lucky for you - we decided to extend the opportunity to sign to the END OF THE WEEK... HURRY before you don't get a chance to sign it AT ALL. ******************************************************************************************************** If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! name: Mark Takano
subject: We’ve been here before
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
and we’re not going anywhere

| Hey team –

**Last week, I was honored to be elected as the Chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus for the 119th Congress.**

In years past, this caucus has centered on ways in which we can move the rights and visibility of LGBTQ Americans forward. **This Congress however, we’ll be fighting a constant barrage of attacks on the rights and dignity of the queer community.**

I’m not backing down, nor are any of my Democratic colleagues. **I am a proud gay man, and though Republicans have tried to shame me for decades because of who I am (and even outed me against my will), they will _NEVER_ win.**

**And I’m not waiting to take action.** I’ll be re-introducing the Equality Act this Congress, which will enshrine protections for the LBGTQ community under the Civil Rights Act.

_No one_ should be discriminated against on the basis of their sexual orientation or gender identity – the Equality Act would codify that fundamental truth into federal law.

We have to be ready for whatever cruelty MAGA throws at us. But let me be very clear: Americans do not hold the same animosity towards LGBTQ Americans that MAGA would have you believe. It is a distraction from the issues that they do care about.

That means we win back voters by fighting for what they _DO_ care about: affordable healthcare, an economy that works for the middle class, and protections for good jobs and wages. **But we have to show that we’re willing to fight for them.**

I know the slew of anti-LGBTQ bills being introduced by the GOP is horrifying, but here’s the truth, Peter:

**We’ve been here before. And we’re not going anywhere.**

It is not possible for your donation today to magically stop these horrific anti-LGBTQ bills in the short-term. But with your help, in the long-term, we can build the resources we need to message effectively, counter MAGA bigotry, and win the critical races we need to ensure LGBTQ survival. [**Please consider being one of the people from PA who stands up for LGBTQ rights by making a contribution to our campaign. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100024735/521538559/312147918?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20250107_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTg0MzBkMC01OWNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qlau-8mRj4rzWFHn4hBDOrgwknVxmx64lZcbq8w1Bjo=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100024741/521538565/312147918?amount=7&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20250107_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTg0MzBkMC01OWNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qlau-8mRj4rzWFHn4hBDOrgwknVxmx64lZcbq8w1Bjo=)

www.marktakano.com

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. clean_body: and we’re not going anywhere | Hey team – Last week, I was honored to be elected as the Chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus for the 119th Congress. In years past, this caucus has centered on ways in which we can move the rights and visibility of LGBTQ Americans forward. This Congress however, we’ll be fighting a constant barrage of attacks on the rights and dignity of the queer community. I’m not backing down, nor are any of my Democratic colleagues. I am a proud gay man, and though Republicans have tried to shame me for decades because of who I am (and even outed me against my will), they will NEVER win. And I’m not waiting to take action. I’ll be re-introducing the Equality Act this Congress, which will enshrine protections for the LBGTQ community under the Civil Rights Act. No one should be discriminated against on the basis of their sexual orientation or gender identity – the Equality Act would codify that fundamental truth into federal law. We have to be ready for whatever cruelty MAGA throws at us. But let me be very clear: Americans do not hold the same animosity towards LGBTQ Americans that MAGA would have you believe. It is a distraction from the issues that they do care about. That means we win back voters by fighting for what they DO care about: affordable healthcare, an economy that works for the middle class, and protections for good jobs and wages. But we have to show that we’re willing to fight for them. I know the slew of anti-LGBTQ bills being introduced by the GOP is horrifying, but here’s the truth, Peter: We’ve been here before. And we’re not going anywhere. It is not possible for your donation today to magically stop these horrific anti-LGBTQ bills in the short-term. But with your help, in the long-term, we can build the resources we need to message effectively, counter MAGA bigotry, and win the critical races we need to ensure LGBTQ survival. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Proudly, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: What we're up against this year and beyond
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
It's not just the nominees: Cleta Mitchell, a Trump ally who sought to overturn the 2020 election and has become a key figure in the election denial movement, has called for all of the nonpartisan, apolitical, career civil service lawyers in the Department of Justice's Civil Rights division to be fired.
“ They are all leftist activists and use taxpayer dollars and the power of the federal government to advance their leftwing legal theories ,” she said in an email. “ Their loyalty is not to the constitution and the rule of law. They should go back to the leftist advocacy groups they came from .”
She's wrong, just like the other conspiracy theorists and liars, but all these comments and lies show us why we have to stand up and defend our rights.
We're up against a lot in this fight, but it's a fight we can win. RUSH $25 or more right now to defend voting rights nationwide >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010725_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010725_2&amount=25]
The Guardian: Fears grow for voting rights as Trump plots to reshape US justice department [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010725_2&amount=25]
Team -- Experts are warning that Donald Trump could use his second term to gut enforcement of U.S. federal voting laws and deploy the Department of Justice (DoJ) to undermine voting rights instead of protecting them.
Full control of DoJ under MAGA nominee Pam Bondi could allow them to amplify misleading claims of voter fraud by non-citizens and others, as well as investigate and intimidate local election officials.
Trump could also cause the department’s civil rights section to end its enforcement of the Voting Rights Act , returning it to the approach that it took under Trump’s first term where they stopped prosecuting several voting rights cases.
Shortly after Trump was inaugurated in 2017, DoJ pulled out of two major voting rights cases -- challenging Texas’s suppressive voter ID law and Ohio’s practice of purging voters from the rolls. It filed almost no new voting rights enforcement cases during the first four years Trump was in office.
Folks, it's going to be on us to watch out for voters and defend voting rights. Chip in $25 or whatever you can to help us defend our fundamental right to vote, either at the ballot box or in court >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010725_2&amount=25]

Trump has made no secret of his intention to punish his political enemies and subvert the American voting system. And he's not alone:
AG Nominee Pam Bondi assisted Trump’s efforts to try to overturn the 2020 election results, echoing his false claims of fraud. His nominee to lead the civil rights division, Harmeet Dhilon , did the same, plus she has defended suppressive laws in court and fought to keep Trump on the ballot. And FBI Director nominee Kash Patel is a MAGA conspiracy theorist who wants to weaponize the FBI to follow Trump's every whim.
We're about to start a four year period where we need to be on guard and ready to step up for voting rights at any moment. From Congress, to the Department of Justice, to state legislatures, and to the courts -- we've got our work cut out for us.
Our right to vote is worth defending and we need you with us. Fuel our work with $25 or however much you can today and make every vote count in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010725_2&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

It’s official, Peter. . .

Yesterday, Congress certified the 2024 election, and Donald Trump is set to become our next president.

But make no mistake: _No matter who occupies the Oval Office, Kim will always fight for what's right._ That means she’ll always stand strong for lower healthcare costs, reproductive freedom, and work tirelessly to find real solutions for our farmers.

Kim is unwavering in her commitment to these issues, and the biggest motivator behind her work is YOU. It's your priorities she’s bringing forward, and it's your needs that she's striving to meet. As we head into this new administration, Kim is going to need all of us more than ever. _Will you stand with her?_

clean_body: Donald Trump will soon hold the Oval Office. It’s official, Peter. . . Yesterday, Congress certified the 2024 election, and Donald Trump is set to become our next president. But make no mistake: No matter who occupies the Oval Office, Kim will always fight for what's right. That means she’ll always stand strong for lower healthcare costs, reproductive freedom, and work tirelessly to find real solutions for our farmers. Kim is unwavering in her commitment to these issues, and the biggest motivator behind her work is YOU. It's your priorities she’s bringing forward, and it's your needs that she's striving to meet. As we head into this new administration, Kim is going to need all of us more than ever. Will you stand with her? Together, we will continue to push for a better future. Thank you for your support, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is unacceptable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Our elections have to mean something.

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100025582/521555157/823540626?refcode=ea.be7b1569-5fcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.be7b1569-5fcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTdiMTU2OS01ZmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLoO2tWgSGIgjzc_t0mw7lU1lO_uNm1NNc_hZDE9AFA=&emci=62f074d6-52cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=be7b1569-5fcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=1049176)
**Today, the Republican supermajority on the North Carolina Supreme Court gave their party the chance to toss tens of thousands of legal votes into the trash, unseat a duly elected Supreme Court Justice, and secure even more power for the GOP.** By preventing the Elections Board from certifying Justice Allison Riggs’ electoral victory, the Republican justices are bowing to the Republican Party and the losing Republican candidate instead of the people. They’re telling the voters that as long as Republicans hold power, they can throw out election results when they don’t like the outcome. Peter, accepting the results of free and fair elections shouldn’t be about party politics. For the sake of our democracy, leaders must remain committed to ensuring every vote is counted and the people’s voices are heard. Justice Riggs won. A recount confirmed it. Her opponent’s bid to throw out tens of thousands of legal ballots — including those of several Democratic elected officials and both of Riggs’ parents — is an egregious attempt to silence the voters and manipulate our electoral system. North Carolina deserves better than power grabs and electoral partisanship. Our elections _have_ to mean something, Peter. **[I need you to stand with me and Justice Riggs immediately and sign my petition opposing the NC Supreme Court’s ruling. Click here to add your name >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100025583/521555158/1153093607?refcode=ea.be7b1569-5fcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.be7b1569-5fcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTdiMTU2OS01ZmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLoO2tWgSGIgjzc_t0mw7lU1lO_uNm1NNc_hZDE9AFA=&emci=62f074d6-52cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=be7b1569-5fcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100025584/521555159/1153093607?refcode=ea.be7b1569-5fcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.be7b1569-5fcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTdiMTU2OS01ZmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLoO2tWgSGIgjzc_t0mw7lU1lO_uNm1NNc_hZDE9AFA=&emci=62f074d6-52cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=be7b1569-5fcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=1049176)

name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b7ce565a1b4f4a99b5ada2e79ae99c75&_e=ZAxgHjY4jDik4ZHrW__KsmJj7WlLebvp3_QEYEfdQNmp6Hcskuqm9aEoLM4iPS1hIfIq2HQN5WHUTMTZGhGtrm7LSyRgnyLp5L8eEfF1tK2BcmmkRij-dLztMmd015PrH_AB_-TWDiE--L_eHYV79K6YmadxxfTK7de9im6wj7oNad87dlnBKC7FXr1lUBFImmpOKzpC3b1in21n3EoXwHrMajJtT2Q-NeDpHIjcQd3mBxZSL2rRrRGZBIAOklSDIf7DMk1GXY7d0ejr1l-j-ndblMSC_1JoR8b3r7z82tRt8rZRmrm345C7hv215MU1BlTwzF_X0aoG8VTyM_mzUV06sPQmt3HscOjFFZ1F4ASWcB_Sa66lyOctpnEY_QrljF_WF_NBCME68kx0AA9H2w%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b7ce565a1b4f4a99b5ada2e79ae99c75&_e=ZAxgHjY4jDik4ZHrW__KsmJj7WlLebvp3_QEYEfdQNmp6Hcskuqm9aEoLM4iPS1hIfIq2HQN5WHUTMTZGhGtrm7LSyRgnyLp5L8eEfF1tK2BcmmkRij-dLztMmd015PrH_AB_-TWDiE--L_eHYV79K6YmadxxfTK7de9im6wj7oNad87dlnBKC7FXr1lUBFImmpOKzpC3b1in21n3EoXwHrMajJtT2Q-NeDpHIjcQd1wEERxy_Xu7OLQN_5ca33aO_7T3p6jMfoWwYQs0w6uZatdKYSOamEfLpFeQOm_Ak0aNwUdwOFew6x7syYgGhuZVNou0Ln_yhzUxHfogrFdEj7O2gO_ulEwUXqBfwYj1DS8DgZHYEMlWYVkWkPRKYyP0v_hWfJONzGTAZN2r33aGA%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b7ce565a1b4f4a99b5ada2e79ae99c75&_e=ZAxgHjY4jDik4ZHrW__KsmJj7WlLebvp3_QEYEfdQNmp6Hcskuqm9aEoLM4iPS1hIfIq2HQN5WHUTMTZGhGtrm7LSyRgnyLp5L8eEfF1tK2BcmmkRij-dLztMmd015PrH_AB_-TWDiE--L_eHYV79K6YmadxxfTK7de9im6wj7oNad87dlnBKC7FXr1lUBFImmpOKzpC3b1in21n3EoXwHrMajJtT2Q-NeDpHIjcQd1KtOnKj7lnrDTet-vDZ9IcBkwoNRPB5YRbF0WxUNteR3gkw2Lf0HcZJNC4Z6-BWKYXpGdgaIjCpr2PuH7V_jhraB71IhhhDIFJwqInAheR5MNNTxt_SWeEsKabHMZiw-fhYXuHysgWhFMk52aGGHDdzUVAQO6kJcKPdKNV75xZOw%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b7ce565a1b4f4a99b5ada2e79ae99c75&_e=ZAxgHjY4jDik4ZHrW__KsmJj7WlLebvp3_QEYEfdQNmp6Hcskuqm9aEoLM4iPS1hIfIq2HQN5WHUTMTZGhGtrm7LSyRgnyLp5L8eEfF1tK2BcmmkRij-dLztMmd015PrH_AB_-TWDiE--L_eHYV79K6YmadxxfTK7de9im6wj7oNad87dlnBKC7FXr1lUBFImmpOKzpC3b1in21n3EoXwHrMajJtT2Q-NeDpHIjcQd2iiJ9_EWakPfwvR4yTJT-IMFmDzjqe1E6MptN8rgcwG1XOOOYZDBtf6SNE7sJfL9SVJEhLxu0OwYgMlOJCAfJIcJAi075Rz6InhN7G1XikKO8eHMz1V5JdJHyYuZk7dZdaryBTSRmLarQ_f2C5scJvX78kL44sDsHyegXI5mIqyw%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b7ce565a1b4f4a99b5ada2e79ae99c75&_e=ZAxgHjY4jDik4ZHrW__KsmJj7WlLebvp3_QEYEfdQNmp6Hcskuqm9aEoLM4iPS1hIfIq2HQN5WHUTMTZGhGtrm7LSyRgnyLp5L8eEfF1tK2BcmmkRij-dLztMmd015PrH_AB_-TWDiE--L_eHYV79K6YmadxxfTK7de9im6wj7oNad87dlnBKC7FXr1lUBFImmpOKzpC3b1in21n3EoXwHrMajJtT2Q-NeDpHIjcQd0v_7pG9Qt_uLA1JFLu9nfVvfrQZkuI_fpWiWXTakiZhCnCD0BD5qflAEIWPap2hQl_QLExDCGYFHIdVoZJAyA4iDBfMVFAUgRjGnypRO219iLdbeMmVLJhCT-6B1e2QTgINDkhqhTIVlu3Be1nNAf6jFg5VhA2QUeqmd-_2Knb5w%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b7ce565a1b4f4a99b5ada2e79ae99c75&_e=ZAxgHjY4jDik4ZHrW__KsmJj7WlLebvp3_QEYEfdQNmp6Hcskuqm9aEoLM4iPS1hIfIq2HQN5WHUTMTZGhGtrm7LSyRgnyLp5L8eEfF1tK2BcmmkRij-dLztMmd015PrH_AB_-TWDiE--L_eHYV79K6YmadxxfTK7de9im6wj7oNad87dlnBKC7FXr1lUBFImmpOKzpC3b1in21n3EoXwHrMajJtT2Q-NeDpHIjcQd2liqbwp27gjhCLiGJ_zBwsvf3TWxeLiR0zymrYg4xpDUd25Em9kkyuu5x1d2L1twCVBEKbeSJ5M8EaTbr_-fPcpVTkQUHyyNNse_ci87gSh1dYc3_Ank73vPcrELTG5Y0mVnliSDYctGzrC0TBbwj3faGSKjefYBidqS2104QKfA%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b7ce565a1b4f4a99b5ada2e79ae99c75&_e=ZAxgHjY4jDik4ZHrW__KsgtQrHLOcGz2AMtJYeg__9rFmlG4gzLeeAoewwbh9XdXyrBPCxzfAF340lcnHMsjzxfVZIYZm3CHRcoAd2uQzkSBMWw8t40gBdrzIRiEEq7N0apXn_U_MoLw2eM52LVNhJF1NnSwhVM7tDGZilVkThV8xRBW4mGvS8y61yGBat3a0mpv9WtX49IMaEF8TbIe_A%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click here to [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=b7ce565a1b4f4a99b5ada2e79ae99c75&_t=hBTqf317yO_TlYSjA9D_NUkeBM8uokeKsdUxuFZ5IMSCrqyo9eY7JBtVMup9CEj8awQ9YQXVbq_o48O62o8jt-1vDWqAmDLVx39dhxWH5vkJ6bRJg2exu7dW3UN6u2UA)

name: Leaders We Deserve HQ
subject: We want to hear from you, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Tell us which issues are most important to you in 2025.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250107-1&t=1&akid=1614%2E587540%2E_pmR-S)
We’re looking for your input today, Peter.
We know we send a lot of surveys and petitions, but we only do it because **your opinions actually matter to us.** We are not beholden to big corporate donors who control what we say or do. We only answer to the real people in this fight with us.
As we kick off 2025, we’re polling our top supporters about which issues are most important in the year ahead. **[Take our brief survey now and share your thoughts.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/lwd-em-2025-issues-survey-20250107/?source=em20250107-1614&akid=1614%2E587540%2E_pmR-S)**
**[Take the Survey »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/lwd-em-2025-issues-survey-20250107/?source=em20250107-1614&akid=1614%2E587540%2E_pmR-S)**
We know that making progress on issues like gun reform, climate change, income inequality, and reproductive rights may seem impossible with a GOP trifecta taking over the government in a few weeks. **But we are not giving up the fight, Peter.**
We’re going to keep championing policy solutions to the issues impacting all of us. And an integral part of that work is identifying, recruiting, and supporting the next generation of progressive elected officials who understand these issues firsthand.
Leaders We Deserve is 100% people-powered. Without you, we can’t do this work. We want to hear what’s on your mind: **[Take our quick 2025 Issues Survey now!](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/lwd-em-2025-issues-survey-20250107/?source=em20250107-1614&akid=1614%2E587540%2E_pmR-S)**
Thank you for sharing your thoughts,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250107-1&t=2&refcode2=1614_587540__pmR-S&akid=1614%2E587540%2E_pmR-S)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1614%2E587540%2E_pmR-S)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1614%2E587540%2E_pmR-S)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Election Night Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: Virginia’s special elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Democrats have over a dozen special elections on the books in states like Minnesota, Delaware, and Louisiana. We need to give our candidates the resources they need to compete and win. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**BREAKING: Democrats just won two all-important special elections and defended control of the Virginia House of Delegates and Senate** These victories show the power of this movement – grassroots donors in your community and beyond chipped in to help fuel our candidates across the finish line. **There’s no better way to start the new year than with a special election victory!** But there’s little time to celebrate: Democrats have over a dozen special elections on the books in states like Delaware, Louisiana, and Minnesota. name: adem@cadem.org
subject: 2025 ADEM Candidate Registration Closing Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/CADEM%20Logo%20%281%29.png]
Democrats,
Don’t forget that the California Democratic Party’s ADEM candidate registration window closes TOMORROW, January 8, 2025, at 12 PM .
In addition, the deadline to withdraw candidate registration closes TOMORROW, January 8, 2025, at 6 PM.
If you want to run in the 2025 ADEM Election, don’t forget to REGISTER AS A CANDIDATE BY NOON TOMORROW.
REGISTER TODAY » [https://ademelections.com/home]
2025 ADEM Key Dates
January 6, 2025
Electronic Ballot Request - Voting Registration OPENS at 12 p.m.
In-person - Voting Participant Registration OPENS at 12 p.m.
January 8, 2025
Candidate Registration Window CLOSES at 12 p.m.
Deadline to Withdraw Candidate Registration at 6 p.m.
January 9, 2025
Final Candidate List Posted
Candidate Statement Submission Form OPENS at 12 p.m.
January 16, 2025
Candidate Statement Submission Form CLOSES at 12 p.m.
January 24, 2025
Electronic Ballot Request - Voting Registration CLOSES at 12 p.m.
January 31, 2025
Electronic Voting Credentials Mailed
February 22, 2025
Saturday ADEM Meetings
February 23, 2025
Sunday ADEM Meetings Electronic Ballot Voting CLOSES at 6 p.m.
In-person - Voting Participant Registration CLOSES at 6 p.m.
February 26, 2025
Deadline to verify Voter Registration CLOSES at 12 p.m.
March 3, 2025
2025 ADEM Results
To learn more about the procedures and key dates for the 2025 ADEM Election, please email adem@cadem.org [adem@cadem.org] or visit the ADEM website by clicking the link below.
ADEM WEBSITE » [https://adem.cadem.org/]
Thank you,
Team CADEM

subject: We’re getting concerned about Liz Cheney...

body:
the MAGA GOP is FURIOUS with her
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22728%2E4449941%2E_sLYw6)
---
| **_Look, we’re getting concerned for Liz Cheney:_** **_The MAGA GOP is FURIOUS with Cheney and scheming to have her thrown in jail!_**

We don’t usually side with Cheney, but she has bravely stood up to Trump and his MAGA allies at every turn. [**Please, the GOP is out to make an example out of Cheney to ensure that no other Republicans dare to stand up to Trump. Sign our petition to stand with Liz Cheney »** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney24?source=FFR_20250106_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=22728%2E4449941%2E_sLYw6) | [25,000 SUPPORTERS NEEDED: Add your name immediately to stand with Liz Cheney »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney24?source=FFR_20250106_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22728%2E4449941%2E_sLYw6)
---
**_Here are three things you need to know:_**
**ONE:** Liz Cheney bucked her party and stood against Trump’s corruption.

**TWO:** Republicans were FURIOUS! _She lost her seat in Congress by standing up for the truth._

**THREE:** **The GOP never stopped attacking her!** They’re hellbent on completely destroying Cheney’s career to send a message to other Republicans.

[**That’s why it’s crucial we get 25,000 signatures standing with Liz Cheney, she’ll know she has the support to keep standing up to the GOP! Sign on to stand with Liz Cheney »** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney24?source=FFR_20250106_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=22728%2E4449941%2E_sLYw6)

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zct709479ntgre7f1i26rlu9a7jc2bja9dh4stmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cph66o72cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3ho1oojpdr9gv92b0i95sub68durm47nki58bn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cph66o72cth2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbcdtcg68k1t8djf027jvj6dsjg537l84h0rrblg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cph66o72cth2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztpegl4uegih1hdvhdbqreftu5v9kjau33v800m8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cph66o72cth2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh42opk2sq86g30ko86mvrsoak0cl1i0l72jb820_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cph66o72cth2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2kjs1t1c63plmps0g4m706mv90croq6khg125q0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cph66o72cth2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd3fimrv4rjjgh9tko6fsjgi8s82685mvaq4hhm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cph66o72cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp36c3im2p32c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6t4ivfs7k7gmkl4aga29ukpfis7skaoaatjh6p8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cph66o72cth2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuoke95bm6d55d8t454acke40a3858hfeer88r2g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6cdj64or0s9jm49fg)

name: 2X YOUR IMPACT
subject: Trusted GOP allies NEED you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
OPEN

|
---
| | |
Friend - we're just weeks away from key special elections that could determine the fate of our House Majority. Democrats are pouring in resources to flip **NY-21, FL-1, and FL-6** , and it's up to us to defend these crucial seats.

With your support, we can defend our America First agenda and maintain our GOP Majority in the House. That's why we're launching a 24-hour fundraising blitz to fuel our efforts on the ground.

**[We'll double every dollar you donate today](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1p93f44i6usi7nhq8k5n8ogtvii9isp660e1vd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj60ob4c3h2bs "We'll double every dollar you donate today")**. That's right - your contribution will be matched 100%, dollar-for-dollar, up to $100,000. This is a critical opportunity to make a real difference in these special elections.

---
| | | [ACTIVATE SPECIAL ELECTION 2X MATCH](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn1nik8uo70j603aaqr4ict480gj626ps3hld7kg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj60ob4c3h2bs "Generic Button")

Here's the reality: if we lose just one of these seats, our Majority will shrink and getting our America First agenda across the finish line will become MUCH more difficult. But with your help, we can ensure that doesn't happen.

name: Amanda Chase
subject: Today is the First Day of Session & There's No Water
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Special Election Results
| | | | 2025 THE HONEY BADGER REPORT
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
---
| 2025 SESSION BEGINS TODAY
---
|
# SPECIAL ELECTION RESULTS
Virginia Senate 21-19 Virginia House 51-49 Virginia Democrats hold the lead in both houses
SENATE DISTRICT 10 Luther Cifers (R) wins with 58% of the vote
SENATE DISTRICT 32 Kannan Srinvasan (D) wins with 61% of the vote
HOUSE DISTRICT 26 JJ Singh (D) wins with 61% of the vote

---
| Dear Friends & Supporters,
There's no drinking water in the City of Richmond right now, which is reeking havoc for the opening day of the Virginia General Assembly. We're being told it will be Thursday at the earliest before the city has drinkable water.
Most activities that take place on the first day of session will be postponed until Monday, including Governor Youngkin's State of the Commonwealth address. Typically, this would have taken place Wednesday afternoon. Hopefully, the City of Richmond will have their water issues resolved Thursday, but that's only if everything goes as planned.
Despite the Richmond City water crisis, the Virginia General Assembly will gavel in tomorrow at noon briefly, and then recess until Monday morning.
If you would like to tune in to tomorrow's brief session, you can do so using the link below.

---
| |
---
|
---
While this publication is free, your contributions are greatly appreciated.
Thank you.
---
| First Day of the 2025 Session: Wednesday, January 8, 2025 at noon
---
| All bills have to be filed by 10am, a deadline to complete the pre-filing of bills before legislators gavel in at noon for Floor Session to adopt the procedural resolutions for both the House and the Senate.
Once complete, we can get started. With every passing day the Floor Session will get longer as bills pass out of committee and on to the floor.

body:

**The second President Trump won the General Election in a HISTORIC LANDSLIDE, Radical Democrats immediately began working to undermine his victory, kneecap his second term, and destroy his legacy once and for all.**

_How? Let 's cue you in:_

Liberal Attorneys General immediately began preparing lawsuits against the incoming Trump Administration. Radical DA Alvin Bragg charged ahead with Trump's sentencing despite winning the presidency. And now, a partisan judge is moving forward with the sentencing RIGHT BEFORE Inauguration Day!

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zv774fpt2ektbqnv29hsp6h0sfoq8r75j3n67mko_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj62p76cdh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zrg6gn6vrjsc0onvh7nqchpt2nigvc0lvt4459mo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj62p76cdh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zm1gc3al28pqo06aa19cacg83gimuf7e393df3uo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj62p76cdh2bs)
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z443th0q9vlemmi8fibltie5irg0f33o2smctbng_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj62p76cdh2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zv83ekv3l8vbu24jt6djn148v0jpp25hokhr9avg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj62p76cdh2bs)

Real American Reporting
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Watch History Unfold at Inauguration Weekend
body:
Turning Point USA is offering one special supporter (and their guest) an ALL-EXPENSES-PAID trip

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0rmsivtpdnpksv8fueih3j4n9pmmilvrc1oo5ho_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6ao72c1h2bs)
---
Friend, On January 20, President DONALD TRUMP will take the oath of office... **_...and Friend, YOU could be there!_**
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zi0jk8orknq2aii36125805fv9huhcb8jsaubon8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6ao72c1h2bs)
---
**Turning Point USA is offering one special supporter (and their guest) an ALL-EXPENSES-PAID trip for inauguration weekend** - a ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME opportunity to be part of one of the most significant moments in modern American history. **[Friend, will you make a generous gift of $25, $50, $100, or more to support Turning Point USA before January 10th? We'll choose the supporter for this special giveaway on January 11th!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1u8j050n4v8487giqa33f2ggu2ldakikrtd2a20_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6ao72c1h2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA now**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zf0ecob6jp4b5eme1h529gv6d46cbomsm1istq78_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6ao72c1h2bs)
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zretl1e05ih2btitjp2luhi6lp9sgl6b4gfoaf4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6ao72c1h2bs)
---
At Turning Point's AMERICAFEST in December, President Trump stood before thousands of young patriots and declared that a new era of AMERICAN GREATNESS was beginning. **[**Now YOU and your guest have the opportunity to potentially join Turning Point USA to celebrate INAUGURATION WEEKEND:**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvbkuvnlojpb838idk4okkikp4itqgo4dgc00960_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6ao72c1h2bs)**
* On SUNDAY midday, join President Trump's pre-inauguration event,

* On SUNDAY evening, enjoy VIP tickets to the Turning Point Inaugural Ball, and

* On MONDAY midday, attend the INAUGURATION of the 47th President in Washington, DC!

Plus, you'll receive round-trip flights to Washington, DC and luxury hotel accommodations for inauguration weekend. **Don't miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to be part of history, Friend.** **[Make your gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more by 11:59 PM ET on January 10th-- and you could be the special Turning Point USA supporter who wins this inauguration weekend celebration!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkrrjsd5v3kdeuf25dhv7ljmlcni2jnivcv0aov8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6ao72c1h2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA now**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za6pa6ejdk0m9inr3bfi35v2pnst2l2m0h2laokg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6ao72c1h2bs)
---
Thank YOU for your patriotism and your generous support. In 2024, we worked together to inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again -- and won back an ENTIRE GENERATION in favor of FREEDOM and PATRIOTISM. Now, in 2025, you can help Turning Point USA do more than ever before, starting with this massive celebration of AMERICA'S GOLDEN AGE. **[Please, Friend, don't miss your chance: make your gift right away to secure your chance to join me and Turning Point USA for inauguration weekend.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9favtdc3lj33pdj4t3id3boisvbuipcqc02stsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6ao72c1h2bs)**
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp9k6hgcmqs5knpub2khd52a2qkcggoo0puatsng_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6eor4c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhjt176nub9co4pg40ifn695kb2e8rtospkl83mo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6eor4c9h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp52gqjhrovk4i7t3psga7ac3lmqdbe4pg9d6iv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6eor4c9h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z38urem4anoropjlc2s8v4bjv9ipr7ru23l5a5gg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6eor4c9h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z76a3npa4mgk9iiiuud0u961vmglgj56fqstvnto_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6eor4c9h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhs9cdfqt5ito18t2knulihhg3o0nq19o7fe7l40_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6eor4c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zaed8ut0gb33jv60qjm483obtg5j4i0nrogb3hqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6eor0cth2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrm9vo6h9jbnv71t69a1enjo9vp8brrpjkb4ogi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6eor0cth2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zicepgsh50nhb6vct1tidspbqsh85jipaa5320o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6eor0cth2bs)
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z32l7l329d7jfbh0gaombvmjtbqnd2l8u55ggkgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cpj6eor0cth2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Trump's UNHINGED Press Conference
body:
Here are the top 5 INSANE things Trump said in yesterday's press conference.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w0dw5-s2pnin-kyd76rh6/)
---
# **Top 5 UNHINGED Moments from Trump's Press Conference**
---
|
---
| | | | Hey friend, we need to talk about this. President-elect Donald Trump unveiled a series of reckless, unhinged ideas in yesterday's press conference, showing us exactly why he remains a threat to our nation and the world. From attacking other countries with bizarre claims to disrespecting our global allies, Trump’s agenda reveals a man unfit for leadership. Here are the **Top 5 Takeaways** from Trump’s alarming press conference: **1.) Threatening Military Action Over Greenland and the Panama Canal** Trump _refused_ to rule out using military force or economic coercion to seize Greenland and retake control of the Panama Canal. These statements are not just dangerous—they signal his willingness to ignite international conflict to satisfy his delusional vision of American dominance. **2.) Renaming the Gulf of Mexico?** Trump wants to rename the Gulf of Mexico to the "Gulf of America," calling it "beautiful." This echoes a dangerous precedent going on in the MAGA world. Zero respect for borders, zero respect for our allies, and no hesitation to spark conflict with other countries. **3.) Whales and Windmills?** In a bizarre claim, Trump blamed windmills for making whales "go crazy." This outrageous claim is just one of many conspiracy theories Trump has pushed about renewable energy. Whether he’s completely out of touch with reality or deliberately sowing distrust in these critical, environmentally safe energy sources, the result is the same—misleading the public and stalling progress. **4.) Rolling Back Biden’s Environmental Protections** Trump announced his intention to overturn protections for 625 million acres of federal waters, prioritizing corporate profits over our planet's future. **5.) Doubling Down on Divisive Politics** Trump once again railed against special counsel investigations, lashed out at allies, and stoked his base with dangerous rhetoric. This press conference is a chilling reminder of the chaos he brought to his first term—and his intent to bring even more in his second. [**_The stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump’s reckless ideas and erratic behavior threaten global stability, environmental safety, and America’s standing in the world. clean_body: Here are the top 5 INSANE things Trump said in yesterday's press conference. | | | | | | Top 5 UNHINGED Moments from Trump's Press Conference | | | | | Hey friend, we need to talk about this. President-elect Donald Trump unveiled a series of reckless, unhinged ideas in yesterday's press conference, showing us exactly why he remains a threat to our nation and the world. From attacking other countries with bizarre claims to disrespecting our global allies, Trump’s agenda reveals a man unfit for leadership. Here are the Top 5 Takeaways from Trump’s alarming press conference: 1.) Threatening Military Action Over Greenland and the Panama Canal Trump refused to rule out using military force or economic coercion to seize Greenland and retake control of the Panama Canal. These statements are not just dangerous—they signal his willingness to ignite international conflict to satisfy his delusional vision of American dominance. 2.) Renaming the Gulf of Mexico? Trump wants to rename the Gulf of Mexico to the "Gulf of America," calling it "beautiful." This echoes a dangerous precedent going on in the MAGA world. Zero respect for borders, zero respect for our allies, and no hesitation to spark conflict with other countries. 3.) Whales and Windmills? In a bizarre claim, Trump blamed windmills for making whales "go crazy." This outrageous claim is just one of many conspiracy theories Trump has pushed about renewable energy. Whether he’s completely out of touch with reality or deliberately sowing distrust in these critical, environmentally safe energy sources, the result is the same—misleading the public and stalling progress. 4.) Rolling Back Biden’s Environmental Protections Trump announced his intention to overturn protections for 625 million acres of federal waters, prioritizing corporate profits over our planet's future. 5.) Doubling Down on Divisive Politics Trump once again railed against special counsel investigations, lashed out at allies, and stoked his base with dangerous rhetoric. This press conference is a chilling reminder of the chaos he brought to his first term—and his intent to bring even more in his second. | | | | Thank you for your help on this pressing matter, -No Dem Left Behind Team | | | | | ONE donation to No Dem Left Behind supports winning the critical rural votes that decide the outcome in EVERY major battleground. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a694b7ed676747bd802ccb8412a1f1e5&_e=EA-bWPPLb9NZHrESrh-9kDGtWcCrTmFlPjnlpfSKlpwfaOAiTozuyyHKSQ7MqPx5r3T8t2ap6xPNYL_Zl7I8JgGeJOxUsoMHqG8F_4WuQhLKAbFq25Ac7KTNmTZKvUK0g5lJ7PjG8DA_mxzE0U_PyJjhtHmvNtCm6IgaurnJJ6pl9j5c5SiJsdFYPsZta5QSGvN5FzjrGOL4ELuwWZmNN7UHgJ9pwkb7YMB-E-OYtafIRc_xX0ZNP9G7pMtCjPyDDbdEn-ziysPcoH2Ug2cRi8DWMBpiOeV2g5gYqb9JyZpOYdjjIie7TLjRrBIj6mWEtP5p3vfo1FOy2m0iko60QPj4mejcal62miubXjjf9Kai8b2DdvSQXumsVT7ULbkeQQrdCTftW2gjMMv9CpIH674S3upS9OubUcaNwB-irbuQAremXfB_eu_YQLHk7lOF) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a694b7ed676747bd802ccb8412a1f1e5&_e=EA-bWPPLb9NZHrESrh-9kDGtWcCrTmFlPjnlpfSKlpwfaOAiTozuyyHKSQ7MqPx5r3T8t2ap6xPNYL_Zl7I8JgGeJOxUsoMHqG8F_4WuQhLKAbFq25Ac7KTNmTZKvUK0g5lJ7PjG8DA_mxzE0U_PyJjhtHmvNtCm6IgaurnJJ6pl9j5c5SiJsdFYPsZta5QSGvN5FzjrGOL4ELuwWZmNN7UHgJ9pwkb7YMB-E-OYtafIRc_xX0ZNP9G7pMtCjPyDDbdEn-ziysPcoH2Ug2cRi8DWMBpiOeV2g5gYqb9JyZooL0-0cniYAQPSSnHWktq90G9UVtRC66fWRp9Xr_ioltkwJXTJTQ2mS7_wUFjkxZMjoUr9Dc8INFjMkNpIUit7I9HYB1MkEsf8Fg9ZxwA2kQ3qYNGppXXyJ51WOI7S7ieyjKihYCpduAZJ9oqGPsVA)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a694b7ed676747bd802ccb8412a1f1e5&_e=EA-bWPPLb9NZHrESrh-9kDGtWcCrTmFlPjnlpfSKlpwfaOAiTozuyyHKSQ7MqPx5r3T8t2ap6xPNYL_Zl7I8JgGeJOxUsoMHqG8F_4WuQhLKAbFq25Ac7KTNmTZKvUK0g5lJ7PjG8DA_mxzE0U_PyJjhtHmvNtCm6IgaurnJJ6pl9j5c5SiJsdFYPsZta5QSGvN5FzjrGOL4ELuwWZmNN7UHgJ9pwkb7YMB-E-OYtafIRc_xX0ZNP9G7pMtCjPyDDbdEn-ziysPcoH2Ug2cRi8DWMBpiOeV2g5gYqb9JyZqZUQFej1e1xVQo-Gu4GMayayw_fewVEu3V4InRwKTCt_qo7BX_x42rHpsZVT_X3RM53tyGxUOhVYhSLJEFq6yQcEb8NDmyWnq8i_91_EXDEz-8ikkiLuxhKK4iIcdr0nME_3Gv6nL0wchrCAi1Ztru),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a694b7ed676747bd802ccb8412a1f1e5&_e=EA-bWPPLb9NZHrESrh-9kDGtWcCrTmFlPjnlpfSKlpwfaOAiTozuyyHKSQ7MqPx5r3T8t2ap6xPNYL_Zl7I8JgGeJOxUsoMHqG8F_4WuQhLKAbFq25Ac7KTNmTZKvUK0g5lJ7PjG8DA_mxzE0U_PyJjhtHmvNtCm6IgaurnJJ6pl9j5c5SiJsdFYPsZta5QSGvN5FzjrGOL4ELuwWZmNN7UHgJ9pwkb7YMB-E-OYtafIRc_xX0ZNP9G7pMtCjPyDDbdEn-ziysPcoH2Ug2cRi8DWMBpiOeV2g5gYqb9JyZohBo9kWU7jHPnhvts0fb97udHS9mMs1Ih3AcF0DnoAuXtpIf8nMbZwEnwJT-hlHg24dv3H3F0bQzY97uOqwKAY7uKwepdu1suW014Rt4bzmOX3AqIoDUQk8UDiATLTUTT-nlSAoourTCulWVbGiwXb) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a694b7ed676747bd802ccb8412a1f1e5&_e=EA-bWPPLb9NZHrESrh-9kDGtWcCrTmFlPjnlpfSKlpwfaOAiTozuyyHKSQ7MqPx5r3T8t2ap6xPNYL_Zl7I8JgGeJOxUsoMHqG8F_4WuQhLKAbFq25Ac7KTNmTZKvUK0g5lJ7PjG8DA_mxzE0U_PyJjhtHmvNtCm6IgaurnJJ6pl9j5c5SiJsdFYPsZta5QSGvN5FzjrGOL4ELuwWZmNN7UHgJ9pwkb7YMB-E-OYtafIRc_xX0ZNP9G7pMtCjPyDDbdEn-ziysPcoH2Ug2cRi8DWMBpiOeV2g5gYqb9JyZqiOlmqMNBX73W8FW-ig1Eh7ylmYqMS8l4dMy5zMs81w8sih14h6oX8Mw4e1ecmLa4gU7bj6K_YBLko-yprzcttrdQBSB62ayTvfSEjSmVt1Eo48gu-nm1Bv9bhp5-Sokv1C2dephptOpHVegJEPOmW)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a694b7ed676747bd802ccb8412a1f1e5&_e=EA-bWPPLb9NZHrESrh-9kDGtWcCrTmFlPjnlpfSKlpwfaOAiTozuyyHKSQ7MqPx5r3T8t2ap6xPNYL_Zl7I8JgGeJOxUsoMHqG8F_4WuQhLKAbFq25Ac7KTNmTZKvUK0g5lJ7PjG8DA_mxzE0U_PyJjhtHmvNtCm6IgaurnJJ6pl9j5c5SiJsdFYPsZta5QSGvN5FzjrGOL4ELuwWZmNN7UHgJ9pwkb7YMB-E-OYtafIRc_xX0ZNP9G7pMtCjPyDDbdEn-ziysPcoH2Ug2cRi8DWMBpiOeV2g5gYqb9JyZqg0BFnVDxjjWQmSScNNE5fBzXC3P-2QygmnpiXD95wip8NrKhakeZ4fYmawSyfBZOf-XahmNrxtHnhoS7N3V3oSonmzoKfKe7WPD8TRcURrX8lYWYqQRmtFdQv6pmw-DMnMT6T74nHzLlN2X7MIg1H) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---
