clean_body: Republicans in minority, but with House seat gains, as 75th General Assembly opens on Wednesday | | | | PRESENTED BY | | Hi folks, Today is the first day of the 75th Colorado General Assembly, a pivotal moment for our state as lawmakers return to tackle the issues that matter most to Coloradans. From housing and education to energy and economic reform, this session promises to shape the future of our communities. As always, Rocky Mountain Voice will keep you informed every step of the way, bringing you the latest updates, debates, and decisions from under the Gold Dome. Here’s to a productive and impactful session ahead! And a summary of today's newsletter: 🏔️Here in Colorado... The begins this week with Republicans gaining a few seats but remaining the minority party. Meanwhile, homelessness among Colorado families has . District 11 in Colorado Springs has with the teachers' union, aiming to prioritize students and families in its education decisions. Additionally, after days of severe wintry weather, Denver International Airport reported over and thousands of delays. For your reading beyond the newsletter, the ongoing placement of migrants has sparked a between the mayors of Denver and Aurora. 🇺🇸On the National Stage... President-elect Trump announced plans to to the "Gulf of America," sparking both intrigue and debate. Meta's Mark Zuckerberg revealed a major shift in Facebook's moderation policies, and moving toward a community-driven approach to content oversight. 🗣️ ****Commentary Spotlight... Lindy Browning examines the impact of combined with avian flu outbreaks, which have left consumers facing skyrocketing prices and empty shelves. This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, January 8, 2025. – Heidi Ganahl | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY BRIAN PORTER, The 75th session of the Colorado General Assembly opens Wednesday, Jan. 8, with sine die — adjournment on the final day of the session — slated for May 7. Between, Republicans will be faced with minorities in both chambers and the Democratic trifecta, with Gov. Jared Polis heading up the executive branch. Voters, though, did hand Republicans one advantage. House Republicans are no longer in a super minority and, like Senate Republicans, face a simple minority. That is not to say it will be any easier to pass Republican bills or defeat Democratic bills. Republicans face a 23-12 minority in the Senate and a 43-22 minority in the House. Heading up the Republican House will again be Minority Leader Rose Pugliese of El Paso County. She has gained three seats from the prior session, when the Republican members were nicknamed the Mighty 19. Ty Winter of Las Animas County is the assistant minority leader. Ryan Armagost of Weld County will be in his first session as minority whip, a position previously held by Richard Holtorf of Washington County. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | A federal report revealed a 134% increase in family homelessness in Colorado during 2024, making it one of four states where family homelessness more than doubled. Rising inflation, stagnant wages, and the nationwide affordable housing crisis have exacerbated homelessness, with Colorado also seeing an influx of migrants, further straining resources. Advocates are urging increased investment in rapid rehousing and child care assistance programs to prevent further family displacement, emphasizing the urgent need for statewide solutions. | A four-day snowstorm in Denver caused major disruptions at Denver International Airport, with 250 flight cancellations and 2,820 delays, severely impacting air travel. SkyWest, Southwest, and United Airlines were hit hardest, accounting for the majority of cancellations and delays, particularly on Saturday and Sunday. As wintry conditions continue, passengers are urged to stay updated on flight statuses and prepare for potential delays or rebookings. | The Colorado Springs District 11 School Board voted 6-1 to end its decades-old master agreement with the Colorado Springs Education Association, citing the need for greater flexibility to address persistent challenges and improve student outcomes. The decision has divided the community, with supporters advocating for governance innovation and detractors raising concerns about the loss of protections for teachers and potential instability in classrooms. The district plans to replace the union agreement with a collaboratively developed employee handbook, aiming to maintain teacher protections while streamlining operations and fostering accountability. | During the last few weeks, there have been a couple of notable changes you may have noticed at your local grocer. disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We want to use this opportunity to do something special!

| |
---
| | | | | [*** EXCLUSIVE INVITATION ***](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8hd7lgk75u9oagrq7burqosi4okhdugrdeof2c0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cphm8o34cph2bs "*** EXCLUSIVE INVITATION ***")
---

_This opportunity is reserved for _**[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zam2bp49nihuvjh5a0leo8qj5hftou5n3n7amcqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cphm8o34cph2bs "dpwillis67@gmail.com")**_ and should not be shared with or forwarded to anyone else._
\----------------------------------------------

Hello -

President Trump and JD Vance just announced their FINAL rally before Inauguration Day and we want to use this opportunity to do something special!

We're organizing an Inauguration Day card reserved only for the top 5% of grassroots Conservatives.

And we're pleased to announce that you made the cut!

_**[So before they're sworn in, we're humbly asking you to add your name before President Trump and JD Vance's rally on 01/19/2025.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmeoeuenhmtdok3u65lbplerlhrbpma6187neuao_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cphm8o34cph2bs "So before they’re sworn in and get to work, we’re humbly asking you to add your name before President Trump and JD Vance’s victory rally on 01/19/2025.")**_

This card means more than you think.

It's not just an outpouring of support for our NEW President and Vice President. It's a show of strength for the movement that Trump and JD dedicated their blood, sweat, and tears to building!

And since you've been the backbone of our movement, we want to make sure they see your name front and center.

So please:

_**[Will you take a moment today to sign our card?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zihv12ishfb6cpvalftr8lorhboqj15jp12m6h9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cphm8o34cph2bs "Will you take a moment today to sign our card?")**_

Thank you,

Team Scalise

\----------------------------------------------
_This opportunity is reserved for _**[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgch96ngen7tedkeeqkil8tq37g78n9p8rh090fo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cphm8o34cph2bs "dpwillis67@gmail.com")**_ and should not be shared with or forwarded to anyone else._

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

Friend,

Most children know very little about the dangers of socialism.

In today’s government schools, preaching socialist propaganda has replaced learning about the values of liberty, American history, free markets, and limited government.

Libertas Institute is dedicated to changing hearts, minds, and laws to build a freer society. But if we are going to build a freer society, the next generation must know about how socialism actually robs them of their liberty.

I wrote _**The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths**_ for this exact purpose.

[If you donate $5 or more to The Tuttle Twins today, then I will send you a copy of _The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths_. Click here to donate >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9220dgkfptti3sv6lqucl6f1h480lre9l2k3i10_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cphm8o34c5h2bs)

Extremism in defense of your kids from radical ideologies is no vice.

We're building a new culture to challenge the many falsehoods making their way through our schools and our society. If you want to combat the forces of socialism — you’ll want to read this book.

This 115-page e-book contains rebuttals to 20 economic myths and 20 political myths. _With each one, we offer a simple analysis of why the particular myth is wrong_.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z598r4eba31jvf6vhuomr2tiq9u7oam03k64cm8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cphm8o34c5h2bs)
As an exclusive offer to our generous supporters, I want to provide you with the ideas and arguments that will enable you and your children to better understand the way the world works and combat the many falsehoods that its people cling to.

You can get your copy of _**The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths**_ by clicking any button below.

[Donate $20](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjdkoqcb9510qg9e039vq7cnt40vai04a1rn8d5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cphm8o34c5h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbhre9tnut0f1smjlh5aicoo5as29p3c725kelbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cphm8o34c5h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoqgoi49v92ui6499og9v2c9hku8ks51essebnk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cphm8o34c5h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhra7ovefs1ic84akp8sdmes8s4mg0henj5526t0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cphm8o34c5h2bs)

body:
We want to use this opportunity to do something special!

| |

| | | | | [*** EXCLUSIVE INVITATION ***](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvrb9jcdkp3cjjkohlrqa1daoa84gb5ed14cagag_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cphm8p72cdh2bs "*** EXCLUSIVE INVITATION ***")

\----------------------------------------------

Hello -

President Trump and JD Vance just announced their FINAL rally before Inauguration Day and we want to use this opportunity to do something special!

We're organizing an Inauguration Day card reserved only for the top 5% of grassroots Conservatives.

And we're pleased to announce that you made the cut!

_**[So before they're sworn in, we're humbly asking you to add your name before President Trump and JD Vance's rally on 01/19/2025.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8efsou4nvdomhbmah273a0cs68c0vbajb7mr6s0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cphm8p72cdh2bs "So before they’re sworn in and get to work, we’re humbly asking you to add your name before President Trump and JD Vance’s victory rally on 01/19/2025.")**_

This card means more than you think.

It's not just an outpouring of support for our NEW President and Vice President. It's a show of strength for the movement that Trump and JD dedicated their blood, sweat, and tears to building!

And since you've been the backbone of our movement, we want to make sure they see your name front and center.

So please:

_**[Will you take a moment today to sign our card?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvmf4fp9mqogmaetldm9l50to905b692vr58vd78_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cphm8p72cdh2bs "Will you take a moment today to sign our card?")**_

Thank you,

Team Scalise

Donald Trump couldn't resist **[interrupting his spokesperson to directly answer](https://substack.com/redirect/f1f4355a-191e-4391-93ea-987da3ffd3ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** a reporter's skepticism about his approach to hostage negotiations with Hamas.

"When you say that all hell will break loose in the middle east if they don't release the hostages..." the reporter started to ask Trump's negotiator.
Trump, who was standing by, jumped in immediately, "That's right. Well you know what that means, don't you?"
**["All hell will break loose,"](https://substack.com/redirect/f1f4355a-191e-4391-93ea-987da3ffd3ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Trump said stoically. "Do I need to define it for you?!"
Watch Trump GO OFF on this reporter for questioning his approach during this very tense press conference.

# Billionaire grabs the mic from Trump, what happens next is AMAZING NEWS for America
Trump introduced one of his latest negotiating successes to the American people yesterday, Emirati billionaire businessman, Hussain Sajwani, who has pledged to invest $20 billion into the U.S. economy, per discussion with Trump.
Listen to what he says when Trump hands him the mic:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/19f67c60-9b2f-4f4b-96af-31c01c28950a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Sajwani is the CEO of property development company DAMAC Properties.
"It's an honor to have such a great investor investing in our country." Trump told reporters. "The investment will support massive new data centers across the mid west, the sunbelt area, and also to keep America on the cutting edge of technology in artificial intelligence."
Trump invited Sajwani to the podium. "Thank you Mr. President, this has been amazing news for me and my family when he was elected in November," he said, expressing gratitude for the opportunity to invest in Trump's America.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/19f67c60-9b2f-4f4b-96af-31c01c28950a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This after Japanese billionaire and Soft Bank CEO Masayoshi Son announced a $100 billion investment into the U.S. economy following negotiations with Trump himself. During the announcement, Trump tried to get Son to double his investment to $200 billion, to which he said "I will try to make it happen."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/54515f95-d70c-41f8-8826-fc347716fb74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Trump is clearly walking the walk with his pledge to bring back American jobs and bolster our economy, and he's not even president yet.

name: Add Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Facebook will no longer fact-check Trump's lies
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand Facebook reverse its decision to end fact-checking](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td191043f-8da2-4e38-8e17-3a478cac9fdb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b2b5a04-153e-457b-b44d-c0a3310c2a60/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Social networking company Meta (which owns Facebook, Instagram, and Threads) has decided to [END](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf73509aa-d347-4077-ac86-412e9603caad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) its fact-checking protocols and allow misinformation to freely flow on their platforms. [**This is a disastrous decision, and they need to reverse it immediately.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teb96fc23-e2eb-4d4f-a9ff-0bcd315f058d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This move is just to please Trump and his MAGA allies, who thrive on their lies and conspiracy theories being spread as far and wide as possible. Meta owner Mark Zuckerberg is bending the knee to curry favor with Trump before he takes office, at our expense. Now instead of news organizations or other third party fact checkers, the only safeguard against misinformation on Facebook and Instagram will be a "community notes" feature which relies on users to comment on false or misleading posts. With Trump about to take office, we need reliable fact-checking more than ever. We can't allow his lies and conspiracy theories to spread unchecked. [**Tell Meta to reverse this awful decision and reinstate fact-checking procedures >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f7e4089-f6f5-409a-b465-572dc45261c5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb55746c9-a31c-41fe-ac7c-2059e08b5878/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8dc08a37-98ec-4d1a-bce1-b3936032d214/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2018c7d-be33-45da-a6fd-d5060299361e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11f1fe3a-2fc0-4ec9-8590-d4ac32829bf5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0c1189b-63a8-4fb2-9954-47a865e04b89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Link inside >>> | | | | | Fellow Conservative, 2024 is a wrap and the New Year is here - Ted and our entire team can't wait to get to work to get our great nation back on track! You've been among our top supporters, and we wanted to reach out quickly to give you one last chance to get your hands on the limited quantities we have left of our Keep Texas, Texas campaign gear. We have t-shirts, hoodies, hats, coffee mugs, and more available still, but our remaining inventory is going to run out quick. Wearing or displaying these items is a GREAT way to show you were part of our victory! Thank you so much for your grassroots conservative activism and thank you for your campaign support in 2024. Together, we got the job done and handed the left a big defeat. Let's stay fired up this year and move the ball down the field to SAVE AMERICA! \- Team Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. |

Fellow Patriot, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point's AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Fellow Patriot, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President-elect's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Twelve years of GIFFORDS
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Some assume that Gabby founded GIFFORDS in response to her own shooting, but that’s actually not the case.
#

Friends -
On January 8, 2011, Gabby was serving as the representative for Arizona’s 8th Congressional District. She woke up thinking she’d have a pretty typical day, and she was excited to be hosting an event to meet with her constituents in front of a Safeway in Tucson:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250108-1-b&t=1&akid=9781%2E3935704%2EyDT3Ts)
But this seemingly routine day turned into a day of tragedy when a gunman opened fire at her “Congress on Your Corner” event, shooting Gabby in the head and changing the trajectory of her life. Twelve others were injured, and six innocent people lost their lives that day.
The bullet damaged the left side of Gabby’s brain, where language is processed, leading to a condition called aphasia. While speaking is still difficult for Gabby, she has never given up in her recovery journey—even on the most difficult days.
Some assume that Gabby founded GIFFORDS in response to her own shooting, but that’s actually not the case. It wasn’t until after the shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut that Gabby had the idea for GIFFORDS, then known as Americans for Responsible Solutions.
Just weeks after the shooting at Sandy Hook, Gabby and Mark visited Newtown to spend time with the families of the young children and staff members who lost their lives. Upon hearing their stories, Gabby felt compelled to take action. And so even though she was in the early days of her own recovery, Gabby founded GIFFORDS on January 8, 2013—exactly two years after she was shot in Tucson.
Since GIFFORDS’ founding, we’ve helped pass over 700 gun safety laws in states nationwide. We worked with the Biden-Harris administration to help pass the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ , the most significant federal gun safety legislation in nearly 30 years. Overall, we have changed the national conversation around gun safety and brought it to the forefront, when just a decade ago elected officials were too afraid to even talk about gun safety over fears of political division.
The progress we’ve made is undeniable. But the fight to end gun violence isn’t finished yet. More than 40,000 people in America die from gun violence each year. Gun violence is the number one killer of children in teens in our nation.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250108-1-b&t=2&akid=9781%2E3935704%2EyDT3Ts)
[**We must keep moving forward in the fight to end gun violence. So today we are asking: In honor of 12 years of GIFFORDS, will you please make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC to help fuel our work to save lives?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250108-1-b&t=3&akid=9781%2E3935704%2EyDT3Ts)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan25.3xfxGv&amount=3&refcode=em250108-1-b&t=4&akid=9781%2E3935704%2EyDT3Ts)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan25.3xfxGv&refcode=em250108-1-b&t=5&akid=9781%2E3935704%2EyDT3Ts)**
---
****
Thank you so much in advance for your contribution on this important day for Gabby and our organization.
Sincerely,
The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=9781%2E3935704%2EyDT3Ts) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Democrats,
Don’t forget that the California Democratic Party’s ADEM candidate registration window closes TODAY, January 8, 2025, at 12 PM .
In addition, the deadline to withdraw candidate registration closes TODAY, January 8, 2025, at 6 PM.
If you want to run in the 2025 ADEM Election, don’t forget to REGISTER AS A CANDIDATE BY NOON TODAY.

name: Ryoko Wifi
subject: Never lose signal again with portable Wi-Fi
body:
Did you know that it's now possible to take the internet with you wherever you go this summer?...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19654/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/cc7f99787e22d4680bce3f6dd85350b23155a841). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19654/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/cc7f99787e22d4680bce3f6dd85350b23155a841?message_id=ImExYWEyZGIwLWIwMjktMDEzZC0zMDFiLTIyMzQzNGEyODk3Y0BuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).

| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19654/6374453/990bc1d337544279ee283c828ca956bde475b607/cc7f99787e22d4680bce3f6dd85350b23155a841)

[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19654/6374453/6ce869e32a7f5350f0e5417ed24109580590c29d/cc7f99787e22d4680bce3f6dd85350b23155a841)
---
|
---
| | Hey, Did you know that it's now possible to take the internet with you wherever you go this summer? **Muama Ryoko is a pocket sized router that gives you insanely fast Wi-Fi** connection anywhere you travel. This amazing device acts as a wireless modem by creating a Wi-Fi network around itself using 4G LTE. **[YES, I WANT TO ORDER MY MUAMA RYOKO TODAY](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19654/6374453/990bc1d337544279ee283c828ca956bde475b607/cc7f99787e22d4680bce3f6dd85350b23155a841)** No more paying high fees for internet usage or not having internet at all. Now your family can enjoy the benefits of wireless internet wherever they go. **The Muama Ryoko** lets you stay connected to the internet even in the mountains. ⟩Connect up to 10 devices to extremely fast Wi-Fi wherever you travel. ⟩No contract needed and No hidden charges just an amazing deal. ⟩Superfast internet speeds up to 150Mbs. **[SEND ME MY MUAMA RYOKO PORTABLE WIRELESS MODEM](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19654/6374453/990bc1d337544279ee283c828ca956bde475b607/cc7f99787e22d4680bce3f6dd85350b23155a841)** With summer quickly approaching, there's no better time to start forming your travel plans. But don’t wait too long, this is a limited time offer as supplies are running low. **Get your Muama Ryoko portable internet today.**
---
|
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19654/6374453/990bc1d337544279ee283c828ca956bde475b607/cc7f99787e22d4680bce3f6dd85350b23155a841)

body:
We’re stunned...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22727%2E4449941%2EsT_SUq)
---
**BAD NEWS:** _MSNBC’s_ sharp drop in recent ratings has led to Comcast deciding to sell the network. [](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20250108_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=22727%2E4449941%2EsT_SUq) **WORSE NEWS:** Far-right billionaire Elon Musk is considering purchasing it!

We’re **stunned** to see that MSNBC is struggling after years of being one of the top options for progressive news.

**So we’re conducting an _URGENT_ poll to see our top supporters viewing habits:** | **[_[1-CLICK POLL] Do you watch _MSNBC?__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20250108_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22727%2E4449941%2EsT_SUq)** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20250108_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=22727%2E4449941%2EsT_SUq) | **[YES, I DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20250108_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=22727%2E4449941%2EsT_SUq)**
---
**[NO, I DON'T »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20250108_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=22727%2E4449941%2EsT_SUq)**
**** 500 LOCAL POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM TO MAKE THIS POLL VIABLE. ****
Donald Trump and his MAGA army have waged a war against any news channel that doesn’t bow down to him and promote his dangerous rhetoric.

_Now, Trump’s biggest supporter is trying to buy it and RUIN one of the most trusted news sources in America._

We need to know if our supporters are still watching MSNBC or if they’ve abandoned the once beloved network.
**[_So PLEASE: submit your poll response quickly! »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20250108_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=22727%2E4449941%2EsT_SUq)**
**500 LOCAL POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM**
Thank you for your commitment to upholding democracy,

-FFR Polling Team
_MSNBC_ is not associated or affiliated with Fight for Reform and has not sponsored or approved of this communication.

Hey there, Meet the Tomahawk that’s a cut above the rest - a tool that perfectly merges rugged durability, slick design, and multi-purpose functionality. Please, allow us to introduce [the Steel River Tomahawk. ](https://links.zerolethal.com/a/1537/click/19658/6374453/6fa511deccfdb2673158d9761ab3a30d11a8dfef/3ab520856b45b14700c6098680bc7934cdf9d15a) But be warned, this isn't your run-of-the-mill tool - it's a workhorse wrapped in sleek sophistication, ready to accompany you on your most exciting adventures. Crafted from top-notch forged steel, this tomahawk isn't just built to last; it's built to conquer. Its 3.5” blade provides precision cutting, chopping, and hacking capabilities. It's finished with a sexy black coating, giving it a distinct, stealthy appeal. No more unnecessary exertion - whether you're felling small trees or splitting firewood, [the Steel River Tomahawk](https://links.zerolethal.com/a/1537/click/19658/6374453/6fa511deccfdb2673158d9761ab3a30d11a8dfef/3ab520856b45b14700c6098680bc7934cdf9d15a) is designed to work with you, not against you. And that's not all. The handle of our tomahawk is wrapped in **military-grade paracord**. You never know when you might need some sturdy cordage in the wild. Want to see it for yourself? [Click here](https://links.zerolethal.com/a/1537/click/19658/6374453/6fa511deccfdb2673158d9761ab3a30d11a8dfef/3ab520856b45b14700c6098680bc7934cdf9d15a) to get a closer look. But be quick - a tool this extraordinary won't stay in stock for long! Adventure awaits, and the Steel River Tomahawk is ready to take you there.

name: Action Alert (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Release Jack Smith’s report on the Trump classified documents case
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Demand the release of Jack Smith’s report on Trump’s classified documents case](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2cf6387-3f9e-47d3-8236-e887d7f98b38/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2eab2c6e-1414-459e-955d-05d90df742ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump fanatic Judge Aileen Cannon just BLOCKED the Justice Department from releasing Jack Smith's report on the classified documents case – the one where Trump took hundreds of classified documents, hid them at Mar-a-Lago, lied about it for over a year, and defied a subpoena to give them back, putting our national security in serious jeopardy. This is just the latest instance of Cannon bending over backwards to help Trump, after she dismissed the classified documents case entirely. With Trump about to take office and once again have access to classified information, we need to know what's in that report. It needs to be released officially--or someone needs to leak the damn thing [**Sign your name to demand the release of Jack Smith's report on Trump's classified documents case >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f7e6314-ae6d-48d9-888e-725070e77991/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---

Team, As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022. However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia. Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them – supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between – I can’t wait to meet everyone! Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth. [**That’s why I’m asking you to invest in my campaign and Serve America today as we build the strongest foundation possible. Peter, January 20th can’t come fast enough.

Even with just a couple of weeks left of his presidency, Joe Biden is enforcing radical liberal environmentalist policies that will hamper our energy sector. With just 12 days left of his presidency, he has banned almost ALL new offshore oil and gas drilling. Energy independence is one of the most important issues, and Joe Biden is setting us back by signing these policies.

When President Trump starts his term, he will work to unwind all of this, and I’ll be happy to support him every step of the way. However, we’ll still need help to pass our Pro-America energy policies. **[**Will you chip in to support our mission of energy independence?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-xG-eeZJ6vdrQ)**

Troy Downing

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: What Do We Know About The 12 Disciples Of Jesus? | Tonight At Sheridan.Church
body:
While Jesus ministered here on earth nearly 2000 years ago, He did not do it alone. Jesus selected 12 ordinary yet extraordinary men to be His discip
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10219.1.5b5e6eae37203af5c833bf2087d9a699) |
---
While **Jesus** ministered here on earth _nearly 2000 years ago_ , He did not do it alone. **Jesus** selected 12 _ordinary_ yet _extraordinary_ men to be **His disciples**. Tonight at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10220.1.72081a8f07114acc56c8e90314e0a1d5), we will dive into what we know about these original followers of **Jesus** who "_turned the world upside down_." Join me at 7pm for **Matthew Pt. 19 - Assembling The Kingdom Dream Team** Watch online: [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10221.1.0aa9228e1a19ca494f712837d2226ae1) **Upcoming Events:** -Sun, Jan 12 @10am: **Erick Stakelbeck** -Wed, Feb 26 @7pm: **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** -Thur, Mar 6 @6:30pm: **Eric Trump** | RSVP: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1493676 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10222.1.2367398d11509568278b25373cf44145) Also, please consider partnering w/Sheridan by visiting [https://sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10223.1.8eff5d7aa34b3547abd58a75ae558530) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
---
## Big UPDATES At Sheridan.Church
---
|
---
I am _beyond excited_ to share with you that in 2025, [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10224.1.60c3ddacbb46f1843bcb3588cc2c8e38) will be getting an **outside facelift** along with the **installation of an outdoor basketball/pickle-ball court** targeting the next generation! With your help previously, we have taken a **former night-club** and _transformed_ it into a **beautiful church** on the inside. Now it's time to tackle the outside. **Phase 1** of this project (outside facelift + basketball/pickle-ball court) will cost the church around $250,000. We do things on a cash basis at [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10225.1.3aab5089b5bfd947cdb38b31c1bb8a7f) and _I need your help_. Please consider partnering with us in 2025 with a gift of **$25** , **$250** , **$2500** _or more_. This message is going out to **thousands of believers** and if everybody will do something in 2025, we can accomplish this phase of transforming a **former tavern** into a **tabernacle**. Take a look at the pictures below! **Phase 2** is the addition of an upper deck of seating to our main auditorium. You can give by visiting [https://sheridan.church/give ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10226.1.42a120cbb57e159ab7c2acb098579a62) Thank you in advance!
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

You are invited to come _meet_ and _hear_ from [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10229.1.a360789bb88c2a2b479fbe6a6740f433) on Thursday, March 6 at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10230.1.d8a34f0d79f6ba79a13277c3c9d106a5) in Tulsa, OK. In October, we had **Eric** at **Sheridan** and it was an incredible event. You can watch it here: [https://www.youtube.com/livetrump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10231.1.839f21d41efc8726d60b75ad222e3751) However, this March will be even better because **President Trump** will already be in the **White House** and we will hear _exclusive insights_ from **Eric** of what is taking place in the **Trump administration**. There will also be other guests at this event that we will announce as we get closer. Seating is **VERY** limited for this event. Please [RSVP](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10232.1.8fca18d1a95f34e6373d2c47cd1625f5) here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1493676](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10233.1.24cd4ac4d6061f718c331dfe59c1a0f3) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

## 1st Guest Speaker of 2025 @Sheridan.Church
---
|
---
Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10235.1.ac4a63206412db5297464e5b5fc33195), we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. Including: [Perry Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10236.1.3f4bc8ae23c2939f10b11d42115106d3), **Tim Tebow** , [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10237.1.c329fdbf0a1d9a4e14f9ec31ee8f7d14)., [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10238.1.63d3e30984a5f692b3c4fed2649b224f), [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10239.1.3b93391cfcd38eb4d24fc960b6e40c3b), [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10240.1.efbc18ca0e1fda9d4095b2b296e88276), [Darryl Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10241.1.114a27d168f74e45a1848921c0c5e175), **General Michael Flynn** , [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10242.1.293e478f6a1ad4305fd467fc6539ac98), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10243.1.2198f764aaf2ad894868361dc2432e92), [Dr. Randy Caldwell](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10244.1.c1c899413b59961e812c0699f6b84462), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10245.1.3bfa8e3b85148c89fb3ad883672ca501), Rodney Howard-Browne and so many others...
But our first guest speaker of 2025, I am very excited about!
Mark your calendars for **Erick Stakelbeck** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18872207.10246.1.836fcdd54f19e5e045dd69b231f07aa0) on Sunday, January 12 at 10am CT.
Erick's show on **TBN** is _phenomenal_ and that Sunday in January will be just as great!

name: Hillsdale College via Liberty Pulse
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.
| | |
---
| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=1aaa5f6d994347b887dc826d32bf9c09&_t=vp7kQkpSpszqWGbbCYFyaf1LgkuKdWlWxahqoAggyaLvszkG4mV1EujCtJ2FOe3VltFInmmWN-igMjeZQ2iMCsTVy0Y4z7eEosNzp88mHC91AWU9vGwzhgHf32PuNtNr)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=1aaa5f6d994347b887dc826d32bf9c09&_e=UBkjsYJQ8fS6E9Ubc5st6oKKiy2ElLdUimbaFpc97Fb7DQKt2LJFO4DZSgpM8WWw7bdc_OqT93WQVONqJNJlNS03OTRDSLVWKhB-p2drXc0NhFfMV38nCOfPblP-wiyBJUABPZjMEsfYByO3Lx41sxKh9JgDsnvBMi_jcsD12QE1VXpEm1gRTXNCosi7gJvseQtumGGJu2EDMj_-un2TkX_0thtnHwKT672lU_VKJnpqqMrYm6k3hITQIx5k_dGHASxcg8UJrBNingI4EgiZH7fPm8hPZG42hWaUU5-Q8GxJF7bxkn7MXXjeTN6ei0XYaemZ6J0BkfP8IifdKHZ8K6h9sGk8HxXNMGy005bmXwd_CmDsoVgjn7LiwyPybURf31Q_10cZds7DaazZCB_HgA%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=1aaa5f6d994347b887dc826d32bf9c09&_e=UBkjsYJQ8fS6E9Ubc5st6oKKiy2ElLdUimbaFpc97Fb7DQKt2LJFO4DZSgpM8WWw7bdc_OqT93WQVONqJNJlNS03OTRDSLVWKhB-p2drXc0NhFfMV38nCOfPblP-wiyBJUABPZjMEsfYByO3Lx41sxKh9JgDsnvBMi_jcsD12QE1VXpEm1gRTXNCosi7gJvseQtumGGJu2EDMj_-un2TkX_0thtnHwKT672lU_VKJno22orVwFelXROYLTCJ2J7Am4v-sUYvWXfIc9tUhTIvxGfqIevL8V3Lvh_Y5PX9X7-IFtMBOpqbL9hSsa5UPpRSlvGPV_Pv0Ea9GsujhmUDKkiO_40SVwbMu4PCl3I6l0GurAk0SBLBvq5f4ih9xpnTiU9dopRImqlWD3cLszv50A%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=1aaa5f6d994347b887dc826d32bf9c09&_e=UBkjsYJQ8fS6E9Ubc5st6oKKiy2ElLdUimbaFpc97Fb7DQKt2LJFO4DZSgpM8WWw7bdc_OqT93WQVONqJNJlNS03OTRDSLVWKhB-p2drXc0NhFfMV38nCOfPblP-wiyBJUABPZjMEsfYByO3Lx41sxKh9JgDsnvBMi_jcsD12QE1VXpEm1gRTXNCosi7gJvseQtumGGJu2EDMj_-un2TkX_0thtnHwKT672lU_VKJnptiO3oiObrbxDMhCH4SbBWL27IZbn5AlBCbWgv4Pw5_-tUxhU7Y41vp4Iqke2PPCvXLmvvRwxtK0YnanH8JLXuVS8t5skDUxoxKCEDLpiCZb9h8QT8j-raDTYS2V9e1yRDclVgGwYh62y8Jc6zJzJmvw_oyfnKCZxLLFv4zteLVA%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=1aaa5f6d994347b887dc826d32bf9c09&_e=UBkjsYJQ8fS6E9Ubc5st6oKKiy2ElLdUimbaFpc97Fb7DQKt2LJFO4DZSgpM8WWw7bdc_OqT93WQVONqJNJlNS03OTRDSLVWKhB-p2drXc0NhFfMV38nCOfPblP-wiyBJUABPZjMEsfYByO3Lx41sxKh9JgDsnvBMi_jcsD12QE1VXpEm1gRTXNCosi7gJvseQtumGGJu2EDMj_-un2TkX_0thtnHwKT672lU_VKJnoVjGWL-ua0gj5AFHoeDeDxHYX38-kmz6hEuDkOG-8xwknMTQwJFZe--JUvw5Hw7UoUntyZ9llzXdGEXvLWvy7r-2-neCg4vYsjSrzE01VfDFU1RQG86biiqm1WdZ3og8ybK8zD34SXdt_g3AC98E5igGJh39Yu8fh4iIFAbqjQyA%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=1aaa5f6d994347b887dc826d32bf9c09&_e=UBkjsYJQ8fS6E9Ubc5st6oKKiy2ElLdUimbaFpc97Fb7DQKt2LJFO4DZSgpM8WWw7bdc_OqT93WQVONqJNJlNS03OTRDSLVWKhB-p2drXc0NhFfMV38nCOfPblP-wiyBJUABPZjMEsfYByO3Lx41sxKh9JgDsnvBMi_jcsD12QE1VXpEm1gRTXNCosi7gJvseQtumGGJu2EDMj_-un2TkX_0thtnHwKT672lU_VKJnoZKZkpRr_Ov133NJ5PaqJGZhXaPsu3KJdk0bBrFWf-OmGp8mLEPRgmJ4GefPHemLIT84UgtXI6JihvNvG5CHEnPPFWC25VyqEvIUmCZjV7UsxSla3bNxPdLkTaF-ohr5Ptt56mXhbZBw0T2d5kpmBOLQ6uwchEHg6mch04XIl9Fg%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

# [Washington Post Dies In Daylight](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=154249467&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MjQ5NDY3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzYzNTIyMDUsImV4cCI6MTczODk0NDIwNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VDUvWRldqt2K-9tXrDm_bBIr3zDbTqOdp-rg-FeTA2k)
### It's hard to trust media owned by billionaires out to appease power, rather than hold power accountable--but here's a strategy to fight the disinformation
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jan 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=154249467&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MjQ5NDY3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNjM1MjIwNSwiZXhwIjoxNzM4OTQ0MjA1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nTXQlaBc2cPUVmo3dQ7K1pj2XSkAekY30nYWPsjhkhg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=154249467&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MjQ5NDY3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzYzNTIyMDUsImV4cCI6MTczODk0NDIwNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VDUvWRldqt2K-9tXrDm_bBIr3zDbTqOdp-rg-FeTA2k&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=154249467&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MjQ5NDY3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzYzNTIyMDUsImV4cCI6MTczODk0NDIwNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VDUvWRldqt2K-9tXrDm_bBIr3zDbTqOdp-rg-FeTA2k)
---
| | [](https://substack..B3EqIhA1LK5F-upUmM6ZBm_I3C2BNxTj48d8i_qJ-fE?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/washington-post-dies-in-daylight?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

In 1786 Thomas Jefferson wrote, "_Our liberty depends on the freedom of the press, and that cannot be limited without being lost_." This week Pulitzer Prize-winning political cartoonist Ann Telnaes resigned from her position at the Washington Post--a role she'd served in since 2008 when George Bush was President--due to a limitation placed on her freedom of press. Telnaes' departure signals the danger our democracy faces due to limited press--caused not just by the threat of government sanction, but also by the fear of billionaire oligarchy. Unsurprisingly, this is a story corporate media is failing to effectively cover, but we must. **Let 's Address This.**
As Legacy media continues to fail to hold the powerful accountable, your support of _Let 's Address This_ remains more critical than ever. **Please become an active member of this community and subscribe.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..NLB-CXXUFUsbA9t73Zo1J9sgqoFyYFhNFrAedWVfu1o?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=154249467)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/86f41b8d-19fb-45d3-b416-272cd2caeff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Pulitzer prize winning journalist Ann Telnaes and the cartoon that Washington Post refused to print. [Image Credit: Ann Telnaes].
Ann Telnaes drew the below powerful political cartoon as a commentary on billionaire capitulation to Donald Trump. And among the billionaires she mocked is Washington Post owner Jeff Bezos. As a result, Washington Post Editorial Page editor David Shipley killed the comic and refused to let Telnaes publish it. Telnaes has since resigned from the Washington Post, and wrote about her decision to leave, stating:
> As an editorial cartoonist, my job is to hold powerful people and institutions accountable. For the first time, my editor prevented me from doing that critical job. So I have decided to leave the _Post_. I doubt my decision will cause much of a stir and that it will be dismissed because I'm just a cartoonist. But I will not stop holding truth to power through my cartooning, because as they say, "Democracy dies in darkness".
> | [](https://substack.com/redirect/315d3c85-70cb-4660-9ce3-7adc142f820d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
> ---|---|---
Telnaes' line about 'Democracy dying in darkness' is an eloquent jab at the Washington Post's tagline--one they're clearly failing to uphold. Undoubtedly, prior to Jeff Bezos purchasing the Washington Post, such a cartoon would have been published without hesitation. Indeed, what could be more journalistic than holding one of the most powerful people in the world accountable for his unjust actions?
The Washington Post's decline over the past year is remarkable. After Bezos blocked a Presidential endorsement, the Post lost more than 10% of its paying subscribers. Now, as Bezos blocks a political cartoon critical of him, the Post loses a Pulitzer prize winning journalist. And adding to the tragedy is that Washington Post is reportedly set to lay off dozens of journalists in the coming weeks, according to a report by _Status_ journalist Oliver Darcey. Despite Bezos' hundreds of billions of dollars, the Washington Post is making budget cuts to staff.
## How Do We Know Which Media To Trust?
Upton Sinclair once wrote, "_It is difficult to get a man to understand something when his salary depends on his not understanding it_." This begs the question--how do we trust media when the billionaires funding them have their own agenda that aligns with the powerful, not the people? I am resolute that my writing focus not only on calling out injustice, but also on providing practical solutions to counter those injustices.
When I write, I rely on tools and resources designed to verify and cross-check the sources I cite, so when you read a fact cited in one of my articles, it is backed by verifiable data. How do I make that determination?
One of the most valuable tools I use is [Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/baeb0ddb-10c8-460a-973c-02948051c383?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Ground News is an app and a website that helps me provide the trustworthy analysis every person deserves. In addition to gathering related articles globally in one place, revealing source bias and factuality, they cut through partisanship and sensationalism to focus on the facts--**Ground News reports on who funds a media outlet**.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f8b21dd5-f4ef-4db7-b3e1-e2840fa59fec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So even if you didn't know why Washington Post killed a comic mocking Jeff Bezos, with a click Ground News would divulge that Bezos owns the Post. Thus, before reading the Washington Post's analysis of billionaires, you'd know they're funded by a billionaire with the goal to protect himself from scrutiny. In short, Ground News gives you the tools to help you form your own opinions and decisions.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a3ad2293-f47c-48f5-93d5-1abc4ae715d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's also worth mentioning that Ground News itself is subscriber supported, not billionaire funded. So by subscribing, you directly support my newsletter and you contribute to keeping the media transparent. And right now if you subscribe to Ground News at the below link, you'll conveniently get 40% off their Vantage Plan, the same one I use.
[Subscribe to Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/baeb0ddb-10c8-460a-973c-02948051c383?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### Conclusion
The harsh and sad truth is that what we're seeing out of the Washington Post will continue to happen. Billionaires will keep buying media outlets, skew reliability and accuracy, and cloud transparency. But we are not helpless and I refuse to accept any scenario where we give up hope. Instead, my goal is for us to take control of what's happening in our country and world, and that starts by ensuring we have accurate information. Your investment in independent media and in tools like [Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/baeb0ddb-10c8-460a-973c-02948051c383?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) help us all become better empowered to understand the world around us.

name: The Democrats
subject: $5 (not a typo!)
body:
We get it. You might be thinking, “How much can $5 really do?”
---
Derek, we have an important request: Can you pitch in $5 to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight back against the MAGA agenda? No, that’s not a typo! **_Just $5._** We get it. You might be thinking, “How much can $5 _really_ do?” when Trump and his Republican-controlled Congress have billionaires behind them. **But it’s not just your $5.** It’s $5 from a single mom in Minnesota, $5 from a nurse in South Carolina, $5 from a small business owner in Nevada — millions of $5 donations coming together to power our grassroots movement. So Derek, we’re asking you to join your fellow Democrats in this fight. Because when we all pitch in, we can take on Project 2025, protect Social Security and Medicare, and defend our democracy by ensuring we hold Trump and his administration accountable. [**Will you give $5 (or more!) to ensure we win local and statewide races this year, take back Congress in the next election, and the White House in 2028? This work is more important now than ever.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?amount=5&refcode=em_20250108_2500_fr&refcode2=2515_22930333_JxSwkF&akid=2515%2E22930333%2EJxSwkF) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_20250108_2500_fr&refcode2=2515_22930333_JxSwkF&akid=2515%2E22930333%2EJxSwkF)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?refcode=em_20250108_2500_fr&refcode2=2515_22930333_JxSwkF&akid=2515%2E22930333%2EJxSwkF)**
---
****
Every dollar counts, and we can’t fight back without you.
Thank you for your support,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010825_1&amount=25]

subject: Even in Sanctuary States Illegal Immigrants Commit Fraud to Get a Driver’s License
body:
As if it were not bad enough that over a dozen states grant illegal
immigrants driver’s licenses, a criminal ring has for years
exploited the security vulnerabilities of the leftist policies to
obtain licenses for undocumented migrants who live in jurisdictions
that do not offer the benefit.

As if it were not bad enough that over a dozen states grant illegal
immigrants driver’s licenses, a criminal ring has for years
exploited the security vulnerabilities of the leftist policies to
obtain licenses for undocumented migrants who live in jurisdictions
that do not offer the benefit. For about $1,400, illegal aliens living
in states that prohibit them from obtaining the cards, fraudulently
secured them in New York and Massachusetts—both sanctuary
states—with the help of five individuals.

body:
They Knew. They Hid It. We Exposed It.
| | | | |

| MassGOP EXPOSES Healey's Migrant Shelter Atrocities
---
---
| Massachusetts deserves better than this.
In August 2024, the MassGOP filed Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests to uncover the truth about what's happening in taxpayer-funded migrant shelters. After months of stonewalling, the Healey-Driscoll Administration was finally forced to respond, and the findings are nothing short of horrifying.
Thanks to our hard work, the truth is now out:
* Violence
* Sexual assault
* Drug overdoses and trafficking
* Human trafficking
* Fatalities

This is what the Healey-Driscoll Administration and the Democratic supermajority have been funding with your tax dollars - and hiding from you.
Last night, Chair Amy Carnevale joined [Howie Carr](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l96z4FCtnthWAw9HrmLCmCC24kMFJupWhhKuU7yvtpPzuDJJjSBvvwm3nTsOermdn7oVEVSDwV-bwhZI-cDPRELFoCvc1q-w-vohcD1lvsT3y0ZPRcffShFfIufMVwDrU87kLO9NEImT7ARtdnhVi9H-jgRXjW0hUiJkEAn1JZuH0FHpqD5JKrZ_WTVAiHkzdqB2mSzh-tvCD3cdl-FfEPVn65dbx4AJ8O8BCCkTo-5Gscd_4Q86FS4KRIH575dcZHrP2yjdAIdSzozt2eZUsJPvqmii2RE3z5Q2LvITPKE=&c=Db6GiLem0gOCPqNiE2rnHFd41OXPioiLX6FeN312b1m4ulIZJYDJXg==&ch=F8deWBOIyndxVeGeNhmRvEdNrZzi9NdIhMLjxYZzI0lmZClfSjq0PA==) to reveal the shocking details, and both the [Boston Globe](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l96z4FCtnthWAw9HrmLCmCC24kMFJupWhhKuU7yvtpPzuDJJjSBvvwm3nTsOermdWk3nS2RtdxT4gpA3SUmkxvYFzmAyGgXNKdEQRecTh2nzpj_1CEG4EyWeKqBAUmH9MTNKydLuk-r8OIQLGxNJJsdmi1hNQOu9uc84ASEXMNf6Nc8nwRYV6p4xHBG7gTcX60Jwxxv5ebh4a0nL1qac5eqIDgGdTXgNlgsXyAMxSUWCmI0jXqcz9EGnoCrq30OjuPgPBRALrac=&c=Db6GiLem0gOCPqNiE2rnHFd41OXPioiLX6FeN312b1m4ulIZJYDJXg==&ch=F8deWBOIyndxVeGeNhmRvEdNrZzi9NdIhMLjxYZzI0lmZClfSjq0PA==) and the [Boston Herald](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l96z4FCtnthWAw9HrmLCmCC24kMFJupWhhKuU7yvtpPzuDJJjSBvvwm3nTsOermdAvJhnDSc71R3248GTM23A6ZDLRi2XaJ_PiiDZrne8e6jkaPO8By44mKAoDic2W8114HTM_sBlkE13ybdL4O-5wo9wie9gOrvh7MoRY2d9Im-IUxmyCeo8730zW5jVKVCYdft1YCOpmZa4bb4sC5yXqRAKTk9mNOcBDie1UF2qFvASJ_yWnMRKVaQ1G0c_HJHjoFjBRUah_M9nN9wsleBUA03t5-S-sNqU30sFrXEl5FdslXIiR4tnS92Ro-spKCEf-QVpPq-F00=&c=Db6GiLem0gOCPqNiE2rnHFd41OXPioiLX6FeN312b1m4ulIZJYDJXg==&ch=F8deWBOIyndxVeGeNhmRvEdNrZzi9NdIhMLjxYZzI0lmZClfSjq0PA==) released scathing articles about the public safety crisis these shelters represent.
Team MassGOP broke this story, and now the entire state is waking up to the truth. You deserve to see it for yourself. Attached are the documents from our FOIA request that detail these atrocities.
This is why we fight. This is why we stand up for transparency, accountability, and safety. The Healey-Driscoll Administration failed you - we won't.
[Read the Full FOIA Documents Here.](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l96z4FCtnthWAw9HrmLCmCC24kMFJupWhhKuU7yvtpPzuDJJjSBvvwm3nTsOermd6owbnp7oMISN19lGeFLKyUhz6ZVTDH63SdXpCj5itwHs9KJUvSXkgX-19r2VteF47Y7tgcFAgfLKqbqtbpssaz7zkljcSqfYGUIkNrXlvsv6PjbdEXwZk1j7T7hj7wSl6GWLNredPXREstm3e492x9Kgt9CzKoElWzN5tR45NxRaeHxGCu1dQw==&c=Db6GiLem0gOCPqNiE2rnHFd41OXPioiLX6FeN312b1m4ulIZJYDJXg==&ch=F8deWBOIyndxVeGeNhmRvEdNrZzi9NdIhMLjxYZzI0lmZClfSjq0PA==)

He’s a champion for reproductive freedom, environmental protection, and common-sense gun control – the kind of person Democrats need to rally behind. And you definitely know her, Peter: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4eb9455d-f288-444c-b3ad-8e1892bc7bf6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Marjorie Taylor Greene may also be from Georgia, but she couldn’t be more different than Jon Ossoff. She PRAISES anti-abortion protesters, DENIES decades of climate science, and HATES attempts to regulate guns. Despite all their differences, Jon Ossoff and Marjorie Taylor Greene do have one BIG thing in common: they’re both up for reelection in 2026.

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. subject: It's time to REORGANIZE!
body:
REGISTER BEFORE JANUARY 15, 2025 | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1432aefafd5b/reorg-5850352?e=9dd54a4530)
---
| | |
** [](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=4ba237e85e&e=9dd54a4530) **
# ** ****Preregister for your County
GOP Officer Elections!**
Every two years, each county
Republican Party holds officer elections.

In order to be eligible to vote for these officers,
_you must have voted in three out of the last four_
_statewide Republican primaries_. **Preregistering**
allows staff to confirm your eligibility ahead of time,
**letting you skip the long lines** and giving you the
chance to obtain and submit supporting
documents should they be necessary.

**PREREGISTER TODAY for easy check-in!** ** [](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=686cfbeb5e&e=9dd54a4530)**

MAGA Republicans want to replace JD Vance and Marco Rubio with more Trump loyalists -- so it's up to us to take these seats back and put a check on Trump's power. We need EVERY Democrat in this fight. **We're still behind on our must-hit $50,000 fundraising goal to get to work, so we have to ask:**

**[Will you join Democrats across the nation and chip in $5 to help Democrats stop Trump, win in states like Ohio and Florida, and flip the Senate blue?>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20854?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250108-SpecialElectionsUpdate-TwoSpecialElectionsOurChanceFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250108-SpecialElectionsUpdate-TwoSpecialElectionsOurChanceFR-Pros-sl1&akid=19289%2E9716520%2EV4F87_)**

_" If something of importance is known in Texas, Matt knows it. With a decline in the number of credible news organizations, the Must Read Texas morning email is indispensable for anyone that wants to continue to be informed." - Former U.S. Senator **Phil Gramm** (R-TX)_
* * *
**AUSTIN NEWSLETTER LAUNCHED**
Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to [ATX Pulse](https://substack.com/redirect/06298e55-561b-4da2-8bca-bd6b9bfe855e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/05ff652c-a4a6-4dfa-835e-9630d211fdf3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Subscriptions are $5/mo, $50/yr or $199/lifetime here:_ [ATXpulsepremium.com](https://substack.com/redirect/dfe2453b-ef48-4465-b439-b40f1d1ea488?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**» Read this morning's (free) edition **[here](https://substack.com/redirect/6bfb21a6-057b-48d2-ba44-54fded8263c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
>> SUBSCRIBE HERE: [ATXpulsepremium.com](https://substack.com/redirect/06298e55-561b-4da2-8bca-bd6b9bfe855e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime)
* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

"**Dallas weather: Winter storm warning issued Wednesday for snow, ice,** " Dallas Morning News' **Alex Nguyen** and**Lana Ferguson** -- "[North Texas is bracing for a wintry mix ](https://substack.com/redirect/cdf7a7e2-e098-41eb-a3c0-a2dbab59003b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)of snow and rain that is expected to begin overnight Wednesday as the National Weather Service upgraded several North Texas counties, including Dallas, from a winter storm watch to a warning.

Dallas, Tarrant, Collin, Denton, Rockwall, Hunt are now under a winter storm warning. Ellis and Kaufman counties remain under a winter storm watch.

The weather service predicted the Dallas-Fort Worth region and the Interstate 20 corridor could soon see 2 to 4 inches of snow and sleet as well as up to a tenth of an inch of ice. The accumulation total changed slightly from a prediction on Tuesday that [forecast 3 to 6 inches of snowfall in the area](https://substack.com/redirect/fc76bc76-e85a-499b-b932-82b23fdbb2c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

Forecasters also said the precipitation is likely to begin late Wednesday night, but the peak is forecast to happen Thursday before ending midday Friday.

Slick roads and ice on bridges and overpasses are expected during this period.

Communities further north along the Red River could see more travel challenges, as it could face between [2 to 5 inches of snow](https://substack.com/redirect/f4e8104c-24c1-4e5f-8ccc-54a2da9c7e37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Thursday, according to the weather service. Some isolated areas of North Texas could have an excess of 8 inches of wintry mix accumulate.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/281d7627-5d53-48f9-a521-638ff137d0ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
North Texas' winter weather is occurring as an Arctic blast is also forecast to continue [blanketing other parks of the country later this week](https://substack.com/redirect/182bb8cf-67c7-4eaf-8fd2-7b2ad5ca0ca6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), including an area stretching from the central Plains through the Ohio Valley into the mid-Atlantic region.

Oncor [said in a Tuesday](https://substack.com/redirect/66f37a0a-0a3d-4fa1-9165-46575289ad81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) announcement the possible ice accumulation could weigh down tree branches or equipment and disrupt power lines, though it's difficult to predict local outages.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/281d7627-5d53-48f9-a521-638ff137d0ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Utility officials said in the announcement that there could also be repeated problems since the ice and snow could melt and refreeze as temperatures fluctuate. At the same time, slick roads could make it more difficult for Oncor utility crews to travel to areas in need.

ERCOT has [issued a weather watch](https://substack.com/redirect/b86b1098-2652-4037-9571-54efdf570637?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) until Friday, but officials said they expect grid conditions to be normal during this period." ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Dallas weather: Winter storm warning issued Wednesday for snow, ice, " Dallas Morning News' Alex Nguyen andLana Ferguson -- " snow and rain that is expected to begin overnight Wednesday as the National Weather Service upgraded several North Texas counties, including Dallas, from a winter storm watch to a warning. Dallas, Tarrant, Collin, Denton, Rockwall, Hunt are now under a winter storm warning. Ellis and Kaufman counties remain under a winter storm watch. The weather service predicted the Dallas-Fort Worth region and the Interstate 20 corridor could soon see 2 to 4 inches of snow and sleet as well as up to a tenth of an inch of ice. The accumulation total changed slightly from a prediction on Tuesday that . Forecasters also said the precipitation is likely to begin late Wednesday night, but the peak is forecast to happen Thursday before ending midday Friday. Slick roads and ice on bridges and overpasses are expected during this period. Communities further north along the Red River could see more travel challenges, as it could face between Thursday, according to the weather service. Some isolated areas of North Texas could have an excess of 8 inches of wintry mix accumulate. North Texas' winter weather is occurring as an Arctic blast is also forecast to continue , including an area stretching from the central Plains through the Ohio Valley into the mid-Atlantic region. Oncor announcement the possible ice accumulation could weigh down tree branches or equipment and disrupt power lines, though it's difficult to predict local outages. Utility officials said in the announcement that there could also be repeated problems since the ice and snow could melt and refreeze as temperatures fluctuate. At the same time, slick roads could make it more difficult for Oncor utility crews to travel to areas in need. ERCOT has until Friday, but officials said they expect grid conditions to be normal during this period." * **TOP NEWS**

"**Dallas weather: Winter storm warning issued Wednesday for snow, ice,** " Dallas Morning News' **Alex Nguyen** and**Lana Ferguson** -- "[North Texas is bracing for a wintry mix ](https://substack.com/redirect/096af9ed-d46d-47d4-b2cb-31efc98c1030?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)of snow and rain that is expected to begin overnight Wednesday as the National Weather Service upgraded several North Texas counties, including Dallas, from a winter storm watch to a warning.

Dallas, Tarrant, Collin, Denton, Rockwall, Hunt are now under a winter storm warning. Ellis and Kaufman counties remain under a winter storm watch.

The weather service predicted the Dallas-Fort Worth region and the Interstate 20 corridor could soon see 2 to 4 inches of snow and sleet as well as up to a tenth of an inch of ice. The accumulation total changed slightly from a prediction on Tuesday that [forecast 3 to 6 inches of snowfall in the area](https://substack.com/redirect/936cebbe-b53f-4371-a8ff-ad5743304978?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

Forecasters also said the precipitation is likely to begin late Wednesday night, but the peak is forecast to happen Thursday before ending midday Friday.

Slick roads and ice on bridges and overpasses are expected during this period.

Communities further north along the Red River could see more travel challenges, as it could face between [2 to 5 inches of snow](https://substack.com/redirect/659e64e2-d1d3-4837-964d-e24c1e22e41a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Thursday, according to the weather service. Some isolated areas of North Texas could have an excess of 8 inches of wintry mix accumulate.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/12932e74-9f16-4538-ab99-6360a9251d02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
North Texas' winter weather is occurring as an Arctic blast is also forecast to continue [blanketing other parks of the country later this week](https://substack.com/redirect/1329d90b-8daf-4af1-9295-e03da9889480?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), including an area stretching from the central Plains through the Ohio Valley into the mid-Atlantic region.

Oncor [said in a Tuesday](https://substack.com/redirect/c8187825-a178-402e-8049-4ffab6593c7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) announcement the possible ice accumulation could weigh down tree branches or equipment and disrupt power lines, though it's difficult to predict local outages.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/12932e74-9f16-4538-ab99-6360a9251d02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Utility officials said in the announcement that there could also be repeated problems since the ice and snow could melt and refreeze as temperatures fluctuate. At the same time, slick roads could make it more difficult for Oncor utility crews to travel to areas in need.

ERCOT has [issued a weather watch](https://substack.com/redirect/87bb9f2b-fd5e-48ee-bb82-cd97c400dfac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) until Friday, but officials said they expect grid conditions to be normal during this period." ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Dallas weather: Winter storm warning issued Wednesday for snow, ice, " Dallas Morning News' Alex Nguyen andLana Ferguson -- " snow and rain that is expected to begin overnight Wednesday as the National Weather Service upgraded several North Texas counties, including Dallas, from a winter storm watch to a warning. Dallas, Tarrant, Collin, Denton, Rockwall, Hunt are now under a winter storm warning. Ellis and Kaufman counties remain under a winter storm watch. The weather service predicted the Dallas-Fort Worth region and the Interstate 20 corridor could soon see 2 to 4 inches of snow and sleet as well as up to a tenth of an inch of ice. The accumulation total changed slightly from a prediction on Tuesday that . Forecasters also said the precipitation is likely to begin late Wednesday night, but the peak is forecast to happen Thursday before ending midday Friday. Slick roads and ice on bridges and overpasses are expected during this period. Communities further north along the Red River could see more travel challenges, as it could face between Thursday, according to the weather service. Some isolated areas of North Texas could have an excess of 8 inches of wintry mix accumulate. North Texas' winter weather is occurring as an Arctic blast is also forecast to continue , including an area stretching from the central Plains through the Ohio Valley into the mid-Atlantic region. Oncor announcement the possible ice accumulation could weigh down tree branches or equipment and disrupt power lines, though it's difficult to predict local outages. Utility officials said in the announcement that there could also be repeated problems since the ice and snow could melt and refreeze as temperatures fluctuate. At the same time, slick roads could make it more difficult for Oncor utility crews to travel to areas in need. ERCOT has until Friday, but officials said they expect grid conditions to be normal during this period." Dallas, Tarrant, Collin, Denton, Rockwall, Hunt are now under a winter storm warning. Ellis and Kaufman counties remain under a winter storm watch.

The weather service predicted the Dallas-Fort Worth region and the Interstate 20 corridor could soon see 2 to 4 inches of snow and sleet as well as up to a tenth of an inch of ice. By building your perfect dreamy soundscape and watch your sleep and your mornings improve in just 7 days! | TOP NEWS “Dallas weather: Winter storm warning issued Wednesday for snow, ice, ” Dallas Morning News' Alex Nguyen andLana Ferguson — “ snow and rain that is expected to begin overnight Wednesday as the National Weather Service upgraded several North Texas counties, including Dallas, from a winter storm watch to a warning. Dallas, Tarrant, Collin, Denton, Rockwall, Hunt are now under a winter storm warning. Ellis and Kaufman counties remain under a winter storm watch. The weather service predicted the Dallas-Fort Worth region and the Interstate 20 corridor could soon see 2 to 4 inches of snow and sleet as well as up to a tenth of an inch of ice. The accumulation total changed slightly from a prediction on Tuesday that . Forecasters also said the precipitation is likely to begin late Wednesday night, but the peak is forecast to happen Thursday before ending midday Friday. Slick roads and ice on bridges and overpasses are expected during this period. Communities further north along the Red River could see more travel challenges, as it could face between Thursday, according to the weather service. Some isolated areas of North Texas could have an excess of 8 inches of wintry mix accumulate. » North Texas’ winter weather is occurring as an Arctic blast is also forecast to continue , including an area stretching from the central Plains through the Ohio Valley into the mid-Atlantic region. Oncor announcement the possible ice accumulation could weigh down tree branches or equipment and disrupt power lines, though it’s difficult to predict local outages. » Utility officials said in the announcement that there could also be repeated problems since the ice and snow could melt and refreeze as temperatures fluctuate. At the same time, slick roads could make it more difficult for Oncor utility crews to travel to areas in need. ERCOT has until Friday, but officials said they expect grid conditions to be normal during this period."
