body:
please don’t ignore this!
| **🚨 URGENT 🚨
Trump Has Sights Set on Prosecuting Political Rivals — Including Jack Smith ** Friend, despite Jack Smith announcing he’s stepping down, Donald Trump is STILL out for revenge. **He’s not only plotting to DESTROY all evidence against him, but PROSECUTE Jack Smith!** [**We need 99 more Democrats in your area to sign our letter thanking Jack Smith for his work and standing with him against these vile attacks! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85921?t=6&akid=18396%2E878179%2E-YbWu9) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85921?t=7&akid=18396%2E878179%2E-YbWu9)
---
To: Special Counsel Jack Smith
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I stand with you. **Dear Special Counsel Jack Smith,**

**_I am FURIOUS that Trump is seeking to prosecute you!_**

Trump is running scared because he KNOWS you’re about to drop hundreds of pages of evidence detailing his treasonous crimes.

He’s even promising to be a _“dictator on day one,”_ hell-bent on avenging anyone who has held him accountable.

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your amazing work over the years to bring Donald Trump to justice! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85921?t=8&akid=18396%2E878179%2E-YbWu9) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85921?t=9&akid=18396%2E878179%2E-YbWu9)
---
__X A grateful Democrat__
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18396%2E878179%2E-YbWu9). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18396%2E878179%2E-YbWu9).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18396%2E878179%2E-YbWu9) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=18396%2E878179%2E-YbWu9). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18396%2E878179%2E-YbWu9)

name: Carolina, United We Dream
subject: 🗣️Let’s talk about healthcare access & legal protections for DACA recipients!
body:
Get DACA resources to help you prepare for the future! | | | Hey Peter, how are you preparing for the year ahead? Whether it’s working on a vision board or setting New Year’s resolutions, right now, many of us are thinking about our future and how it will impact us and our loved ones. This year, with Trump returning to the White House and a pending decision on the future of DACA, we’ll need to prepare as best we can by sharing knowledge and resources with one another! **👉** We’re kicking off the new year with a DACA Town Hall tomorrow, Thursday, January 9, at 6 pm ET/ 5 pm CT to bring you updated guidance on DACA renewals, potential alternate immigration pathways, healthcare options, and more! **[RSVP NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHptsZ0rK7VoxKoX9sZ_abcphJCMpNfJfLADAvaekVhz0XPmn8sknvY7eVE5pA8ntijQRMkbEqgYiiQz_kA-MVKggw_SjwXgqa9OX_VMmrL61uz8d-tNCIaWPqLS9fd0VUVzTpBWAwMcgdHgaYGxue9zsuoHOneF9sfn4P69n_rCHSALvSP70mP14PPqZg87PieZCCUwaAJYPkXvyACFFrZn-pktfqk2OUmdlh3OOpjRNn8bT-GGGIBlNStjCzxIl_OadSL72omIyi7SupO6lXr3A/4cz/MhWMKgotShWg7jNj3xW4Aw/h0/h001.c3rG83cRdeCNzt0rGWr0rBt30Hx8L4PvOjGjZeGP_kA)** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHptsZ0rK7VoxKoX9sZ_abcphJCMpNfJfLADAvaekVhz0Wdkh0Rzw9m7wagelLsB6oS36qv72Bwz2Iap4bL4DDw6CnNJT4qduDd9aXYv52fT4SMis8OSlC1sWAyt0MMFfiSe7ExtK3qVRfaiFIexvd8_i4P3H0MKBUoX6AY3UQy10IrueYpZnue_msgQeMIh046I5J7qlRR5SVU34tur72myny8Ov2cepkbUgBScn17bwEPotaGH_NmDo_1o2SIRs_o8oJmdIt_hAmXnbt6swLaKw/4cz/MhWMKgotShWg7jNj3xW4Aw/h1/h001.M63z_tUUUtWyzoev7kMds9P0AfJ0awBhaJkADZaqfS0)****
** **Join our “DACA Town Hall: Healthcare and Legal Protections” to learn more about:**
* **Guidance on DACA Renewals:** Learn when to renew and practical tips to follow when submitting your application.
* **Potential Alternate Immigration Pathways & Legal Protections: **Let’s talk about employment-based visas and alternate pathways to protections.
* **Access to Healthcare:** We’ll share an overview of healthcare access considerations for DACA recipients and our undocumented loved ones.

🧡 We’ll also share other key resources to help you navigate this year — like mental health support and financial assistance options to renew your DACA. Whether you’re a DACA recipient, an undocumented person, or looking for ways to support a loved one, you’re invited to join us at our DACA Town Hall tomorrow at 6 pm ET/ 5 pm CT. **[Sign up today to secure your spot!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHptsZ0rK7VoxKoX9sZ_abcphJCMpNfJfLADAvaekVhz0Vi2MPi9NSk94mcIurHq7fz8mgo7XAhtxHHj4TdozPfnECsNPs3fKXwI72fokJhDjkaL22Rd6pWhQR8GBjuwDNZ6pnCMkvW3mKSZDEusEtIEycOa9-PiSYg8O8WN5yS5rcE22NSwQGBdXvJMLYPlz3p3292zpSb14QpLYZm5cg8M-D6jOEL_YUuJjE7dFAJQJrebYoKEseaNl5LArXc_xHLD24gcz4NJeE2S07BPQuFKA/4cz/MhWMKgotShWg7jNj3xW4Aw/h2/h001.lbUoKf-DeQjKe58BZbvabejkIjc6lltwnt51ujpPicQ) ** 👋 See you there, Carolina and the United We Dream team

Folks, We wanted to take a quick moment to share the top 3 issues respondents said they’d most like Lisa Blunt Rochester to address as she begins her first session representing Delaware in the U.S. Senate:
* Protecting our democratic institutions

* Ensuring that your Social Security benefits won't get cut

* Having access to affordable healthcare

Our team and Lisa have gone through every response we’ve received and listened to your powerful stories about why these issues are a top concern for you and your loved ones. We appreciate all the important feedback we’ve gotten over the last few days; it’ll help Lisa make decisions as a Senator and better serve her constituents and all Americans. Once again, thank you to everyone who completed our survey – and thank you for supporting Lisa Blunt Rochester. We’re lucky to have you with us. \- Team LBR

Peter, I was officially sworn in as the Democratic Leader.
As House Democrats, we are committed to fighting for you and your family.
[**We need to know that you’re fighting alongside us at this moment for our country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100064115/521641360/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250108_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGM3YzVmNi1lNmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LrexTsY0h7wA8YLYYCxlJYdUZ7Ml8Zkpumd72p3zrDI=)

body:
| | | If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9v_zDMKsOhIsGaYsSQAIlT46RJ1cLFi0RbsWsZWZVQtXmgyDsn337uID04JUXAsI6orsUbi_w-ZL2hmMGJwRhHHsxcBLUZCVVW8AwvNSZjpISjXW1CPPkZa_Bg-tYS3qi7GulLKEZlLl41NcUSQIWMcmP5O3mKaQ21KF-jUtrAoG8sa_BpaUSXgrYKEdpUmPQYKGJ-AcrTlRImkXEV-n06b72p_E1AfOxKk4yO_gtnguSAMxeFbRd4-sDnBnByp116Rhux_ofEuEyv-ldxkYekBuPn3uOlPxFFh_8rCP1VdaXaa8wBmIUJwIIiG2dht5nsKY_YX0rOr5yvz7ZdPSMK-9hVZmFEhDGH_vAPF0nVSHDEAnCr3LeP1BCfOW21n-r/4cz/_FjGWoBbToe3u4Q601yd6A/h0/h001.I8xF3FT7isd9uNueI_FCl53XyevrMaLOvQ1FmZ7bRHI) | |

As a pediatrician and mom I have no choice but to find reasons for optimism. Renee and my recent run-in with David Hogg on a beautiful day in Charleston gave me an unexpected source of hope for the future. [
](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv0g5VKKIBYD7T3qtbVECFezhXhZYOfoggfNukbb0WKIgp0Vl0aKlC1fOCqwANxHJS8aAOP6m13s4NZHBKU4y-cA1d2-2kGAzWB_R9QyprTO4x4Ck9brzHyIU0Pbl5Qg3FlL-_vnkioa50fZeDDbENg_LpwzHrKz-1LkTj7WW7-fQVOSPq0-zJqImKA70-nc1LQgV6n9kdyu1z0K9tb1qrw-fM56P9ekryQX7xmx_gAVHn3PB5MDQja_u5fmg4bP5RY4XAZFcUT3EmUX34tW5KqSVFrYoxDWBBLazcmdWBGjGKMStwk4ToGjnBild5QuNdz_B8EmMxmFVcxMnsvDc6h/4cz/_FjGWoBbToe3u4Q601yd6A/h1/h001.UIyTYv9pKHkunqch6xgeVh5BJi8DeWi335Y5BlITFTo) Young leaders like David are daring to take bold action. The new generation of leaders doesn’t wait for change to happen — they make it happen. We’re so proud to support these leaders here at Their Future as they fight to make their voices heard.

But they can't do this alone, we must invest in our new generations of leaders and give them empowerment as they create change in our communities. **[Can you make a donation today to help Their Future uplift this new generation of leaders?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv0g5VKKIBYD7T3qtbVECFezhXhZYOfoggfNukbb0WKIgp0Vl0aKlC1fOCqwANxHJS8aAOP6m13s4NZHBKU4y-cA1d2-2kGAzWB_R9QyprTO4x4Ck9brzHyIU0Pbl5Qg3GcnL8vmcD2uzWT8qeAG2jjByRuvFwBwqRlbEe-eb7T5iTJAb-oTExF2CmXWLXX3tfrC0DsHc_M4eAM2dgnhddrQ20FD1reQm6Vx9A8wOiSevZlzeIQvYVoij152JqilhbKXGHksHeO0a7_ZB9TqukNb655SJouM5Fqw9IvG2e-KLDGiWD45ZBFRNGD9PmiJFyhymbN-6lJyUBcqp39nANn/4cz/_FjGWoBbToe3u4Q601yd6A/h2/h001.VKyBsVYuJhlmETtfla76tGq-gw7lrdqh5Javg66pty4)** Until the kids are alright,

Annie Andrews

Under President Biden:

🚨 63 Black federal judges were confirmed — _the most in U.S. history._
🚨 40 Black women were appointed to lifetime federal judgeships — shattering _every_ previous record.

Overall — 60% of Biden’s 235 appointees are people of color.

This isn’t just historic. It’s transformative.

Representation matters. Expanding Black political power in every branch of government matters. And The Collective PAC is fighting every day to make it happen.

We need to build on this progress and expand Black political power nationwide. But we can’t do it alone.

[**Chip in $10 or more today to help us keep breaking barriers and empowering Black leaders who will continue to make history:**](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqs-99CoksmbxgeVZko3i52ddfPMw3ZFsNRU7GwSAIQeMN45pc57N0KGdXF-tOBBS9J7EjcHMaCMrzxtdEvFLWdKO2mK2taD_8Espx7ZCfZpTmg74Y4P1vuqoguLkm-eFqI0A04GudWlHDZGj9a_ha30wS_Fdxymrf14twJgCSYeJ0wsK0WQLiheCd5uCiXi3gd7B4m_-SYvd2_NfO9NJW3KQUvK0zATi9w5vXm7LoKrtPEMInomx-5si56g-aEwnCbY-OCfN2m6GyUTKv4rAQQZvDdXoi6m-ndVy4pPUpJgGfd00Euy26bLo55iSpSn-hhDnDCjJfrc_gclJ7vKYAEaf6UVc4DgUecAZ5E_R0eaa_2OQ-cyfiqS3I7zo0yrgzE/4cz/SiMmQWmYQ5CPPB_Th2eJuw/h2/h001.rkadiREThb_EQ7W1w4JPc5QmTqI_Xk9zV0GnsEoUTTE)** **[** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately to The Collective PAC.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | Peter, let’s talk numbers. Under President Biden: 🚨 63 Black federal judges were confirmed — the most in U.S. history. 🚨 40 Black women were appointed to lifetime federal judgeships — shattering every previous record. Overall — 60% of Biden’s 235 appointees are people of color. This isn’t just historic. It’s transformative. Representation matters. Expanding Black political power in every branch of government matters. And The Collective PAC is fighting every day to make it happen. We need to build on this progress and expand Black political power nationwide. But we can’t do it alone. | | | | | ]() Together, we’ll keep breaking records — and barriers. — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. name: COURIER
subject: The Trump/Bezos cartoon WaPo doesn’t want you to see
body:
As America’s influential 1% rush to kiss the ring, Americans are losing access to critical journalism

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100064514/521642711/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk3OTliMzgtZThjZC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dygfg36HFr7hjg878M_o1PNAFxFU1vfCqeSXmILf3RY=&emci=6e799b38-e8cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=79799b38-e8cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Months after pulling its endorsement of Kamala Harris in the closest election of our lifetime, _The Washington Post_ has done it again—bowing to Trump by refusing to publish a critical cartoon of billionaires currying his favor.
**The cartoon depicts Jeff Bezos, Mark Zuckerberg, and other powerful figures kneeling before a statue of Donald Trump:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100064515/521642712/-593472309?refcode=20250108-EM-BezosCartoon&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk3OTliMzgtZThjZC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dygfg36HFr7hjg878M_o1PNAFxFU1vfCqeSXmILf3RY=)
_Ann Telnaes says a rough version of this cartoon was rejected by her editor at the Washington Post._
Critics, including the Association of American Editorial Cartoonists, are calling it “craven censorship” and “political cowardice.”
They’re right. Trump’s threats to jail reporters, revoke media licenses, and punish unfavorable coverage are creating a climate of fear that is reshaping our media landscape in real time.
**[We’ll unpack more in a moment, but if you’re ready to help build a fearless, progressive media network that isn’t afraid to take on Donald Trump, can you chip in $25 to support COURIER now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100064516/521642713/-593472309?refcode=20250108-EM-BezosCartoon&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk3OTliMzgtZThjZC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dygfg36HFr7hjg878M_o1PNAFxFU1vfCqeSXmILf3RY=)**
The cartoon’s censorship is just the latest in a series of public capitulations to Trump. After the election, _The Post_ ’s owner, Jeff Bezos, dined with Trump at Mar-a-Lago. Mark Zuckerberg pledged $1 million to Trump’s inaugural fund. ABC News quietly settled a $15 million defamation suit brought by Trump without a fight.
**These aren’t just business decisions—they’re acts of self-preservation, driven by fear of retaliation. And collectively, they represent the normalization of authoritarianism.**
COURIER was founded to challenge the failures of legacy media. We deliver fact-based reporting where people actually get their news: on social media feeds, in email inboxes, and in local communities.
**Unlike corporate media, we’re not beholden to advertisers or profits. Grassroots supporters like you fund our work, enabling us to cover the stories that matter most—without fear of censorship or retribution.**
[**With Trump preparing to take office, our work has never been more critical. Can we count on your support to help COURIER fight back against authoritarianism and protect democracy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100064517/521642714/-593472309?refcode=20250108-EM-BezosCartoon&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk3OTliMzgtZThjZC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dygfg36HFr7hjg878M_o1PNAFxFU1vfCqeSXmILf3RY=)
**[Chip in $25 now➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100064519/521642716/-593472309?refcode=20250108-EM-BezosCartoon&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk3OTliMzgtZThjZC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dygfg36HFr7hjg878M_o1PNAFxFU1vfCqeSXmILf3RY=)**
Thank you for standing with us,
The COURIER Team

clean_body: As America’s influential 1% rush to kiss the ring, Americans are losing access to critical journalism Peter, Months after pulling its endorsement of Kamala Harris in the closest election of our lifetime, The Washington Post has done it again—bowing to Trump by refusing to publish a critical cartoon of billionaires currying his favor. The cartoon depicts Jeff Bezos, Mark Zuckerberg, and other powerful figures kneeling before a statue of Donald Trump: = Ann Telnaes says a rough version of this cartoon was rejected by her editor at the Washington Post. Critics, including the Association of American Editorial Cartoonists, are calling it “craven censorship” and “political cowardice.” They’re right. Trump’s threats to jail reporters, revoke media licenses, and punish unfavorable coverage are creating a climate of fear that is reshaping our media landscape in real time. = The cartoon’s censorship is just the latest in a series of public capitulations to Trump. After the election, The Post ’s owner, Jeff Bezos, dined with Trump at Mar-a-Lago. Mark Zuckerberg pledged $1 million to Trump’s inaugural fund. ABC News quietly settled a $15 million defamation suit brought by Trump without a fight. These aren’t just business decisions—they’re acts of self-preservation, driven by fear of retaliation. And collectively, they represent the normalization of authoritarianism. COURIER was founded to challenge the failures of legacy media. We deliver fact-based reporting where people actually get their news: on social media feeds, in email inboxes, and in local communities. Unlike corporate media, we’re not beholden to advertisers or profits. Grassroots supporters like you fund our work, enabling us to cover the stories that matter most—without fear of censorship or retribution. = = Thank you for standing with us, The COURIER Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

# [The Harris Campaign proved that we cannot buy a winning candidate](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=154401494&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NDAxNDk0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzYzNTg2MzAsImV4cCI6MTczODk1MDYzMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._bh3iGyTuVmgOlL6TlZ5GA-BCThAVNIDPkSeImStMxs)
### Democrats are tired of being used as ATMs
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)

| Jan 8
---

---

---

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=154401494&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NDAxNDk0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzYzNTg2MzAsImV4cCI6MTczODk1MDYzMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._bh3iGyTuVmgOlL6TlZ5GA-BCThAVNIDPkSeImStMxs&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8c5c9a78-e79e-4eac-a46b-40567df4a98f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Money Map of U.S. Source: Helistockter. Royalty Paid on Shutterstock
Kamala Harris' campaign brought in a record haul of $2.5 billion. That included money that rolled over to her from Joe Biden's impressive fundraising.
And we still did not win that race.
And in NY-21, I showed record numbers of votes (132,447), with really slim fundraising. The Democrat in 2022 raised $2.1 million, but did not get as many raw votes. It was a midterm. It was a different map. Admittedly, the 2022 candidate's percentage margins were higher than mine. I walk through some of these numbers in a [previous article](https://substack.com/redirect/38a11a40-130f-4de4-881c-59423bf132b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
We have thus proven that the candidate who raises the most money is not necessarily the candidate who gets the most votes.
With speculation about a Special Election in NY-21, the Republicans and the Democrats have seen headlines almost every week about possible nominees. There is no primary in NY for a Congressional Special Election. The county chairs in each district review interested candidates and decide amongst themselves whose name will go on the ballot.
### North Country people are very particular about their money
Here is what I know about upstate New York: North Country people are very particular about their money. They work hard for it, and they aren't going to part with it easily. If they give $10 to a cause, they want to be sure to get $10 of value.
This morning, [North Country This Week](https://substack.com/redirect/fff48aa0-cfe0-49b8-82fd-eddfe37b7916?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has an article about a prospective candidate from Lisbon, New York, who -- **without yet being designated the Democratic nominee** -- has "raised" $255,000. Impressive.
Or is it? From what I can tell, he has raised most of that money from PACs -- at least three, if not more of them. [As I wrote earlier this week](https://substack.com/redirect/a6d0c333-0532-42bb-a838-bfb1711bde01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the split with PACs is about 80/20, with a whopping 80% going to the PAC. In one instance, the PAC was based out of state, and was seemingly established to pay the campaign debts of 2023 Senate candidate in Missouri.
That just will not fly with North Country voters.
### Lots of upstate NY voters get uncomfortable with money coming in from out-of-state
More than once when I was on the campaign trail in 2024, voters would ask me how much of my fundraising was coming in from New York. Their concern was that my Republican opponent, Elise Stefanik, raised the overwhelming majority of her money from wealthy out-of-state donors and PACs.
They made it very clear: they did not like the idea of donors from out-of-state funding an election in upstate New York.
The unfortunate reality is that there are not millions of dollars from eager donors floating around in upstate New York. We have no Elon Musk (thank goodness!).
But the fact that the gentleman from Lisbon proudly boasted that he has "contributions coming from all 50 states" said to me that he hasn't really talked to a lot of NY-21 voters. If he had, he would know to tread lightly on that subject. It's actually a deal-breaker for a lot of NY-21 voters.
### Can we talk about the issues, please?
Other than fundraising, it seems that the guy featured in North Country This Week hasn't talked about the issues. The Stefanik campaign was great about blabbing to the press about their fundraising chest. But they did not want to talk about the actual issues. I mean -- they wanted to spout the MAGA lines about the "far left liberal" and the "Biden crime family." They also talked about dangerous migrants coming after our children, and trans people invading girls' bathrooms. But the actual issues -- whether we could maintain a democratic form of government if we elected a party that embraces fascism, how to mitigate climate change, whether we could find a way to lift up the middle class, instead of focusing on tax cuts for the rich, whether we could expand Medicare, and protect Social Security, Medicaid, and Veteran's health care -- that was not something they wanted to talk about.
What puzzles me about the messaging from the candidate featured in North Country This Week is that he hasn't talked about the issues either. If he's waiting to see if he will be the nominee before talking about issues, he should do the same with regard to fundraising.
And my burning question: where was he while the rest of us were out working our tails off in the 2024 campaign?
### Identity politics do not win
Voters in NY-21 want to have someone who is from upstate New York. But they also want to talk about their challenges, struggles, and concerns. They don't necessarily need to hear, repeatedly, what someone's marital status is, how many children they have, and what they do for a living. And now that you've heard that, please donate money. But don't ask where all of that money is going.
No. A candidate's identity does not necessarily equate to a winning platform.
### The map for NY-21 is tough. The numbers are even tougher.
Before we get hit on for money, we need to hear what a prospective candidate's plan is for conquering the NY-21 map. The 15 counties and 15,000 square miles are tough. There are some counties where there are eager volunteer groups who are not necessarily on the Democratic committees. And then there are places where you really are on your own. I know. I have recent memory of all of this from the 2024 election.
The numbers in NY-21 are even tougher. As of November 1, 2024, the New York State Board of Elections shows the following numbers of active voters:
Democrats: 130,502
Republicans: 204,801
Right there you see that there is a formidable hurdle to overcome.
Add to it, that there are 8,942 Conservative Voters who tend to vote Republican, but only 2,057 Working Families Party (WFP) Voters, who tend to vote Democrat.
There are other parties not specifically articulated. Those voters total 23,605.
The "Blank" voters -- who have not expressed any party affiliation, total 122,366.
I have a plan for reaching out to those "blank voters", as well as the moderate Republicans, WFPs, and "Others". Obviously I was moving in the right direction in 2024, since the 132,447 votes I got exceeded the number of active registered Democrats among the 15 counties. Now _**that**_ is impressive!
I haven't heard of any such plan from the other prospective Democratic nominees. And really -- how could they know? They don't have the recent experience running in this district that I have.
### Party unity is crucial
In the event that I am not the Democratic Committee's choice for the nominee for the 2025 Special Election, you will find my call for unity post right here on social media. I will make introductions, and offer any kind of support I can.
I have not heard similar commitments made by other prospective candidates. With a few notable exceptions (Knut Sauer, for example), we have no clue what they did in the 2024 race to support getting a Democrat on the ticket. They certainly were not rolling up their sleeves and working alongside the rest of us. Nor have I heard what their plans are for getting a Democrat elected if they are not chosen as the name on the ballot.
This is team effort. We need all hands on deck.
### Donor fatigue is real
Money matters in a campaign. But it is not the determining factor. And especially right now, Democrats are tired of opening up their wallets.
A writer named [Linda Naylor, quoting Simon Rosenberg](https://substack.com/@lindanaylor1/note/c-84977153?utm_source=notes-share-action&r=3g6fcu), gave me much to think about.
> "...the relationship between Democrats across the country and our big campaigns and party committees must change. The millions of us who gave and volunteered need to be treated like partners in the fight not just donors to the cause. There has to be a more respectful information based relationship between us, where our campaigns and parties start treating us not only like ATMs but also like proud patriots, information warriors and willing amplifiers." Simon Rosenberg
> "A critical shift in the Democratic party mindset. Everyone of us who canvassed, worked and donated can relate." Linda Naylor
What really hit me in that Rosenberg quote was this idea: Democratic voters are not to be used like an ATM.
### Letting you know the next steps
So where does this leave us? To be honest, we are in this weird time in which we are in a not-really-a-primary race. Each prospective candidate is doing their best to try to get the nomination from the party.
For right now, I'm moving forward, not only with my fundraising efforts, but also with clear plans for how to win the race, including storefront headquarters (because it is cold outside!), digital and print advertising, a ground team and a fundraising team. I'm also doing behind-the-scenes relationship building to get support from the state and national parties.
The Democratic County Chairs are meeting and talking amongst themselves. We have had Zoom interviews. There is talk of an eventual in-person interview, to be determined. These will not be interviews that are open to the public or to the press.
The Senate has scheduled Stefanik's confirmation hearing for Thursday, January 16, 2025. Not much chance of her getting pushback. After that, the newly-sworn president will have to sign to confirm her appointment. Stefanik will then have to resign her House seat. The Governor has 10 days to call an election. The parties designate names for the ballot. And we have an election 70-80 days after that.
### My pledge to you
Regardless of who is on the ballot, I am dedicated to seeing that a Democrat gets to Congress to represent NY-21. If I am not in the 2025 race, you will still see me and read my shared perspectives on social media (at least, I hope you will keep reading!).
We have some difficult years ahead of us in the Trump administration. There is much work to be done on behalf of the middle class. I'm in this fight for the long haul. One way or another, we will get through this, and we will get through this together.

_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. Donations are much appreciated. Royalty Paid on Shutterstock Kamala Harris' campaign brought in a record haul of $2.5 billion. That included money that rolled over to her from Joe Biden's impressive fundraising. And we still did not win that race. And in NY-21, I showed record numbers of votes (132,447), with really slim fundraising. The Democrat in 2022 raised $2.1 million, but did not get as many raw votes. It was a midterm. It was a different map. Admittedly, the 2022 candidate's percentage margins were higher than mine. I walk through some of these numbers in a . We have thus proven that the candidate who raises the most money is not necessarily the candidate who gets the most votes. With speculation about a Special Election in NY-21, the Republicans and the Democrats have seen headlines almost every week about possible nominees. There is no primary in NY for a Congressional Special Election. The county chairs in each district review interested candidates and decide amongst themselves whose name will go on the ballot. North Country people are very particular about their money Here is what I know about upstate New York: North Country people are very particular about their money. They work hard for it, and they aren't going to part with it easily. If they give $10 to a cause, they want to be sure to get $10 of value. This morning, has an article about a prospective candidate from Lisbon, New York, who -- without yet being designated the Democratic nominee -- has "raised" $255,000. Impressive. Or is it? From what I can tell, he has raised most of that money from PACs -- at least three, if not more of them. , the split with PACs is about 80/20, with a whopping 80% going to the PAC. In one instance, the PAC was based out of state, and was seemingly established to pay the campaign debts of 2023 Senate candidate in Missouri. That just will not fly with North Country voters. Lots of upstate NY voters get uncomfortable with money coming in from out-of-state More than once when I was on the campaign trail in 2024, voters would ask me how much of my fundraising was coming in from New York. Their concern was that my Republican opponent, Elise Stefanik, raised the overwhelming majority of her money from wealthy out-of-state donors and PACs. They made it very clear: they did not like the idea of donors from out-of-state funding an election in upstate New York. The unfortunate reality is that there are not millions of dollars from eager donors floating around in upstate New York. We have no Elon Musk (thank goodness!). But the fact that the gentleman from Lisbon proudly boasted that he has "contributions coming from all 50 states" said to me that he hasn't really talked to a lot of NY-21 voters. If he had, he would know to tread lightly on that subject. It's actually a deal-breaker for a lot of NY-21 voters. Can we talk about the issues, please? Other than fundraising, it seems that the guy featured in North Country This Week hasn't talked about the issues. The Stefanik campaign was great about blabbing to the press about their fundraising chest. But they did not want to talk about the actual issues. I mean -- they wanted to spout the MAGA lines about the "far left liberal" and the "Biden crime family." They also talked about dangerous migrants coming after our children, and trans people invading girls' bathrooms. But the actual issues -- whether we could maintain a democratic form of government if we elected a party that embraces fascism, how to mitigate climate change, whether we could find a way to lift up the middle class, instead of focusing on tax cuts for the rich, whether we could expand Medicare, and protect Social Security, Medicaid, and Veteran's health care -- that was not something they wanted to talk about. What puzzles me about the messaging from the candidate featured in North Country This Week is that he hasn't talked about the issues either. If he's waiting to see if he will be the nominee before talking about issues, he should do the same with regard to fundraising. And my burning question: where was he while the rest of us were out working our tails off in the 2024 campaign? Identity politics do not win Voters in NY-21 want to have someone who is from upstate New York. But they also want to talk about their challenges, struggles, and concerns. They don't necessarily need to hear, repeatedly, what someone's marital status is, how many children they have, and what they do for a living. And now that you've heard that, please donate money. But don't ask where all of that money is going. No. A candidate's identity does not necessarily equate to a winning platform. The map for NY-21 is tough. The numbers are even tougher. 2025 will be a HUGE year, Peter! After a great landslide election for Republicans at every level, we have the opportunity to fight for more conservative policies that will continue to strengthen our state and nation. But I want to hear your top policy priorities for 2025 to make America great again AND Arkansas the best state to live, work, and raise a family. | | Dear Fellow American,

Among the many passages of breathtaking beauty in _Paradise Lost_ is Milton's description of Adam seeing Eve for the first time after the Fall. They had separated for the day to complete their happy labors in the Garden, where Satan found and deceived Eve. Adam, blissfully unaware, had prepared a garland of roses to present to his bride upon their reunification.

When she appeared, he immediately knew disaster had struck: _From his slack hand the garland wreathed for Eve _ _Down dropped, and all the faded roses shed_
Imagine this scene of heartbreak! Imagine the feeling of all the world coming to ruin! Yet for Adam and Eve, as for us, there is hope in redemption. Milton is a master of building a world, describing tragedy, and depicting renewal.

Join Professor Stephen Smith as he guides us through John Milton's epic poem of power, envy, sin, forgiveness, love, and hope in one of our most beautiful online courses to date. Click the link below to register.

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/paradise-lost**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1df11ada951d4984b97b336ae96104e3&_e=pooS7ZJ5evVzPlMSTizfkRgnYzgbx7dFJHhjApkb-oC_ozdnJkyQP_0QrhjpuiekyPOt2lV9jdYPCM-f_FPZPXvSUFzGrYliVhSZ2InrTCzzgKg36tj0DuqoHj7Wmm9Axhh43bXZ90xGRlAqwWme7vDNwlg2IIOJk6NhqP7ILWCASbBaA18LgfhYLUz7ckHcndaLedI35ghZLqw-TtRszebfKqgh5lynH93NP9fhHkFZvqH4tnslLL6XD3V2aGvlxBAmlnSvxYHzVH_dkMBXcY_7M2BRQxz8Jo2Chg8_dGTLiLhwXCl-O2x4UB2KPUj1N0zK4eI1DrXN_OhVFUYQNjoK6fhIKtjGreopnHk5XT6MztxEU3a2P43LxuvVCpdi4_qYN7u_M83GWx4CviImHQ%3D%3D)

Happy learning to you!

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: Among the many passages of breathtaking beauty... | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | | Dear Fellow American, Among the many passages of breathtaking beauty in Paradise Lost is Milton's description of Adam seeing Eve for the first time after the Fall. They had separated for the day to complete their happy labors in the Garden, where Satan found and deceived Eve. Adam, blissfully unaware, had prepared a garland of roses to present to his bride upon their reunification. When she appeared, he immediately knew disaster had struck: From his slack hand the garland wreathed for Eve Down dropped, and all the faded roses shed Imagine this scene of heartbreak! Imagine the feeling of all the world coming to ruin! Yet for Adam and Eve, as for us, there is hope in redemption. Milton is a master of building a world, describing tragedy, and depicting renewal. Join Professor Stephen Smith as he guides us through John Milton's epic poem of power, envy, sin, forgiveness, love, and hope in one of our most beautiful online courses to date. Click the link below to register. Happy learning to you! Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College . | |

name: Sean Feucht
subject: URGENT: Pray with us for California
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=e273e18d966c49189f4b9c600187b803&_e=ZAS5pm2sWEjKLQ0z65GqQ-njKJFXqtIXe04ZRrl8WHk26r5A98j9ba2wJltJmzYDv0w2WcQPnJP2hlQNVxA0F_wLF5TvhKp9WJgzG56y7sPgHX-GUrjd8dlu_7OU-atKwks88qp_yqWxHQq9uzO2t4AQ1KjjFve5ncXrgVSvZ9ejgDlixZtPwLzN7iST-inUZ-uJ6tOuV_AH6Q_nWuoJynzbb6oRgXQbHtgTC3eXpbcOnjCfqvaLWkYjfdFwZLPtEVGpLtlDi_TL_sFgIdz_evuMJ7gAF1n1l7FJ8NzioRLNsJe2PZxcKOJp-jD_3jDPlP7bW1TuiQQ7y5oNYGnzyg%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I'm calling on the Let Us Worship movement to take five minutes and pray for Southern California and the five fires devastating the area. James 5:16 says that the prayers of the righteous availeth much, and we are calling up an army of prayers to intercede on behalf of the people of Southern California. Right now, zero percent of the fires are contained, and the Santa Ana winds are whipping the fire into a devastating frenzy. We had a revival planned for Los Angeles this Friday, but we are shifting gears, and instead we will be holding a time of prayer and will be distributing supplies to the survivors of the fire. More information on how you can help donate to those supplies will be forthcoming. When people are hurting, Let Us Worship jumps into action to be the hands and feet of Jesus, and I'm calling on us to do that once again!
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=e273e18d966c49189f4b9c600187b803&_e=ZAS5pm2sWEjKLQ0z65GqQ-njKJFXqtIXe04ZRrl8WHk26r5A98j9ba2wJltJmzYDv0w2WcQPnJP2hlQNVxA0F_wLF5TvhKp9WJgzG56y7sPgHX-GUrjd8dlu_7OU-atKwks88qp_yqWxHQq9uzO2t4AQ1KjjFve5ncXrgVSvZ9ejgDlixZtPwLzN7iST-inUVOue6wpT6EuK7JgQCapwPFmg1sKlq2CCANx0W4f_AmdJhcYKZUXfAMjjbdje5CLQMG9WAGdVYWNXZSbEKSzh9bzedVReS2v495Ha7UdrW3Mp_zFYdbERByy-FBwH1Yja9TBAdZvLObpePj_1DRLkqg%3D%3D)
---
To those claiming that the L.A. fires are a “judgment” from God, I would respond with this: We ALL deserve to be judged for our evil ways. Every city, state & nation has turned its back on God. California doesn’t need your judgment, it needs your prayers.

Millions of people who love Jesus STILL live here. Ephesians 2:4-5 tells us, “But because of his great love for us, God, who is rich in mercy, made us alive with Christ even when we were dead in transgressions.” So I ask that you join with a host of Believers in PRAYER for Southern California.
---
Till all hear,
---
---
[**SUPPORT LET US WORSHIP >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=e273e18d966c49189f4b9c600187b803&_e=ZAS5pm2sWEjKLQ0z65GqQ-njKJFXqtIXe04ZRrl8WHl5YqZCzezrV6pKrKnBaLa7yOLQOLaOJQIGLlRscTa8nErHgOZ0m5Jym65DIWxEml6646w9AXbk8zzuRdEVMZp0q42XmXIPlpK6TgK1EH0rLrS9c_R270Fmkgc6WB6RkmN4tMUaJUg_5sEYwQG823J9HAePaHm5RnlLasCXSepREz6Ez7CL-c8yEce5N4riOf2AG3-fJyWACk2jqM8thY0M-zA9RpTO1riI9y3xPbRzjrzb2EqmvumPlfmlFU_mwLnSIQxOQOb-TwB7D1mZ7MDGEuJFfOxXwEfWkuCBGSNXTQ%3D%3D)
---
Sean

| Dear Patriot,
Are you ready to make a bold statement and celebrate a monumental moment in American history? We've got just the thing to help you do exactly that!
Introducing the [**American Flag Leatherette Patch Hat**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19662/6374453/8ef11ddd5117dc21645c51a7ae24a34e5ea2013d/65ef6ceb4b060030c3dcdcc3f0ac9addf49a1dd4), a stunning tribute to President Trump's extraordinary return to the White House. This isn't just any hat—it's a symbol of pride and victory, commemorating Trump as the 45th and 47th President of the United States.
**Features of the American Flag Leatherette Patch Hat:**
* **Elegant Embroidery:** The numbers 45 & 47 are beautifully stitched, marking the historic presidency and re-election of a true American leader.
* **Stylish and Patriotic Design:** The sleek leatherette patch pairs perfectly with the American flag, making it not just a hat, but a piece of history.
* **Proudly Made in the USA:** Wear it with pride, knowing it's crafted on American soil, supporting American jobs.

This hat is more than just headwear—it's a keepsake for anyone who cherishes freedom and leadership. It's perfect for wearing at rallies, displaying in your home, or giving as a gift to fellow supporters.
Don't miss out on owning a piece of this historic inauguration. Stock is limited, and they’re flying off the shelves!
**P.S.** Act fast—these exclusive hats are a hit and won’t last long. Secure yours today and be part of the celebration!

name: Mitch Kates
subject: we want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter, did you see our last email?

As 2025 ramps up, we need to be ready for whatever comes our way. We have a chance in the coming months to limit the control MAGA extremists have on our state. From upcoming state Supreme Court elections to the 2026 midterms, **we’re still in this.** [**As we prepare for this year, we want to hear from you. Click here to fill out our priorities survey and tell us what issues we should focus on >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100067075/521651305/-434709457?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250108_SV_MitchKates_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjhmOGFhYi1lZGNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UqS3aEfaALRLfL7IF1RKlTxGKQ8awbP3ntvzyaRi0x4=&emci=808f8aab-edcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=928f8aab-edcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=25616296)
* * *
**_Begin Forwarded Message:_** Peter,

Meet Chairman Gaetz:

**Matt Gaetz has been a lifelong advocate for Northwest Florida, having grown up in Okaloosa County. Before becoming one of America 's most influential America-First Congressmen, Matt graduated from William and Mary Law School, after which he went on to be known as "the tax killer" in the courtroom. He received national recognition for his legal work to fight corruption and demand transparency in government--something he still fights for to this very day.

In 2010, Matt was elected to the Florida House of Representatives, where he fought to uphold our Northwest Florida conservative values, even when it meant going against his own party to do what was best for his constituents. Matt led the effort to make Stand Your Ground even stronger and sponsored and passed legislation creating a 50-year mandatory prison sentence for those who rape children, seniors, or the disabled. Matt's "Timely Justice Act" streamlined frivolous death penalty appeals and tripled the rate of executions in the months after its passage.

At the same time Matt was enacting meaningful conservative reform in the Florida State House, he was growing sick of Washington's ineptitude and our federal government's poor choices. That's why Matt decided to run for Congress in 2016, joining then-candidate Donald Trump's call to Make America Great Again.

In his eight-year tenure as a United States Congressman, Matt was a ferocious advocate for the America-First Movement. Alongside Congressman Steve Scalise and 40 other members of Congress, Matt stormed the Secure Compartmented Information Facility (SCIF) while Democrats attempted a sham impeachment of President Trump. Matt led the charge in expelling then-Speaker Kevin McCarthy once it became clear his interests aligned with the Anti-Trump Uniparty and Radical Left and not the American People. Congressman Gaetz added Hunter Biden's laptop to the congressional record, accurately anticipating the corruption of the Biden family, confirmed by President Biden's full pardon of Hunter. Gaetz also challenged and demanded resignations from DOJ Special Counsel Mueller and FBI Director Wray after the DOJ and FBI continued to target President Trump. Former Rep. Gaetz has always fought against the D.C. Swamp when the American People needed it most, and he will always fight for the American People.

Matt has been a tireless defender of President Trump and his vision for the United States. He has earned nicknames such as the "Trumpiest Congressman in Trump's Washington" by GQ magazine and "the Trumpiest Congressman" by Rolling Stone, which he considers badges of honor.

After winning a historic election to become the 47th President, President Trump nominated Matt to be his Attorney General for his second term. It was the honor of a lifetime for Matt, but once it became clear that his nomination was a distraction from Trump's America-First Agenda, he stepped down from consideration, vowing to help President Trump in any way possible.

_Now, Matt is committed to fighting the Swamp, Uniparty, and corrupt Liberal Legacy Media in any way he can. Through the Florida Firebrand PAC, he hopes to keep Florida Red while supporting President Trump 's mission to Make America Great Again. Matt is standing strong for Florida's values and America's future. As Chairman of the Florida Firebrand PAC, Matt will fight alongside President Trump to protect the values that make this nation great. _ **

[**SUPPORT THE FLORIDA FIREBRAND PAC!**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=329b03348e9c4d2e896f0ea393f016e6&_e=yffhykjsG_nHYc5yD0n5jkVLBpP0Kvcd4y6BhSjMiFJng7OHdd0T6c2-97-IUyrsI5DAqksTEIdMOWkZUN1EG7T2N2oiqcvSwzZfoMO8WyxG3kChMESjo-3YazhNqCLhwoJvUZknVTbHMdXQrru_w2JyOFp1sQ5Q_FqrfnvXp3FRTS7sEdT4Rtg1wTIoxGCCOvEr-Dx-qfXbl4I4oVW55VD-qRLtt3fvIOR6MBvH9z_lnenCXaZLi7B1Hh1OPHmP0CTn6zE3dzx-bHuV0R6b-m3YTP3vk0ZOSlhHCgtV7TScuVgchvRTil4cZYUUoZwKA1ezcei0ahVDt71gCwyQ4fQp9D3egtEYXgRro44IEmEhCLNm0NcnINwB8llXzc-pAMPhy1TO2zZxjCV3tqvd1vY43UL3EbhaxAf9KIy39mM%3D)

Alongside Congressman Steve Scalise and 40 other members of Congress, Matt stormed the Secure Compartmented Information Facility (SCIF) while Democrats attempted a sham impeachment of President Trump. Matt led the charge in expelling then-Speaker Kevin McCarthy once it became clear his interests aligned with the Anti-Trump Uniparty and Radical Left and not the American People. Congressman Gaetz added Hunter Biden's laptop to the congressional record, accurately anticipating the corruption of the Biden family, confirmed by President Biden's full pardon of Hunter. Gaetz also challenged and demanded resignations from DOJ Special Counsel Mueller and FBI Director Wray after the DOJ and FBI continued to target President Trump. Former Rep. Gaetz has always fought against the D.C. Swamp when the American People needed it most, and he will always fight for the American People. Matt has been a tireless defender of President Trump and his vision for the United States. He has earned nicknames such as the "Trumpiest Congressman in Trump's Washington" by GQ magazine and "the Trumpiest Congressman" by Rolling Stone, which he considers badges of honor. After winning a historic election to become the 47th President, President Trump nominated Matt to be his Attorney General for his second term. It was the honor of a lifetime for Matt, but once it became clear that his nomination was a distraction from Trump's America-First Agenda, he stepped down from consideration, vowing to help President Trump in any way possible. Now, Matt is committed to fighting the Swamp, Uniparty, and corrupt Liberal Legacy Media in any way he can. Through the Florida Firebrand PAC, he hopes to keep Florida Red while supporting President Trump 's mission to Make America Great Again. Matt is standing strong for Florida's values and America's future. As Chairman of the Florida Firebrand PAC, Matt will fight alongside President Trump to protect the values that make this nation great. PAID FOR BY FLORIDA FIREBRAND PAC Copyright (C) 2025 Florida Firebrand PAC, All rights reserved.

subject: BREAKING: “NC Supreme Court blocks state from certifying Riggs as the winner in high court election”

Breaking news, Peter — the North Carolina Supreme Court’s GOP supermajority just baselessly blocked certification of the state supreme court election where Democratic incumbent Allison Riggs defeated Republican Jefferson Griffin.
**Let’s call this what it is:_A partisan, anti-democratic power grab._**
Republicans are trying to nullify an election just because North Carolina voters didn’t vote their way. It’s an all-out assault on democracy — not only undermining the future of free and fair elections, but also the trust of the voters in the state.
**If Republicans succeed at overturning the will of the people, they’ll use this playbook all over the country.[Help keep up the fight for fair and free elections in North Carolina and nationwide.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100067087/521651319/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCAllisonRiggsRRNOR_email_20250108-NDRC-Tier1-NCAllisonRiggsRRNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250108-NDRC-Tier1-NCAllisonRiggsRRNOR_&utm_campaign=NCAllisonRiggsRRNOR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwOTU3NjRjLWVkY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mmHR-kbcW8T7GObeVvBa5_F_on3jz6KAVKSf4cFxM3U=)**

Justice Anita Earls — the only other Democrat on the Court — dissented from the decision, writing that:
“[T]he public interest requires that the court not interfere with the ordinary course of democratic processes as set by statute and the state constitution.”
**She’s right, Peter. The people have spoken, yet Republican Jefferson Griffin refuses to concede.** Instead, he’s tried to undo his loss by:
* Calling for a recount, which only confirmed Justice Riggs’ victory
* Challenging over 60,000 votes — which the North Carolina State Board of Elections rejected on the merits
* Skipping Wake County Superior Court and filing an extraordinary request with the North Carolina Supreme Court to order the North Carolina State Board of Elections to throw out the previously okay-ed votes
* Asking the North Carolina Supreme Court to block certification of Justice Riggs’s victory until they rule on his request to throw out 60,000+ votes

Let’s call this what it is:A partisan, anti-democratic power grab. Republicans are trying to nullify an election just because North Carolina voters didn’t vote their way. It’s an all-out assault on democracy — not only undermining the future of free and fair elections, but also the trust of the voters in the state. If Republicans succeed at overturning the will of the people, they’ll use this playbook all over the country.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Justice Anita Earls — the only other Democrat on the Court — dissented from the decision, writing that: “[T]he public interest requires that the court not interfere with the ordinary course of democratic processes as set by statute and the state constitution.” She’s right, Peter. The people have spoken, yet Republican Jefferson Griffin refuses to concede. Instead, he’s tried to undo his loss by: Calling for a recount, which only confirmed Justice Riggs’ victory Challenging over 60,000 votes — which the North Carolina State Board of Elections rejected on the merits Skipping Wake County Superior Court and filing an extraordinary request with the North Carolina Supreme Court to order the North Carolina State Board of Elections to throw out the previously okay-ed votes Asking the North Carolina Supreme Court to block certification of Justice Riggs’s victory until they rule on his request to throw out 60,000+ votes Democracy is on the line in North Carolina — and we need you with us.= Thanks so much — we’ll keep you updated on this one. Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Team Emerge HQ
subject: Thank you for being part of our Emerge community!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
Looking forward, we have some serious victories to build on — and we’re thrilled that you’re a part of the team.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100067179/521651598/-245045952?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-01-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwZWU4MTNhLWVlY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O_R_GJKQOrfPBscRnif1RoM0EA1BE-SU7hFVKSvq62g=)
---
| Peter,

Thank you for being part of our Emerge community! Your support helped us to finish 2024 strong and set a solid foundation for our work in the year ahead. Looking forward, we have some serious victories to build on — and we’re thrilled that you’re a part of the team.

We’re proud to welcome our alums Yassamin Ansari (AZ-3), Janelle Bynum (OR-5), Dr. Maxine Dexter (OR-3), Sarah Elfreth (MD-3), LaMonica McIver (NJ-10), and Lateefah Simon (CA-12) to the 119th Congress. Emerge women up and down the ballot are ready to get to work and so are we! We are recruiting and training our new class of Democratic women to join forces to fight back against Trump and his allies.

By championing leaders of the New American Majority – Black, Brown, and Indigenous women and women of color, as well as LGBTQ+, young, and unmarried women, who are part of the fabric of their communities — we’re prepared for breaking down barriers and paving a better path forward for our country.

But none of this work would be possible without you. Thank you for being a part of this movement, and for investing in the leadership we all deserve.

With gratitude,

Team Emerge

name: Jason Miyares
subject: 👮 Don’t forget…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
Add your name to thank our police officers! | | | Friend, **Happy National Law Enforcement Appreciation Day! ** I take great pride in working alongside these heroic men and women. But I go to work in the morning and put on a tie. _Our law enforcement officers go to work in the morning and put on a bulletproof vest. _ They have a job unlike any job in America today.__ Their dedication, courage, and sacrifice protect and enhance our communities.
---
[**THANK OUR POLICE OFFICERS**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=ec4905df316a4f9284447850dc5786c3&_e=vW3GgfqmD-FFGFsFH3h6jVxCRowPKFkhcV0KkcEvZHHy4IvhpWsYAKJXZh87eUdFlDmduxsX6SsRTAbjTHOj3aMwo2FQJd3kNt-fgNz7z6xZJB5V8qh3rzzvws6iJpUkS4uAJoSnGPvRMOsmRVWnh5eOlUg_TPNBbTUS_eXm5TWgzHkjsBo4Now8uVnwM8-ARD36kg6bp7gzzgmQIB-rZXZ9p8-7fD5Nnemq9yqCmhln3kWx59ODZ91ihTid0pDvzfknjmEYllofn7LdHcjGtDccIM-hsmx0dYiPNks_1NvvvSmWSelF-ONnzG6HY1m3)
---
**Unfortunately, too many in our nation right now are focused on tearing down the police.** They want to demonize and defund those who wear the badge. Let’s take today to let law enforcement know that we have their back. And so, the least we can do as a country, the least we can do as a commonwealth, is to thank our law enforcement officers. _**[**Join me in thanking all of law enforcement officers for keeping us safe by signing our thank you card today.**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=ec4905df316a4f9284447850dc5786c3&_e=vW3GgfqmD-FFGFsFH3h6jVxCRowPKFkhcV0KkcEvZHHy4IvhpWsYAKJXZh87eUdFlDmduxsX6SsRTAbjTHOj3aMwo2FQJd3kNt-fgNz7z6xZJB5V8qh3rzzvws6iJpUkS4uAJoSnGPvRMOsmRVWnh5eOlUg_TPNBbTUS_eXm5TUkqAQT0Q4hGsmlo6mCVRhxBCGNkhQWFFdsDKrtjaep9j4_I1Hygi1VKgCyQeNPK7f9GVMITOWHZfzcxF7oqNPb7dwPjG6YUw_64lusenZMg_6syT2LrCzBe8v0nf83g_rTtMlC6ZUxx464f7zxJ80P)**_

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: what lies ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100067364/521652450/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWU3M2JmYi1lZWNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LOgbcdwTku3l6JVmOCza-GwyJbfIFFkk9Jyrrv4qm4U=) It’s no secret that we have big challenges ahead this year. We also have a lot to tackle – and I’m ready to hit the ground running to start this new year off right. Last year, I co-sponsored over 30 bills to make life better for Oregon families – from delivering disaster relief for farmworkers to wildfire prevention. And I’m proud that I secured over $14 million for local projects across our district, supporting infrastructure, housing, and public safety — and that we brought in more than $315 million in federal grants to Oregon. But, our work is far from done. Now, I’m continuing the fight to pass a bipartisan farm bill that **levels the playing field for our growers** and strengthens rural communities. I’m working to bring **more** CHIPS and Science Act investments home to Oregon – **creating good-paying jobs** and positioning our state as a **global leader in technology** manufacturing for years to come. I’m staying committed to **expanding access to mental health** and addiction treatment through the progress we made in the bipartisan Mental Health Caucus last Congress. These are uncertain, polarized times – but no matter what lies ahead, I will always stand up for the Constitution and the rule of law. I’ll work with anyone – Republican or Democrat – who is committed to **lowering costs and delivering real results** for working families. My priority is simple: pass policies that make life safer and more affordable for my constituents and all Americans. [_**If you’re with me, can you pitch in today to help us take on the tough work ahead?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100067365/521652451/-533866197?refcode=email_010825_plan-forward&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWU3M2JmYi1lZWNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LOgbcdwTku3l6JVmOCza-GwyJbfIFFkk9Jyrrv4qm4U=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100067366/521652452/-533866197?refcode=email_010825_plan-forward&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWU3M2JmYi1lZWNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LOgbcdwTku3l6JVmOCza-GwyJbfIFFkk9Jyrrv4qm4U=)

clean_body: = It’s no secret that we have big challenges ahead this year. We also have a lot to tackle – and I’m ready to hit the ground running to start this new year off right. Last year, I co-sponsored over 30 bills to make life better for Oregon families – from delivering disaster relief for farmworkers to wildfire prevention. And I’m proud that I secured over $14 million for local projects across our district, supporting infrastructure, housing, and public safety — and that we brought in more than $315 million in federal grants to Oregon. But, our work is far from done. Now, I’m continuing the fight to pass a bipartisan farm bill that levels the playing field for our growers and strengthens rural communities. I’m working to bring more CHIPS and Science Act investments home to Oregon – creating good-paying jobs and positioning our state as a global leader in technology manufacturing for years to come. I’m staying committed to expanding access to mental health and addiction treatment through the progress we made in the bipartisan Mental Health Caucus last Congress. These are uncertain, polarized times – but no matter what lies ahead, I will always stand up for the Constitution and the rule of law. I’ll work with anyone – Republican or Democrat – who is committed to lowering costs and delivering real results for working families. My priority is simple: pass policies that make life safer and more affordable for my constituents and all Americans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Andrea | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Preparing for my trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line...
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f2d951207456445c97626cc405dc1869&_e=8eHq__j18bMxw-xsbzvLGXDvnbeT3iMPAKjFaGXViRrGc3kH5Y5bHTG7I-88fCw46rlyUm3lSkE4rl_xwvSlka5RcHUy_TG-vs8WnVi0FhLiD-8K4aQdezjUC9ZP_OjzYzpG2kxXJp12VOAV6TjkUIQ3os2SQx7jWVETHiB2wWZxcU34vexVZZL9oyCth-U9S7lOtDotxtFP9ezq5R2Ic66GYKEuDqK3cjRsyw_uzNMMNWXqXqQOLVJZp2PF1rvfuWPFkeTdzhpzgHU3HqOHt5evY8AYRkW4iPMHdh_f3NCFKJQMgz2tn54T6JRNKWr2J2xdtwZfiq8q0rzs9-qlxpgT_xhAbq0jOoq9E03KHB4G4fXKBz5hz7Xm_wVjk3PS)
---
My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Friend.
---
**_In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault – not just on my freedom – but on the freedom of every patriotic American.
---
The Democrats’ Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president.
---
And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of _everything_ I own.
---
But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home...
---
No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life.
---
_**In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with “ _IMPRISONMENT!_ ” **_
---
But no matter what it costs me, I will _never_ _surrender_ this fight for my freedom and justice.
---
**And it’s the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting.**
---
I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala’s disastrous policies. And if that’s your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high.
---

clean_body: It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line... | My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Friend. In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the final chance to save my home. To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault – not just on my freedom – but on the freedom of every patriotic American. The Democrats’ Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president. And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own. But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home... No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life. In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with “ IMPRISONMENT! ” But no matter what it costs me, I will never surrender this fight for my freedom and justice. And it’s the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting. I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala’s disastrous policies. And if that’s your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high. But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I’ve never needed your help more than right now. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: An important update about Heartland Patriots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots
body:
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce with some important news to share.
**I recently received orders to return to active duty. The activation is temporary, and should only last a few months.**
That means, for the time being, you will continue to receive updates from Heartland Patriots signed by my team, candidates in important races across the country, and maybe even a special guest or two — just not directly from me.
While I take a step back, Heartland Patriots will stay focused on its mission — supporting everyday people who are already running for office and paving a path forward for candidates who want to serve real working families instead of the corrupt elites responsible for tearing up our country.
We’re building another powerful grassroots movement together, and I can’t wait to get back in the middle of it later this year. In the meantime though, I hope you will continue to engage with my team and support Heartland Patriots when you can.
Thank you for everything, Peter. I’ll be in touch soon.
In solidarity,
— Lucas
P.S. I’m still planning to post regularly on Substack during this time away, so please consider following along there — **[or even becoming a paid subscriber!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84795?t=1&akid=8712%2E614464%2E-zkesa)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hp-email-footer?refcode=em20250108-8712-footer&t=2&refcode2=8712_614464_-zkesa&akid=8712%2E614464%2E-zkesa)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Heartland Patriots
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_heartland-patriots/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=3&akid=8712%2E614464%2E-zkesa). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Sworn in
body:
Input needed before President Trump’s Inauguration...
Input needed before President Trump’s Inauguration...
[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kM1OwzAQhJ9mc2tkr2O7PfgAFEsIgVpEUa-OsyEGp0nzV4WnRy2l19G3O5_G1W0M5WxA3wNiFYoeEEHcAeI4iA-3271082K__1mcBNI5Bny4khPe2IN38liPWwqu_3plVm2bx4nf6GFu6cZeK1OqXYjnVK-TwmToeOkTMlwLJRQqiUllpGKFp1KXmc-ky3P0RDIjlUtRcu1lEgwylIyzJV9KzXUqlHdcqtyvBGcyZ5CxS1FadkRDFQ7f1BUuxDn1TZ1EUw1D21_ELKBtijw9jD7S2P9d-aYGtFdlQDsB2oqeN-_YrU47EPYymVh36u3pyKdN0pmiPYUYQ680ZOzz_0syGfwNAAD__076biw)

| [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcFunDAURb_msRtkP2MbFiyaUqRKTZpJlTS7kcc2GacYGGMY0a-PQGi2x8e699rKD61rlhLkAyBenBkBEdg3QJwie1Ovr49hOby__z_cGNoVA37fzRnvbqcVv_rpaJ0aP59ILY79j5ne7bgM9u7ukan1yrUrlVViygwVbXRiSyqZYAIFx-RSSkRCCGqdNbnB3PDizAsjWUYpy3NiElciQU4oyWnOJZUpE1pRLs66YJTwM4GMbEFpE6yNF9f9s8Eo1y6p7n3SlpcYh3ErVgPWo9VTsOnNdcGa1QCso1X-8NkHozrAGnVhciIV17lBk53Xe6yeoj9p5QflPjpg1d5JAor1xFvjJg-s2idvMNqwoiYaupOxn4K2wKqXv6eHnem-i7aLwKrfvx6fAcWpa50BVhV_3q5HM89PxQa3n2NVEC8_r3R-TkJphptrWzcKCRn52J5gXTyX-BUAAP__ggSX8Q)
---
Patriot,
---
I’ve officially been sworn in to our new House majority.
---
That means YOUR House majority is ready to get to work _right now_ – weeks before President Donald J. Trump is inaugurated as our 47th President.
---
After four years of damage brought on by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, we’ve certainly got our work cut out for ourselves.
---
**_These next couple of weeks leading up to President Trump’s inauguration are mission critical for laying the groundwork to truly Make America Great Again._**
---
_But most importantly, citizens like YOU need to be front and center in our new government, which is why I’m asking you to set the 2025 Agenda now that I’ve been sworn in to our 119th House of Representatives._
---
[**Please take my People’s Agenda Survey so that we can get to work right away and pave the way for President Trump’s arrival to Washington.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcFunDwUhZ_mshtkX2ObWbD481OkSk2bREqbrkbGvmScYiDGzGj69BUIzfbzZ51zbBOm3ne3CvQDIJ69mwERxH-AuCTx07y-Psbb4e3t7-EqkFYM-P9uXvDuDtbIz7A8kzfzx3fWqOfxy4Xf7XSb6O7ukTkF4_uV6jpzVYGGdzajimuhhEIlMTtXpVXSalto2you284Iw44CiZnOWeYo8xUylIyzkpdSc50LZQ2XqrVHwZlsGRRsC8q7SJTOfvhD0Rnf33I7hqyvzilN81asAWxmskuk_OqHSG41AJtEJhw-xujMANigPbqSaSNt6dAV7XpPNEsKJ2vCZPz7AKLeO2lAtZ4Ecn4JIOp98gYTxRV1yfGdzOMSLYGoX36dHnZmxyHRkEDUP749PgGq09B7B6JWznak1O_QbnD7OVFH9fL1k1-esli56er73s9KQ8HetydYF18q_BcAAP__UXuZSA)
---

[TAKE THE SURVEY](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcFunDAURb_msQuyn8FmFiyaUKRKTZukSju7kbEfwQkGYsyMJl9fgdBsj49177W1n3rXXktQ94DYOTsDIohvgLhE8Ve_vj6G693x-HV3EUgrBnzYzTPe3MHo_NMvz-T0_P6L1fJ5_H7mNzteJ7q5e2RKXrt-papKbJmh5q1JqORKSCFR5ph0JTZSc2GsbFiBjTbKELOYSdIH02rZJq5EhjnjrOBFrrhKhTSa57IxB8FZ3jDI2BaUtoEodm74oGC166-pGX3Sl12M07wVqwHrmcwSKL24IZBdDcA6kvZ372OwegCs0RxswZTOTWHRZs16T9RL9Cej_aTd2wCi2jspQLmeeLJu8SCqffIGI4UVtdHynczjEgyBqF7-ne53ZsYh0hBBVL9_Pj4BytPQOwui-vhSfy7t8aHrNrj9nKiCfPnxyc9PSSjtdHF972apIGNv2xOsi88l_g8AAP__nfiZzw)
---

The media has been saying that Republicans now have control of the “federal trifecta” – the House, the Senate, and the presidency.
---
But that somewhat misses the mark...
---
It’s not that _Republicans_ now have control of the federal government, it’s that the __PEOPLE__ are back in control.
---
As President Trump said back in 2017, his Inauguration was not about transferring power from one political party to another – but rather, from the ruling class to the _people_.
---
And that’s even truer today.
---
Unelected bureaucrats, D.C. special interests, Deep State warmongers, and every other bad actor in the Washington Swamp is now forced to surrender their power to the one group whose rights and interests have been neglected for far too long – the American People.
---
And now that our 119th Congress is officially in session, I’m asking the people of our country to help set _YOUR_ agenda so that we can truly make America great again for ALL Americans.
---
[**Please take my People’s Agenda Survey so that we can get to work right away and pave the way for President Trump’s arrival to Washington.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kVFvmzAUhX_N5S3IvgabPPDQliFNWre2U7a8RY59kzjDQI1JxH59BUJ5_fxZ5xxb-75xp6kE9QyIF2cHQATxBIhjFH_0bvcaps1-_39zF0gzBnxZzRs-3Nbo_NOP7-T0cP3Javnefbvxhx2nnh7uGpmS166ZqaoSW2ao-ckkVHIlpJAoc0wuJTdWoMh4njNJwhTK4JZpa4zJMkKtElciw5xxVvAiV1ylQhrNc3k0W8FZfmSQsSUoPQWieHHtPwpWu2ZKTeeTprzE2A9LsRqwHsiMgdK7awPZ2QCsI2m_uXbB6hawRrO1BVM6N4VFmx3ne6Ieoz8Y7Xvtzi2Iau2kAOV84sm60YOo1skLjBRmdIqWr2ToxmAIRPXx9_C8MtO1kdoIovr14_UNUB7axlkQ1cu52hfTdff7aYHLz4kqyI_vn_z2loTS9nfXNG6QCjJ2Xp5gXnwr8SsAAP__VAGYcg)
---
Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kV1vpCAYhX8N3o2BFwHnwovtuib74W7bpLu9myC8ztCKWsSZuL--0Zi5fXjIOQe0HzvXLgVRDwTg4uxEAAj_QgDmyP_ql5c6LIfX1_-HGwdcMYGvu3mFu9sbLT78_IROT2-_aSWfhm9XdrfjMuLd3SNT9Np1K1VlYosMNGtNggVTXHIJUkByKVgrGyNsJlAfNc2Y0oqarMkVCsiy3CauAAqCMpqzXCimUi6NZkI25sgZFQ0lGd2C0jYgxovr3zFY7bolNYNPuuIS4zhtxSoC1YRmDpjeXB_QrgaBKqL2h7chWN0TqMAcbU6VFia3YLNmvcerOfqT0X7U7twTXu6dFAG5nni0bvaEl_vkDUYMK2qjZTuZhjkYJLx8_nd62JkZ-oh9JLz886t-JCBPfecs4eUPUf-s66U5v29w-zleBvn8_YNdH5NQ2PHmus5NUpGMnrcnWBdfC_gMAAD__3NbmJQ)
---
Jim Jordan
---

---

Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Rep. John Ray Clemmons
subject: Tomorrow night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus | Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer
body:
https://tnhousedems.com/ [https://tnhousedems.com/]
Peter,
Ready or not, the 2025 legislative session convenes next Tuesday, so we’re getting together for our first fundraiser of the 2026 cycle (and the last until session adjourns later this year).
Republicans have already filed more outrageously radical legislation this year and reminded us once again that their extremism knows no bounds. It is so important to have a strong, well-funded Democratic Caucus with united voices advocating for Tennessee families and fighting the extremism that plagues every corner of our state government.
Please join me and my fellow House Democratic Caucus members tomorrow to kick off this new year [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashjan9th] . We’ll share a preview of what’s ahead in the legislature and discuss how House Democrats are working to promote policies that truly benefit Tennessee families.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashjan9th [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashjan9th]
We would love to have you join us. Grab your ticket or join the host committee today!
JOIN OUR HOST COMMITTEE TODAY! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashjan9th]
Let’s start the year strong and continue working together to build a better future for all Tennesseans. Looking forward to seeing you there!
Best,
John Ray Clemmons
Chairman, TN House Democratic Caucus
P.S. If you have any questions or need more details, feel free to reach out [tara@triumphstrategies.com?subject=jan 9th inquiry] . Your support makes all the difference!

clean_body: [] Peter, Ready or not, the 2025 legislative session convenes next Tuesday, so we’re getting together for our first fundraiser of the 2026 cycle (and the last until session adjourns later this year). Republicans have already filed more outrageously radical legislation this year and reminded us once again that their extremism knows no bounds. It is so important to have a strong, well-funded Democratic Caucus with united voices advocating for Tennessee families and fighting the extremism that plagues every corner of our state government. Please join me and my fellow House Democratic Caucus members tomorrow to kick off this new year [] . We’ll share a preview of what’s ahead in the legislature and discuss how House Democrats are working to promote policies that truly benefit Tennessee families. [] We would love to have you join us. Grab your ticket or join the host committee today! JOIN OUR HOST COMMITTEE TODAY! [] Let’s start the year strong and continue working together to build a better future for all Tennesseans. Looking forward to seeing you there! Best, John Ray Clemmons Chairman, TN House Democratic Caucus P.S. If you have any questions or need more details, feel free to reach out [tara@triumphstrategies.com?subject=jan 9th inquiry] . Your support makes all the difference! _— NBC News, December 14, 2024_
* * *
_The National Republican Congressional Committee’s chairman, Rep. Richard Hudson, R-N.C., told NBC News that there are now more than a dozen Democrats in districts Trump carried, with just three Republicans in districts Vice President Kamala Harris won.**“So that tells me we’re going on offense,” Hudson said.**_ | [PITCH IN TO KEEP IL-13 BLUE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100068617/521656935/955618864?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC120_20250108_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjU0ZjgyMy1mM2NkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1yMWmiFEJT2X6pQXL5i4DFIxCMh5nO55c0OQwWeo_pA=)
