name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9e39865ed84246a8bdd33476432d8f8b&_e=9g2whb2JjzSoywUmFtIrwR13I9WtBElR4N5VMbt7rQCJqF7SEWic5GpaQLpYIuy-lq2hjHwun-DbpgJI3IjU7uKhYRdWg1ZM3PGVCVFdl8r-yG_6RTdb_QvtCaUOClSyX0upm7yNadtyAADd4XXbFX0v_lYfpSpyTbjEiidsnNK9Vn5hp_y44jjylPkj1pe3rXfNKTpgiAzR6o4Mo2v-pIxgmxTCDTOQE8rviaAf8u_wuNlPu1rgHVtFjdOfExwoHSqn9dUxk5q7aFdzJkZ3xNRh-pl0SvtYhyD8yq3RZR6OrDTqX825zVRCuyWMirgTsFZKGbjM-EwHq26ApdzkW8iXFLjYkaP5pUbmTCa1GpO0fwAFSAO0IuUILxmTsKrMpipUHSBAPBZBFWWJsZeNyQ%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9e39865ed84246a8bdd33476432d8f8b&_e=9g2whb2JjzSoywUmFtIrwR13I9WtBElR4N5VMbt7rQCJqF7SEWic5GpaQLpYIuy-lq2hjHwun-DbpgJI3IjU7uKhYRdWg1ZM3PGVCVFdl8r-yG_6RTdb_QvtCaUOClSyX0upm7yNadtyAADd4XXbFX0v_lYfpSpyTbjEiidsnNK9Vn5hp_y44jjylPkj1pe3rXfNKTpgiAzR6o4Mo2v-pIxgmxTCDTOQE8rviaAf8u-O2r8HEzNlnFCm_gO14Jq9_zjm1JMiQh8v378lpLMN6h0Imt60d0H9vMxlDknseCsJAXNtxdHb9bDEQcbsgDVPKTjU67oqsYstrVF0-Fl1kycH1ae3Et8EUxrvQemBHqOgrSOM1rx6JRG8fYy-JbZ9UmsfCmUFru2w1BRwmo7-kA%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9e39865ed84246a8bdd33476432d8f8b&_e=9g2whb2JjzSoywUmFtIrwR13I9WtBElR4N5VMbt7rQCJqF7SEWic5GpaQLpYIuy-lq2hjHwun-DbpgJI3IjU7uKhYRdWg1ZM3PGVCVFdl8r-yG_6RTdb_QvtCaUOClSyX0upm7yNadtyAADd4XXbFX0v_lYfpSpyTbjEiidsnNK9Vn5hp_y44jjylPkj1pe3rXfNKTpgiAzR6o4Mo2v-pIxgmxTCDTOQE8rviaAf8u83LulMl9kk_pUvkdQOhaApnPldonjgndzfJgSGQpcMJlpOvW5roOBUCC-v-FgArxTn3eOuVNq9qQ9_IQhljm0S0OdErrgeMQ4G09xhd__pj8z8GTEGCh17VfdY-NGXkflifni6PwTf29XrZaJHtkJVmMKFiPdz5edbLoo4rQNTUA%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9e39865ed84246a8bdd33476432d8f8b&_e=9g2whb2JjzSoywUmFtIrwR13I9WtBElR4N5VMbt7rQCJqF7SEWic5GpaQLpYIuy-lq2hjHwun-DbpgJI3IjU7uKhYRdWg1ZM3PGVCVFdl8r-yG_6RTdb_QvtCaUOClSyX0upm7yNadtyAADd4XXbFX0v_lYfpSpyTbjEiidsnNK9Vn5hp_y44jjylPkj1pe3rXfNKTpgiAzR6o4Mo2v-pIxgmxTCDTOQE8rviaAf8u_X3iqvLPBcN6ZEu3HeXBQ6l9yIVzYimk9Ih9VXAlPcLDt3yjUPG2vvz-aTDAdPS08mNhtZhVba5hm5baDBLFAPQf6PvtlQRP5YGouBS3E8efOmBHKehfWnVKsHrTK8DXG5uhzYhR-D-bfIjlOxZePuLhLW0BmC-cnDo_J0NUU33g%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9e39865ed84246a8bdd33476432d8f8b&_e=9g2whb2JjzSoywUmFtIrwR13I9WtBElR4N5VMbt7rQCJqF7SEWic5GpaQLpYIuy-lq2hjHwun-DbpgJI3IjU7uKhYRdWg1ZM3PGVCVFdl8r-yG_6RTdb_QvtCaUOClSyX0upm7yNadtyAADd4XXbFX0v_lYfpSpyTbjEiidsnNK9Vn5hp_y44jjylPkj1pe3rXfNKTpgiAzR6o4Mo2v-pIxgmxTCDTOQE8rviaAf8u9-v0bDAcYIqRTykxIG1KBE1HsG2vMMBeEpPv_p31ia6JiNoipIXjLHW7S9LHJZxoPorr_L29HnDd3zn7XagDoZ100-Qq-05rUhLCNMLXksON0dwXc8sE4-W-F_qRGqPzq9CwGoLZz5AyJkHDDt1MMoT0CJYEskoXzjHwI0nuX9cg%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9e39865ed84246a8bdd33476432d8f8b&_e=9g2whb2JjzSoywUmFtIrwR13I9WtBElR4N5VMbt7rQCJqF7SEWic5GpaQLpYIuy-lq2hjHwun-DbpgJI3IjU7uKhYRdWg1ZM3PGVCVFdl8r-yG_6RTdb_QvtCaUOClSyX0upm7yNadtyAADd4XXbFX0v_lYfpSpyTbjEiidsnNK9Vn5hp_y44jjylPkj1pe3rXfNKTpgiAzR6o4Mo2v-pIxgmxTCDTOQE8rviaAf8u91eZd9P31eqrmnjjBazSj6fOQ1dXbirB8-IRNH2a1WcTsHYXQ0v7SjdYwXBG2Ts6sgqZ76mOao5MhqRGF_qpWOgg1TYezxXWhrJMGZwLPy9-ktJ5jk4ZNis3U-QWQAPZNP7K8csR_2ZvYc7aeoJHio4kKNo9tePMXwSZiKUnmm_Q%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9e39865ed84246a8bdd33476432d8f8b&_e=9g2whb2JjzSoywUmFtIrwf-lXdentYpGQFUfFtYiRzhj0eDmP_w9D6OleLQmEixLsuGTY5Pj9Am5pd6xGcB7NWqcU1_MEkcV9iXiQQTTGE8Dw3DSndf-OPraUogHBmMgmBZ0TWdmt_SvPYjKqHPIqIKRo-IcK25nQVZ3vDd69nMxuOXYT8XdP1uvE46zhUDDRnIWppH_1HZPXUH9o_c8jQ%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click here to [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=9e39865ed84246a8bdd33476432d8f8b&_t=4CCfED9Ms1P31fIPpMGYTDVbgpxlwMnIF54fUAOLqw5LfSzEafidjUENGq3D7VwQ3HMsGj97ZZn4DXYlMiNMi9Zs56PSLJxw3jT8k1Irq9zLWnkmzxrRehXSFx6FhIvC)

| Friends, This morning, we were proud to release our 2025 agenda called "The Granite Path To Prosperity!"
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yNjUzMjYyMzQ1NDUwNTU4NzUyJmM9dTZ0MSZlPTE5MjgmYj0xNDAzMzI4MjE0JmQ9aTdiMHEwZQ==.IzM2UGjgtMHE_ypyRXGYMJAyW8T8OetCyYR4oqoM29s)
---
| |
---
|
**Under responsible Republican leadership, New Hampshire has thrived, ranking first in the nation for freedom, public safety, and economic opportunity.** We will continue down the Granite Path to Prosperity with a conservative agenda that addresses New Hampshire’s greatest challenges while improving opportunities for Granite State families. Below is a brief summary of the Granite Path to Prosperity, but you can [read our full agenda here](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yNjUzMjYyMzQ1NDUwNTU4NzUyJmM9dTZ0MSZlPTE5MjgmYj0xNDAzMzI4MjI1JmQ9ZDNzOGw3eg==._w95O6H_muS4EG7DsURhKTqbJZ0G7GgEzEQax3WbNHM)! Thank you, Senate President Sharon Carson

---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Fiscal Discipline** · Deliver a balanced state budget that targets New Hampshire’s greatest needs while avoiding an income tax, a sales tax, a capital gains tax, or increased property taxes in our communities; · Continue to support local taxpayers through the Student Centered Education Funding Formula and increased Rooms and Meals revenue sharing. **Expand Housing** · Continue to support the Affordable Housing Fund and other innovative programs that are starting to deliver expanded housing for New Hampshire families; · Oppose red tape that gets in the way of new housing starts; · Expand resources and cut regulations to target homeless in every New Hampshire community. **Protect Parents and Families** · Pass a Parents Bill of Rights to ensure parents are always informed of what is happening to their children in New Hampshire schools; · Protect the Education Freedom Account program and other educational options for New Hampshire parents; · Pass the No Screens in Classrooms Act to ensure children are learning. **Keep New Hampshire the Safest State in the nation** · Ban Sanctuary Cities; · Support the Northern Border Alliance; · Pass mandatory minimum sentences for trafficking and distributing large quantities of Fentanyl; · Protect Second Amendment Rights; · Back New Hampshire Law Enforcement and National Guard. **ALWAYS PROTECT THE NEW HAMPSHIRE ADVANTAGE.** **
****Do you agree that we need to pass these important measures? Consider making a contribution to the NH Senate Republican here:

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Friends, This morning, we were proud to release our 2025 agenda called "The Granite Path To Prosperity!" | | | | | | Under responsible Republican leadership, New Hampshire has thrived, ranking first in the nation for freedom, public safety, and economic opportunity. We will continue down the Granite Path to Prosperity with a conservative agenda that addresses New Hampshire’s greatest challenges while improving opportunities for Granite State families. Below is a brief summary of the Granite Path to Prosperity, but you can ! Thank you, Senate President Sharon Carson | | | | | | Fiscal Discipline · Deliver a balanced state budget that targets New Hampshire’s greatest needs while avoiding an income tax, a sales tax, a capital gains tax, or increased property taxes in our communities; · Continue to support local taxpayers through the Student Centered Education Funding Formula and increased Rooms and Meals revenue sharing. Expand Housing · Continue to support the Affordable Housing Fund and other innovative programs that are starting to deliver expanded housing for New Hampshire families; · Oppose red tape that gets in the way of new housing starts; · Expand resources and cut regulations to target homeless in every New Hampshire community. Protect Parents and Families · Pass a Parents Bill of Rights to ensure parents are always informed of what is happening to their children in New Hampshire schools; · Protect the Education Freedom Account program and other educational options for New Hampshire parents; · Pass the No Screens in Classrooms Act to ensure children are learning. Keep New Hampshire the Safest State in the nation · Ban Sanctuary Cities; · Support the Northern Border Alliance; · Pass mandatory minimum sentences for trafficking and distributing large quantities of Fentanyl; · Protect Second Amendment Rights; · Back New Hampshire Law Enforcement and National Guard. ALWAYS PROTECT THE NEW HAMPSHIRE ADVANTAGE. Do you agree that we need to pass these important measures? body:
It’s no secret that the extremism we’re seeing in Washington poses a serious threat to our freedoms going forward

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100070726/521664551/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGYyN2IwMS1mZWNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=olrkU6pQ64twi6XNyaTJ4ukgOSK3waKbYwpUwLuxx28=) It’s undeniably true that the LGBTQ community has made amazing strides in recent years. But it’s also no secret that the extremism we’re seeing in Washington poses a serious threat to our freedoms going forward. In the new year, some of my colleagues in Congress are wasting no time in targeting LGBTQ folks’ health care, education, and basic safety. Let me be clear that I will stand up against _any_ extremist effort to take away our rights. I understand that, as one of just a handful of LGBTQ representatives in Washington, there is a lot on the line for LGBTQ Americans in the months and years ahead. But as long as we have the determination to keep pushing forward, there’s nothing we can’t accomplish. **Despite the obstacles we now face, this is a fight I still believe we will win. Because I know the American people still believe in freedom, equality, safety, and dignity for all.** [_**I am determined to fight back against the ugly extremism we’ve seen throughout Washington — but I need you by my side in this fight. Please, will you chip in a donation to support my team today and help us continue to fight for freedom and equality for all Americans?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100070727/521664552/-2111986852?refcode=email_010825_LGBTQ&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGYyN2IwMS1mZWNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=olrkU6pQ64twi6XNyaTJ4ukgOSK3waKbYwpUwLuxx28=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100070728/521664553/-2111986852?refcode=email_010825_LGBTQ&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGYyN2IwMS1mZWNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=olrkU6pQ64twi6XNyaTJ4ukgOSK3waKbYwpUwLuxx28=)

name: Prudent Politics
subject: New way to beat depression (without sticking your fingers in cow poo)
body:
Please read the following message.
* * *

| If you're like most people, you probably know that psilocybin--the active compound in magic mushrooms--has been scientifically proven to help with depression, anxiety, and PTSD.

...But finding a reliable source for it can feel like a mission.

After all, who wants to go digging through cow poo just to find something that might work?

That's why we took matters into our own hands... Quite literally!

Introducing... the Easiest Way to Experience the Power of Magic Mushrooms--Without the Hassle Of Going Out And Finding Them Yourself, Or Buying Them From Some "Dodgy Guy" On The Street And Potentially Getting Arrested!

We've transformed real psilocybin mushrooms into a simple, easy-to-take supplement, and we'll ship them right to your door, direct from our farm here in California.

Start your day with a single capsule that helps you:
* **Boost your mood** --Shake off those morning blues and feel more positive every day.
* **Enhance mental clarity** --Get the focus and sharpness you need to tackle your day with ease.
* **Increase energy naturally** --No more sluggish mornings or dragging yourself through the day.

And you can get started today with a full month's supply of real psilocybin magic mushrooms with our Mighty Micro "Microdosing Starter Kit".

_Here 's what's inside each dose:_

150mg of organically grown psilocybin mushrooms (carefully grown and prepared for maximum potency)

A touch of ginger--to support digestion and metabolism (trust us; it doesn't taste very nice without this. Yuck!)

That's it. No fillers, no gimmicks. Just pure, effective ingredients that get results. FAST.

_Here's How Easy It Is to Take Your Daily Dose_

Taking your dose is a breeze. Just:
1. Pop a capsule with your morning coffee.
2. Blend it into a smoothie.
3. Or chew it like a children's vitamin.

It's that simple. And once you find the right dose for you, you'll experience a surge of good energy, positive emotions, and mental clarity that lasts throughout your day.

_Why Trust Us?_
* **Scientifically Backed** --Psilocybin microdosing has been shown to have life-changing benefits, backed by real research and studies from Harvard, Yale, & And Thomas Hopkins Medical University, amongst thousands of other places. You may have already read them.
* **Real Results** --Thousands of satisfied customers have already seen improvements in their mood, focus, and energy.
* **Organic & Safe**--We use only the highest-quality, organically grown mushrooms, from our own farm in California. Everything has been lab tested.
* **Risk-Free** --We stand behind our product with a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied, we'll give you a full refund. No questions asked.

Don't let another day go by feeling stuck.

Order now and get your 1-month supply of real magic mushroom capsules for just $99--and get $1000 worth of FREE products for becoming a new customer--but only if you act today.

Click here to order now:

[https://mightymicro.co/op/starter-pack/ref/12/](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuea1fIteknop5I2ITm5oniq61&s=BMLOOIIJCFEEJLCB)

Experience the benefits of magic mushrooms without the mess, and start feeling better today.

Best regards,
Michael "The Mushroom Guy" Griswold
---

subject: “The 119th Congress, brought to you by AIPAC”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The 119th Congress has begun, and a new report from Sludge reveals that
349 representatives and senators making up 65% of this Congress received
campaign contributions from AIPAC’s PAC in the 2024 election cycle.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250108?refcode=em20250108-36300&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36300_1203867_QBM-jT&akid=36300%2E1203867%2EQBM-jT ]Tweet from Donald Shaw: I analyzed the 55,000+ disbursements made by
AIPAC PAC during the 2023-24 election cycle to find out how many members
of the new Congress got AIPAC money and how much.

AIPAC, the pro-Israel lobby group funded by right-wing megadonors, spent
an unprecedented amount in the 2024 election cycle. In fact, according to
Sludge, "No single organization has ever contributed as much money to
congressional candidates’ campaigns as AIPAC did during the 2023-24
election cycle."

The two largest recipients of AIPAC’s money?

#1 Wesley Bell
#2 George Latimer

With AIPAC’s help, these conservative challengers successfully unseated
our incumbents Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman in last year’s Democratic
primaries, replacing two progressive champions of peace and justice with
corrupt, corporate shills.

Too many members of Congress on BOTH sides of the aisle take money from
AIPAC in exchange for providing unconditional military aid to Israel
despite its genocidal acts and war crimes.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250108?refcode=em20250108-36300&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36300_1203867_QBM-jT&akid=36300%2E1203867%2EQBM-jT ]This is exactly why we need the Democratic Party to reject AIPAC once
and for all, and why we’re actively recruiting working-class, progressive
candidates to challenge the out-of-touch establishment in 2026. Will you
fuel our recruitment fund with a grassroots contribution of
$5 or more today?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

name: Save NPR via Our Revolution
subject: Petition: Save NPR and PBS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Trump and Musk have a new target: beloved public media stations NPR and
PBS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20906?t=1011&akid=7493%2E5885482%2E3ujCaC ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20906?source=email-010825&t=1012&akid=7493%2E5885482%2E3ujCaC ]After facing one Republican assault after the next in recent years, NPR
and PBS are already hanging on by a thread. And now Trump and Musk want to
completely gut the most trusted, unbiased source for news out there. WIll
you urgently add your name to save PBS and NPR?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20906?source=email-010825&t=1013&akid=7493%2E5885482%2E3ujCaC ]ADD YOUR NAME

Musk has floated lots of ideas to cut spending – eliminating entire
government departments and firing thousands. But one of the most concrete
things on his list is slashing HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS of dollars in annual
funding for PBS and NPR.

It’s not a new threat. Republicans have been waging a war on public
broadcasting for years, trying to do away with free, fact-based
independent journalism that is required by law to be objective and free
from corporate or political agendas.

When Trump tried to slash public media funding during his first term,
millions mobilized to stop him. Trump lost that fight, but this time could
be different as Republicans line up behind him and Musk pushes harder than
ever for major cuts.

We’re going to be ready.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20906?source=email-010825&t=1014&akid=7493%2E5885482%2E3ujCaC ]Together, we can fight back to save NPR and PBS – and win. But it will
only work if we mobilize in MASSIVE numbers, then relentlessly lobby
Congress to keep public media alive. That work starts NOW – will you add
your name to send a message straight to Congress?

In this polarized environment, free and independent media is more vital
than ever. And that’s exactly why Trump and his oligarch buddies have
settled on PBS and NPR as targets – without this vital public service,
they’ll be free to spread all the disinformation they desire.

Together, we can save one of our most important tools left to expose their
lies.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7493%2E5885482%2E3ujCaC ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7493%2E5885482%2E3ujCaC ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7493%2E5885482%2E3ujCaC ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7493%2E5885482%2E3ujCaC ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7493%2E5885482%2E3ujCaC ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-010825.hIs5JU&t=1008&akid=7493%2E5885482%2E3ujCaC ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the

[https://rumble.com/v66z3hy-ep91-big-tech-billionaire-takeover-will-maga-get-the-justice-we-deserve.html?e9s=src_v1_ucp](https://substack.com/redirect/6c23400d-5d87-4c4c-adb8-08a8cd7240b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
# **EP91: BIG TECH BILLIONAIRE TAKEOVER: Will MAGA Get the Justice We Deserve?**
_NOTE: Please consider upgrading your subscription here for $7 month to help me keep this publication up and running. While everything here is free at the moment, your monthly financial subscription of $7 per month or $70 per year will help ensure that I can keep providing you and others with groundbreaking independent journalism and original political commentary. Your subscription for a nominal fee supports my journalistic efforts, and the expenses associated with my investigations. If you don 't want to miss any of my hard-hitting reports and commentary, please subscribe today!_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..h43kXaks4ZrF1ovTuRuxlYYITxIiYIgR1KyteqJTdps?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=154404927)
While America was celebrating the holiday season with church services, family dinners, and a brief respite from the year's tensions, a very different story was unfolding in MAGA world. Headlines from Donald Trump's transition team over the last 2 weeks have centered not on the holiday cheer and the excitement of the upcoming inauguration, but instead on Elon Musk and the controversial issue of eliminating caps on H1-B visas. Unfortunately for Elon, these headlines have been anything but flattering. Over the course of a few days, he and the so-called "tech right" launched a relentless campaign to defend the unfettered influx of foreign workers--particularly from India--brought in under the H1-B visa system to replace American workers with foreigners. What followed was nothing short of a spectacular fall from grace by proponents of DOGE, as Musk and other tech billionaires alienated the MAGA base. We watched X, the social media company owned by Musk, rapidly turn into a tool of censorship against H1-B visa critics, whom he referred to on X as "subtards" and "contemptible fools" who needed to be purged from the GOP.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e153105f-33c4-448c-9fc0-b6e92b3baf17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
How did Elon Musk, the world's richest man, become a darling of the Right and an influential figure in Donald Trump's orbit? Many of you may recall that before this summer, Musk styled himself as politically neutral. He had donated to Obama's campaign a decade ago, he voted for Joe Biden, and only occasionally hinted at having libertarian-leaning views. He even publicly expressed support for Governor Ron DeSantis's Presidential primary against President Trump. It wasn't until the near-assassination attempt of President Trump in Butler, Pennsylvania, on July 13th, 2024 that Musk publicly aligned himself with Trump's re-election bid and endorsed his campaign for President.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/23f4f0df-75ef-4a2b-b3c4-fd3abe6654aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/416d021c-b94f-4071-96cc-7812520b8f25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But, Elon was not the only wealthy Silicon Valley executive to suddenly throw their weight behind Trump. The addition of J.D. Vance as President Trump's running mate earlier this year appeared to galvanize a new wave of tech elites into supporting the campaign. Vance, known for his ties to billionaire investor Peter Thiel, brought with him a network of influential donors from the tech world. Soon, figures like David Sacks, Peter Thiel, Elon Musk, the executives and cofounders of Palantir, Jeff Bezos, and even Mark Zuckerberg cozied up to Trump's campaign, opening their wallets in the process. Their motives were clear: a second Trump administration offered the promise of policies favorable to their industries and expanded influence over the levers of power in Washington.
Fast forward to Christmas.
Trump had secured re-election, and his second-term administration was beginning to take shape. With each passing day, announcements were being made about new appointments to key positions. Musk was tapped to head the newly proposed Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) with Vivek Ramaswamy. Sacks was named the "Crypto and AI Czar." One after another, Silicon Valley's elite seemed to be angling for a seat at the table. For many loyal conservatives, such as myself, this has been a bitter pill to swallow. These tech titans, who only recently jumped on the MAGA bandwagon after years of Trump hatred and criticism, have now secured positions of power despite their questionable conservative credentials.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c837a134-5b63-4f47-8993-89c7c886f9d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..h43kXaks4ZrF1ovTuRuxlYYITxIiYIgR1KyteqJTdps?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=154404927)
The final straw for me that forced my hand into publicly speaking out was the appointment of Sriram Krishnan as Trump's new AI advisor. Krishnan, a vocal advocate for expanding legal immigration, has long championed the H1-B visa system--a program originally intended to provide temporary, high-skilled workers for specialized industries. This is NOT how the system works though. It is being abused to provide a pipeline of cheap, foreign labor often at the expense of American workers. Musk and his fellow Big Tech bros would have you believe that they seek only "geniuses" from abroad to fill positions at Tesla and the various other companies that are utilizing H1-B visa workers. Or as they like to call them, "the best and the brightest", because Silicon Valley thinks we just don't have any bright people here in America to do these technical jobs.
In reality, the majority of H1-B visas are now being given out for such mundane jobs as fast food and customer service representatives. Moreover, these temporary positions are rarely ever temporary. Instead, these people often find ways to overstay their visas, or find loopholes to stay here in America permanently, which is why we have such a high number of illegal aliens living in the US. Contrary to popular belief, many of the illegals who are living in America were able to get into our country legally, but they are now overstaying their visa.
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..h43kXaks4ZrF1ovTuRuxlYYITxIiYIgR1KyteqJTdps?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=154404927)
Understand that the H1-B visa system is crushing the American worker. Consider the story of a young, white man from middle America. He works hard, excels in high school, and earns a degree in computer science with dreams of working for companies like SpaceX or Meta. But, when he graduates with a 4.0 GPA, he finds that his resume is consistently overlooked in favor of foreign workers who often arrive through the H1-B system, sometimes with exaggerated or fabricated qualifications. This isn't an isolated story--it's the sad reality for countless Americans who now find themselves unemployed or unable to find jobs in the sectors for which they earned a degree in, saddling themselves instead with broken dreams and endless student loan debt.
The driving force behind this system is clear: tech companies want to keep labor costs low. In a world obsessed with profit margins, stockholder value, and GDP growth, it seems the identity of the worker doesn't matter--so long as the job is done at the lowest possible cost.
When I raised concerns about Krishnan's appointment to the Trump administration on X, and when I posted publicly available FEC records that contained a publicly available address tied to Krishnan's political donations, which prove that Krishnan donated to anti-Trump Democrats less than one month before the 2024 Presidential election, Musk and his allies launched an all-out defense of the H1-B system, and I was accused of "doxxing" Krishnan, which led to the censorship of my account on X and a twelve hour suspension from X. As criticism from other right-wing voices grew louder, the behavior of the Big Tech executives on X became increasingly erratic. Evidently, cheap Indian labor is the hill that they were willing to die on.
Musk began to lash out with tweets that told any critic of H1-B's to "fuck yourself in the face."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b8fd06e9-27eb-4e3b-8c56-26fe90bd9273?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
He called anyone pushing back against him "trolls" and "attention seeking."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6f0bd146-6939-445f-ad39-cef7272f75af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
He liked tweets that likened the American people to "retards" somehow incapable of staffing these tech jobs. He argued that anyone not in favor of taking in unlimited Indians actually wanted China to "win" and he called for critics of H1-B visas to be purged from the Republican Party. Note that China is not tripping over themselves to import these mythical Indian geniuses.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ed2230dc-c78d-4aa8-824a-ca0fb6f49076?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Then, in an ironic twist of fate, X, the "free speech absolutist" app launched a wave of censorship, diversification, and shadowbanning on X against myself and dozens of other right-wing accounts. For the crime of disagreeing on this critical issue, I had my blue verification badge removed from my X account, and my reach was intentionally throttled. I was also demonetized by X and all of my paying subscribers were taken away from me with no explanation from X. Other accounts such as those of New York Young Republicans President Gavin Wax, Infowars host Owen Shroyer, and political commentator Nick Fuentes met a similar fate. Others were permanently banned entirely.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..h43kXaks4ZrF1ovTuRuxlYYITxIiYIgR1KyteqJTdps?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=154404927)
In a matter of days, many people found themselves asking if Musk was a free speech hypocrite. The man who once championed free speech and American exceptionalism has now been accused by many on the right of betraying those principles to protect his business interests and a deeply flawed immigration system. Yesterday, after being stripped of my verification badge for over a week, it was finally reinstated without explanation, but the damage has been done.
Let me be clear, foreign immigration to this nation, both legal and illegal, is destroying this country. We cannot continue to inundate America with more and more foreigners. What exactly is the point of beating China if it costs us our identity? Who cares if our economy is better if we look like New Delhi? None of it matters if this place, our home, and if the American people are unrecognizable. At some point, we all have to take a step back and realize that GDP is NOT what makes a nation worth living in. We have to be able to say enough is enough. America First isn't just a bumper sticker or a slogan. It's a lifestyle. Big Tech billionaires would be wise to understand that sooner or later if they don't want to be the ones who find themselves purged from the MAGA movement.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: My life changed forever 14 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Hi friends, it’s Gabby Giffords. On this day 14 years ago, my life was forever changed when a gunman attempted to assassinate me while I was hosting an event for constituents at a Safeway in Tucson. I was shot in the head, and six innocent people lost their lives.
I’m reaching out in the hope that you’ll take a few minutes to read an excerpt of an op-ed I wrote for _The Hill_ where I reflect on the Tucson shooting, my recovery journey, and the future of the gun violence prevention movement under the Trump administration.
[**Keep scrolling to read my op-ed, and if you’re able, please consider using this link to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC. Your support—especially today—means so much to me.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250108-2-b&t=1&akid=9783%2E3935704%2EOu-daB)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250108-2-b&t=2&akid=9783%2E3935704%2EOu-daB)**
* * *
**I was shot 14 years ago today. Let’s build on progress made to reduce gun violence.**
**BY GABBY GIFFORDS**
There’s nothing like the beginning of a new Congress. Much like students starting a school year, the air is thick with excitement, but also uncertainty.
But I haven’t been a member on the House floor in a long time. Fourteen years ago today, I was shot in the head because a dangerous man was able to buy a gun. Six innocent people were killed—Christina-Taylor, Dorothy, Judge John Roll, Phyllis, Dorwan, and Gabe. I’ll never forget their names. Twelve others were injured.
The shooting, an assassination attempt that targeted me, turned my life upside down. I had to relearn how to walk, and I still struggle to speak. I had to resign from Congress, the best job I’ll ever have.
That day in Tucson captured national attention – a sitting Congresswoman shot in the head. But the truth is that today, being shot isn’t rare. Gun violence is a national crisis and now the leading cause of death for American kids and teens. More than 125 people die each day. That doesn’t account for the tens of thousands more who, like me, have their lives changed in an instant by a bullet.
It’s hard to comprehend the scale of preventable heartbreak this country encounters every single day. Imagine a loved one—a child, parent, neighbor, or friend—never texting you back again. Never calling. Never laughing. Never smiling. Now imagine how you’d feel knowing that loss could have been prevented had our lawmakers prioritized public safety over the corporate gun lobby and gun industry profits.
Despite the ongoing crisis, progress has been made. The outgoing Biden administration has done more to save lives than any administration in the history of our country. But now, mere weeks until a new president takes the oath of office, much of America is on edge. I get it.
As President Trump kicks off his second term, he and his team should understand that rolling back effective protections to reduce gun violence is a lose-lose proposition. Most importantly, doing so will weaken public safety and Americans will die as a result. But it will also upset a huge majority of voters. Gun industry executives and their lobbyists are the only people who want weaker gun laws.
I urge the soon-to-be President Trump to reevaluate his priorities before taking the oath of office, and side with public safety, above all else. Just like the American people, a Trump administration has nothing to gain and everything to lose by making it easier for dangerous people to get guns. Believe me, I know.

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9783%2E3935704%2EOu-daB) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Val Hoyle
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
https://www.valhoyle.com/ [https://www.valhoyle.com/]
Peter, serving Oregon in Congress has been the honor of a lifetime.

A few days ago, I was sworn in to my second term — and I can’t express enough gratitude for people like you for helping make that possible.

Thanks to your support, we won a Frontline race in a very tough national environment. Whether you pitched in a grassroots contribution, volunteered, or simply took time out of your day to read our messages, every action you took made a huge difference.

Now, it’s time for us to roll up our sleeves and get to work. From strengthening our labor unions and expanding access to quality health care to protecting the Oregon Coast from the impacts of climate change on our communities, I’m more determined than ever to make real progress for Oregonians. I hope you’ll continue to stand by my side in 2025 and beyond.

Again, Peter, your support means the world to me. Thank you.

— Val

clean_body: [] Peter, serving Oregon in Congress has been the honor of a lifetime. A few days ago, I was sworn in to my second term — and I can’t express enough gratitude for people like you for helping make that possible. Thanks to your support, we won a Frontline race in a very tough national environment. Whether you pitched in a grassroots contribution, volunteered, or simply took time out of your day to read our messages, every action you took made a huge difference. Now, it’s time for us to roll up our sleeves and get to work. From strengthening our labor unions and expanding access to quality health care to protecting the Oregon Coast from the impacts of climate change on our communities, I’m more determined than ever to make real progress for Oregonians. I hope you’ll continue to stand by my side in 2025 and beyond. Again, Peter, your support means the world to me. Thank you. — Val DONATE [] Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress.

| Peter,

Did you know that the USPS is the _**ONLY**_ delivery service that delivers mail to every single address in the country?

While millions of Americans rely on the USPS, Donald Trump wants to hand over this critical public service to private corporations that are more concerned with maximizing profits than serving the American people.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100071459/521667146/-1565964854?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-01-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI1ZmNmNzgxLTAxY2UtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hGa2tenemS98qxGW161obEjRpweLcLGFf6djaB66WtU=)
This isn’t just an attack on the USPS– _it’s an attack on working families, small businesses, seniors, and veterans who count on their services for everything from prescriptions to food to packages!_

Privatizing the USPS would lay off thousands of postal workers, disrupt services, and increase wait times and costs for Americans, especially those in rural communities.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Here's the plan for 2025 →
body:
My friends at EMILYs List are in the business of big, structural change. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100072171/521669586/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE110_20250108_EOYWarrenRS_ALL&sourceid=1055578&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2M5NTM5Ni0wM2NlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TPKTy5b2hW496M-ApygS9Mf546637y-1iifuPbOPi_4=) Hi Peter, it's Elizabeth Warren.

For almost 40 years, EMILYs List has shown us what it looks like to _**truly invest**_ in the future we want.

This organization has helped elect _thousands_ of women, at every level of government, all across the country. **I'm one of them** , and I've seen how their support makes a real difference. [**So, I'm asking: Can you donate to EMILYs List today to support Democratic pro-choice women running up and down the ballot?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100072173/521669588/-1037096532?refcode=WUEFE110_20250108_EOYWarrenRS_ALL&sourceid=1055578&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2M5NTM5Ni0wM2NlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TPKTy5b2hW496M-ApygS9Mf546637y-1iifuPbOPi_4=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100072175/521669590/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE110_20250108_EOYWarrenRS_ALL&sourceid=1055578&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2M5NTM5Ni0wM2NlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TPKTy5b2hW496M-ApygS9Mf546637y-1iifuPbOPi_4=)
---
You may have heard me talk before about big, structural change. My friends at EMILYs List are in the business of big, structural change to our political landscape. 40 years ago, Ellen Malcolm and the Founding Mothers of EMILYs List had a vision to change the face of American politics by investing in women candidates in the _earliest_ days of their campaigns, when it matters most. Thanks to that vision and decades of work, _thousands_ of women have been elected to office nationwide, up and down the ballot. And it's made a real difference.

I know firsthand how powerful support from EMILYs List can be. That's why I'm reaching out today, at the start of the new year, to ask for your support. EMILYs List is entirely donor-supported, so your contribution makes their work electing women like me possible.
[**Can you contribute whatever you can to EMILYs List today? Donate now:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100072178/521669592/-1037096532?refcode=WUEFE110_20250108_EOYWarrenRS_ALL&sourceid=1055578&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2M5NTM5Ni0wM2NlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TPKTy5b2hW496M-ApygS9Mf546637y-1iifuPbOPi_4=)

clean_body: My friends at EMILYs List are in the business of big, structural change. | = Hi Peter, it's Elizabeth Warren. For almost 40 years, EMILYs List has shown us what it looks like to truly invest in the future we want. This organization has helped elect thousands of women, at every level of government, all across the country. I'm one of them , and I've seen how their support makes a real difference. = | = You may have heard me talk before about big, structural change. My friends at EMILYs List are in the business of big, structural change to our political landscape. 40 years ago, Ellen Malcolm and the Founding Mothers of EMILYs List had a vision to change the face of American politics by investing in women candidates in the earliest days of their campaigns, when it matters most. Thanks to that vision and decades of work, thousands of women have been elected to office nationwide, up and down the ballot. And it's made a real difference. I know firsthand how powerful support from EMILYs List can be. That's why I'm reaching out today, at the start of the new year, to ask for your support. EMILYs List is entirely donor-supported, so your contribution makes their work electing women like me possible. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

body:

Peter, We wanted to make sure you saw this note from ✨Congresswoman✨ Emily Randall. It’s a bittersweet time. Last week, we swore in a new Congress. In a few days, Trump will return to the White House — and he’ll bring his crew of out-of-touch billionaires and dangerous extremists with him. So, Team Emily: We have two goals. First, we do everything in our power to fight the worst of the Trump administration. Second, we put ourselves in the best position to flip the House as soon as possible. [_**Emily is starting this organizing early — are you with us? Chip in $6 or any amount to celebrate the swearing-in, show your support, and elect more bold Democratic candidates →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100072300/521669955/1947289852?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.01.08_SwornInFollowup_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGFiZDA2ZC0wNGNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1wuwZahkIi3odV1aLfM0GzVsohsxmHB5t0TK9Yqvfw=) [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100072301/521669956/1947289852?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.01.08_SwornInFollowup_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGFiZDA2ZC0wNGNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1wuwZahkIi3odV1aLfM0GzVsohsxmHB5t0TK9Yqvfw=) Thank you so much, — Team Emily
* * *
**PREVIOUS EMAIL:** Peter — it’s official. Yesterday, with loved ones by my side, I was sworn in as a member of the 119th Congress from Washington’s 6th District. I have a lot to say, but I’ll do my best to keep this short: It’s the honor of my life to serve my neighbors and follow in the footsteps of hard-working public servants like Derek Kilmer and Norm Dicks – and like my hospital housekeeper grandma Della Trujillo Randall, like the teachers and civil servants and community leaders who are an example to all of us. Along with my colleagues in Congress, I’ll be tackling many of our country’s most immense challenges: bringing down household costs, strengthening workers’ rights, addressing the climate crisis, protecting our healthcare and safety net from cuts, and so much more. I recognize the responsibility and privilege of being the first — but definitely not the last! — queer Latina in Congress. As a working-class woman who was the first in my family to graduate from college, my hope is that my presence here sends the unmistakable message that ALL of us are welcome, ALL of us deserve respect, and ALL of us have a role to play in building a brighter future. Thank you, again, for everything you did to make this possible. I cannot thank you enough — and I feel ready for the challenges ahead because I know we’ll face them together. In service, Congresswoman Emily Randall

clean_body: We wanted to make sure you saw this note from ✨Congresswoman✨ Emily Randall. | If you no longer wish to hear from Emily Randall for Congress, you can sign up for or at any time. Peter, We wanted to make sure you saw this note from ✨Congresswoman✨ Emily Randall. It’s a bittersweet time. Last week, we swore in a new Congress. In a few days, Trump will return to the White House — and he’ll bring his crew of out-of-touch billionaires and dangerous extremists with him. So, Team Emily: We have two goals. First, we do everything in our power to fight the worst of the Trump administration. Second, we put ourselves in the best position to flip the House as soon as possible. = = Thank you so much, — Team Emily PREVIOUS EMAIL:** Peter — it’s official. Yesterday, with loved ones by my side, I was sworn in as a member of the 119th Congress from Washington’s 6th District. I have a lot to say, but I’ll do my best to keep this short: It’s the honor of my life to serve my neighbors and follow in the footsteps of hard-working public servants like Derek Kilmer and Norm Dicks – and like my hospital housekeeper grandma Della Trujillo Randall, like the teachers and civil servants and community leaders who are an example to all of us. Along with my colleagues in Congress, I’ll be tackling many of our country’s most immense challenges: bringing down household costs, strengthening workers’ rights, addressing the climate crisis, protecting our healthcare and safety net from cuts, and so much more. I recognize the responsibility and privilege of being the first — but definitely not the last! — queer Latina in Congress. As a working-class woman who was the first in my family to graduate from college, my hope is that my presence here sends the unmistakable message that ALL of us are welcome, ALL of us deserve respect, and ALL of us have a role to play in building a brighter future. Thank you, again, for everything you did to make this possible. I cannot thank you enough — and I feel ready for the challenges ahead because I know we’ll face them together. In service, Congresswoman Emily Randall = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. Box 1883 Port Orchard, WA 98366 United States | | If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . name: Rep. Brandon Gill
subject: I Took the Fight to CNN
body:
The interview Dems don’t want you to see

| | | | Fellow patriot, I stood my ground on CNN’s _The Lead with Jake Tapper_ to expose what they’ve been hiding about the communist Democrat’s radical agenda...
**And I didn’t hold back:**
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NkA/?__vbtrk=MjY5MDUzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MDUzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[CLICK HERE TO WATCH](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NkA/?__vbtrk=MjY5MDUzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MDUzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**The damage is undeniable.**
Our borders are wide open, millions of illegals have already flooded into our communities, and the American people have become an afterthought over the last four years.
Families across the country are feeling the consequences of this chaos.
**That’s why the American people rejected the Left’s destruction in November and demanded real leadership.**
Leaders like me who will stand with President Trump to secure the border, deport illegal immigrants, and deliver on the promise of the America First agenda.
And now, with the new Congress sworn in, _it’s time to act._
_I’m working with President Trump and the conservative majority in Congress to_ :
* Secure our borders and restore law and order.
* Deport dangerous criminals who have crossed into our country unchecked.
* Break the cycle of Washington’s endless spending.
* Put the needs of Americans above the Left’s radical woke agenda.

But make no mistake, **_the Democrats are furious._**
They’ll spend millions to attack me, President Trump, and anyone willing to fight for the people.
We can’t let them derail our momentum.
Now is the time to gear up, stand strong, and take our country back.
**So please watch my interview now and see why this fight is so critical.**
[WATCH NOW >>>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NkA/?__vbtrk=MjY5MDUzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MDUzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**_[And after you’ve watched, I hope you’ll join me by chipping in $10 or $25 to help us keep pushing forward](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NkA/?__vbtrk=MjY5MDUzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MDUzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**
Let’s finish what we started.
Thank you for standing strong,
| | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NkA/?__vbtrk=MjY5MDUzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MDUzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
_**Rep. Brandon Gill**_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NkA/?__vbtrk=MjY5MDUzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MDUzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NkB/?__vbtrk=MjY5MDUzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MDUzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NkC/?__vbtrk=MjY5MDUzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MDUzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

#

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: How we fixed Michigan’s DMVs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/5?t=1&akid=24%2E181023%2E6YxIsu)
The truth is, when I first took office, DMVs in Michigan were not working — and everyone knew it.
The DMV is one of those places that you don’t think about until you have to go there, and when you do, well, there’s a reason so many people dread the trip.
In 2018, Michigan’s DMVs were badly broken through years of neglect and lack of oversight. Residents regularly waited 3-5 hours for the simplest transactions. The DMV needed fixing, desperately, and I knew this couldn’t continue.
I got to work right away, visiting all 131 branch locations in my first 100 days to understand how our government could work better for you.
I showed up. I listened. I worked with everyone to find solutions.
When we were done, **every resident could get in and out of our branch offices in an average of 20 minutes or less -- that’s a huge improvement!**
This is the exact same energy that I’m going to bring to my continued work in 2025. Rolling up my sleeves, digging in, and making a change for everyday Michiganders is why I do what I do.
**[Can you support my work in 2025 by chipping in anything you can today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250108-1?refcode=em20250108-1&refcode2=24_181023_6YxIsu&akid=24%2E181023%2E6YxIsu)**
**[Contribute »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250108-1?refcode=em20250108-1&refcode2=24_181023_6YxIsu&akid=24%2E181023%2E6YxIsu)**
I’ll never lose sight of my belief that the government should work for everyone and that government officials should work just as hard as everyone else.
Onwards,
Jocelyn

* * *
Before you go... we need your help. Since her 2018 election, Secretary Benson has fought for free and fair elections. She’s on the front lines of defending and strengthening our democracy. **[Will you contribute today to show your support?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250108-1?refcode=em20250108-1&refcode2=24_181023_6YxIsu&akid=24%2E181023%2E6YxIsu)** **[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250108-1?refcode=em20250108-1&refcode2=24_181023_6YxIsu&akid=24%2E181023%2E6YxIsu)**
---

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=24%2E181023%2E6YxIsu)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_2024/?t=3&akid=24%2E181023%2E6YxIsu)

Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
PO BOX 21368,
Detroit, MI 48221
PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

name: Peter, Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: please, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Peter, I had to update you as soon as possible.

First, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] Democrats handed Mike Johnson the narrowest House majority in nearly 100 years .

Then, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] news broke that 3 Republican seats are headed to special elections.

Now, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] we have the chance to hand Republicans a major loss and get one step closer to taking back our Democratic Majority.

I’ll be frank, Peter: We have the chance to flip THREE seats from red to blue in these upcoming special elections. But, it’s going to take a MASSIVE wave of Democratic support to pull this off. That’s why I’m calling on 3,500 supporters to step up with $14 before midnight to help build an UNBEATABLE foundation of grassroots support, prove to everyone watching that we are a united front against Trump and his MAGA Republicans, and win historic victories in these special elections. Can I count on you to rush in $14? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Peter, we have a choice to make:

– We can either let our Democracy fall to Mike Johnson’s far-right agenda and be locked out of power for decades to come.

– Or we can step up, rush resources to Democrats running in these special elections, and take back our Majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

So please, Peter: Can I count on you to step up and chip in $14 before midnight to help Democrats compete in these special elections and stop Mike Johnson’s MAGA agenda in its tracks? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Chip in $14 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Chip in $50 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=50]
Chip in $100 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=100]
Or chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=25]

Thank you,

RajaRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The trial of my life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line...
It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line...
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtu6jAQhp_G3hHZ40tOFl6EQ9NKVasKVBW6M7ZTTG1ycUjg7SsoZTvzzfyffh3b4OuzQvkcAey8TQgAsRIBdJsp9sd9fH6cic95mHXyNYrLFv7f0BHu8MHo9Uu5ettwM08P3_S9_Th1I73jw7l1d_gWmrmofbhM8wW2itWWcOwUzZlkOeVU4p0CaWUtjCmk485ut8IBMCCWghOs3gL2CggIQsk_oEB5kQFhXBe1BioscYVBnFxzMh1d742maZh03zdNzEwTcVC7YWjTVaxCUE19kx2OJrhj-j0zTURQ3ZQRVCOCaihXOpV8uR8Rq66lsUWuO_G0nE5r3CvbTj4En2SOOPn6e4NHBT8BAAD__2oAbyk)

| [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kEGPmzAQhX-NuYHsGQfjA4dNKT20265aVdvtJXLtIXGLgRgIzb9fgVCu3_vk5zcmDK1v7iVTRwZw8W5kAAyfGMD1bQlx_hs-f0oPv49tes2_hsOawoddvcFD7qz59fz04-VN2uP48Z_4Obz-v97EQ5_uAz3kvTSjYHy7UlUlrsTGcZlQKRTmqIQUeXIpOZqCG4tNrnItG0nK5fKPtFg4LaXmiS-Bw4ELXoAAIXUGHKXRjQFxcJy0ZZJvPZkJFL01YpwWE2Pfh8z2IWnLyzQN4_axmkE9kp0jZYvvIrnVYFDH2d3Ts59bbzqfNpHI9SFt5s6lShs0rjEMahISlS6QuLaFBrm-h_U8hZM1YTD-3DGsgIPkgiODfE0COT8HhtV-ig1OFFe0RLGDsZ-jJYbV99fTcWe27ybqJobVty_PL6cklm5YfNv6MVdM8vM2eR14K-E9AAD__6VdlAg)
---
My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Patriot.
---
**_In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault – not just on my freedom – but on the freedom of every patriotic American.
---
The Democrats’ Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president.
---
And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of _everything_ I own.
---
But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home...
---
No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life.
---

clean_body: It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line... It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line... | My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Patriot. In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the final chance to save my home. To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault – not just on my freedom – but on the freedom of every patriotic American. The Democrats’ Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president. And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own. But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home... No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life. In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with “ IMPRISONMENT! ” But no matter what it costs me, I will never surrender this fight for my freedom and justice. And it’s the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting. I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala’s disastrous policies. And if that’s your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high. But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I’ve never needed your help more than right now. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

**(1)_Incoming message from President Trump:_**
Happy New Year Friend!
I want to take a moment to thank you for standing by my side during last year’s campaign. Your support, your prayers, and your unwavering belief in our movement made all the difference.
Over the past year, we’ve been on an incredible journey together.
The deep state attacked the MAGA movement in ways this country has never seen before during a Presidential Election—but guess what? In the end, _we came out victorious._

[READ MY 2024 RECAP](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxUkcFunDAQhp_G3EB4vGA4cNiERWoVRWobKWkvyNjjxaltXDC7zdtXoM1Kvf7-xv4_j3DBGv3REP5AAEajFgJA2JEAHL_B648XPCFPH642T8UJvz5vp_B4Qy9wh70UXh2lffoz0oW-vn1Rf38-Xegdjx8B7_Dt0QydMHZLeZuoBmQFUibYUM5KxinndTI2dS4KWnLNJK0OtVR5LZguikIPijExDIlpIIcip3kFFGrGs3wQRSErivoABSIlh_xqfKYmL6x6j_PqQiYnl9hmjDEse6WOQLegXGfMrsbPqDaCQLfTqRfRbNOpnJwzMSKm71oS6GxIR53uGumM2qLcwCW9UMK6NbreoTKrI6y9qZZbuEzrLJGw1obehn7Ut1wKF4Q5e8LaT6U-etn_f3M_6l7tvXobPicnH9FHwtrNMiKBsvfWKMLayKrz8ILffz3v4b5h1vo3_P04n1iRzI0KV2OtWUpODvl567l_z6WBfwEAAP__BkasiA)
They removed me from the ballot in Colorado.
They tried to keep me off the campaign trail for months by dragging me into court. I’ll never forget how freezing that courtroom was in New York.
And still, we won a landslide Republican primary victory on Super Tuesday. That was easy!
They thought they could scare me by threatening my assets, including Trump Tower. That didn’t work!
They convicted me of 34 bogus felony counts to keep me out of the White House. But guess what? It backfired. We surged in the polls and had one of the biggest fundraising days in history!
Then, there was that horrendous debate with Biden. HORRENDOUS! The Democrats kicked him out of the race and replaced him with Comrade Kamala.
There were TWO ASSASSINATION ATTEMPTS on my life. FIGHT FIGHT FIGHT! I have never felt more love in my life from people like you. THANK YOU!
By the grace of God, I was spared. God has a plan for me to Save America, and now here we are days from my inauguration as the 47th President of the United States.
But the WITCH HUNTS aren’t over yet. My final reflection is that these WITCH HUNTS will never end, but with you by my side, we will never stop winning!
Now, I’M BEING SENTENCED ON FRIDAY.
**Before I’m sentenced in court, I need your help ASAP.**
**[STAND WITH TRUMP right here right now - ONE MORE TIME - by signing my petition to DROP ALL CHARGES.>](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxUkdFu2yAUhp8G3xGZgx3sC1-kcaxtqiZNm9b2ClE4rukAMxsny9tPttJIvf35DvwfR_nobH9tiHggAIM1MwEg_EAADj_g6ecvPKGgDxeXU3XCb9_XUzje0DPc4aBVMAftHv8ObGZPz1_Nv5fHM7vj6RrxDt8e3aFX1q2paDPTgK5A6wwbJvieCyZEnQ1N3msBCuqqYgWvQVdFUWH9Wms0ouRKZLaBHMqc5RUwqLnY5a-qLHXFsC-gRGSkyC827MwYlDPvaVp83OnRZ64ZUorzVqkj0M2olwl3FxsmNCtBoNtoGlSy6zTVo_c2JUT63msCnYt06OmmQSfsHeoVnOmZEd4tyUuPxi6e8Pamul_DeVwmjYS3LkoX5dDfcq18VPYtEN5-KMkUtPx8sxx6abZe0sWPyTEkDInwdrVMSGAvg7OG8Pa0hC_Xl3L5fdzCbcO8Dc_45zideJlNjYkX65yd94IU-dvac_uecwP_AwAA__9r6aw7)**

name: John Fetterman
subject: I was *seriously* upset about this vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Now that Republicans are gaining control of the NLRB, working folks in PA + across the country are gonna be a lot worse off over the next two years.
#
Derek, I've made clear since day one that the whole reason I got into public service was to serve working folks in all 67 PA counties.
**I’ve fought for labor my entire career, and that’s why I was *seriously* upset about this vote: 😤**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250108?refcode=em20250108-9771&refcode2=9771_434096_8mRrWb&akid=9771%2E434096%2E8mRrWb)
Now that Republicans are gaining control of the NLRB, working folks in PA + across the country are gonna be a lot worse off over the next two years.
I voted to confirm President Biden’s nominees because **I’ll always fight for union families.** Even and *especially* with Trump heading back to the White House.
But with Republicans pouring money into PA to flip it red last year, we know what we’re up against. I’m counting on yinz + youse to help me keep standing strong.
[**Will you chip in $5 or whatever makes sense to support my campaign today? Every little bit adds up to help us keep this seat 🔵.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250108?refcode=em20250108-9771&refcode2=9771_434096_8mRrWb&akid=9771%2E434096%2E8mRrWb)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250108?amount=5&refcode=em20250108-9771&refcode2=9771_434096_8mRrWb&akid=9771%2E434096%2E8mRrWb)**
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250108-9771-footer&t=1&refcode2=9771_434096_8mRrWb&akid=9771%2E434096%2E8mRrWb)**

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: my reflections from Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
As the representative for a tossup district, I always had the opportunity and responsibility to listen to the perspectives of Virginians with differing views on how we tackle the challenges we face.

| Peter,

Last week, I officially ended my six years in Congress and sat down with _The New York Times_ to reflect on my time as the Representative for Virginia’s Seventh District. I’ve been honored to serve as a voice for them in Congress.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100073504/521673708/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWJjMDBlOTYtMGFjZS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=volJoO7jJ3sBUcbC6vlNcgFUgo5hXtxhBs-TCmyXav0=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100073505/521673709/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWJjMDBlOTYtMGFjZS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=volJoO7jJ3sBUcbC6vlNcgFUgo5hXtxhBs-TCmyXav0=)
While there are many lessons I learned throughout the years, there is one I wanted to share with you on how I approached representing a battleground district and one that I will take with me as Governor of Virginia.

**As the representative for a tossup district, I always had the opportunity and responsibility to listen to the perspectives of Virginians with differing views on how we tackle the challenges we face.**

So, even when I was sure I knew how I was going to vote or what policy I was going to support, I have always tried to understand why someone might vote differently or oppose the same legislation. _**Why? Because I knew that, as a leader, I would need to explain and defend my decisions to those who didn’t agree with me. The people I represented deserved that accountability.**_

My approach has always required me to listen closely, see issues from every angle, and approach problems with a broader perspective. As the next Governor of Virginia, I will continue to embrace this approach—listening to all sides, weighing the options, and always putting the needs of Virginians first.

**But I can’t do this alone. Your support is essential to making sure we can bring commonsense leadership back to the Governor's office and tackle the challenges our Commonwealth faces.[_So, will you join me in this effort by making a contribution today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100073506/521673710/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWJjMDBlOTYtMGFjZS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=volJoO7jJ3sBUcbC6vlNcgFUgo5hXtxhBs-TCmyXav0=)**

Tonight, the future of Bill Evans Field is at stake. This greenspace has been a cornerstone of our community for over 50 years—home to legends like MLB great Marquis Grissom and a hub for youth sports and development.

But now, it’s under threat; again. Some on our city council are pushing to turn this historic space into high-rise apartments, despite better alternatives just blocks away.

On December 18th, BIDA failed to extend the developer’s contract, signaling that this sale may not be inevitable. But tonight’s meeting could reopen negotiations, putting our greenspace at risk once again.

**We need you to show up and stand with the community.**
📅 **When:** Wednesday, January 8, 2025 ⏰ **Time:** 6:30 PM 📍 **Where:** Georgia International Convention Center (GICC), College Park
|
---
| | Join the conversation on Speak Up College Park! | | | | [ Speak Up! ](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTQyOTk3NzEyODYyNzA4Nzg0LFwiclwiOjE0Mjk5NzcyNDA3ODI3ODMyMn0iLCJzIjoiYjRhOTA1NDY1ZjRkZmY2ZSJ9)

This is our chance to secure a better future for College Park—but it won’t happen without your support.
**Here’s how you can help:** 1\. **Attend tonight’s meeting:** Your presence matters. 2\. **Spread the word:** Share this email with neighbors and friends.
Together, we can ensure Bill Evans Field remains a vital part of our community. Let’s make our voices heard!
