name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Protect our rights before Trump’s second term:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Biden can protect women and LGBTQ+ people before he leaves the White House. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWUAfPX-UhoodOa-iwrNK1sB7u7VwSDSlr-vHzlE2-HsIxCxkzxIODOB-6Ht2JU-sdcJyTVHIJW-u4_QaOHN-lxQ23hXtdPkoYxiJ_dlcErB5_o997sEp8He_U8ARaeabP4aUJ4so0JOb4OYuohdA9Bhd0YG7LH0MVs1j3CU_q5fy7trq9b7L4eXsQHA7V-UFK/4cz/2RkwAHOTTC-cLfz37PPkQg/h0/h001.-S5aiR7-pfKtS4DaFysTVtIdNJbSCsEnqV9P_3ypodE)
---
Friend, Joe Biden is still president until January 20, and in his final weeks he has the power to publish the Equal Rights Amendment to the Constitution, which is one of our best tools to **protect women and LGBTQ+ people from Trump and Republican attacks**. This simple amendment proclaims that: _“Equality of rights under the law shall not be denied or abridged by the United States or by any state on account of sex.”_ If officially part of the Constitution, this 28th Amendment would help eliminate the gender pay gap and fight back against other discrimination based on sex, gender identity, and sexuality—including **protecting access to abortion, birth control, and gender-affirming healthcare.** At the state level, Equal Rights Amendments to state constitutions have successfully established a legal basis for protecting reproductive rights. **We urgently need this at the federal level before Trump occupies the White House again** and follows through on his promises to ban abortion and attack queer and trans people, women, sexual assault survivors, and more marginalized people. [**Please sign the petition to demand President Biden certify and publish the Equal Rights Amendment before he leaves the White House later this month.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38bacrXqz-CH_FIlv0-54amMMH6jRAbDa2EaVhLmyFMpsiTk08mLvlULo8mbgKpm5DJm6gMkcETu9i9a72_3wuUnI42ULFe6Fy_Di2OY65Qe8eSIeYupHLzGiMtTeTluIJDSbw-Yf4YoKiExhjeD45iKBUV8-y9Wk1dk-HyGZjao826FP8uCUzkF1ciE7Oxa4ZRAVyOgvdyQN9YrpdvQE3pdq5ZpBIx_ZwYDd9HsWeU9XYaHnfzSnjih9LK4vk5DDt-Wgx2MOVU8wC96l50TF7MBOcKtSVW22IpAFMbvMvqsHw8XCI1IswpTaS7TDFzAFlKlU51wMP__u6aJRiHClpVQotdnnuDbDg5Y8rV985fww/4cz/2RkwAHOTTC-cLfz37PPkQg/h1/h001.mk8mklEFfDkgaJlXfUd37UDTgCNMWUliloTEhOzL8WI) Last month, I joined more than 120 of my colleagues in the U.S. House of Representatives who sent a letter urging the president to publish the Equal Rights Amendment. Thousands of activists around the country have also taken action in the past month to demand this key tool to save lives and protect women, LGBTQ+ people, sexual assault survivors, abortion rights, Black maternal health, workers’ rights, our bodily autonomy, and more. Feminists have fought for this for over 100 years, and it’s past time for all of us to be written directly into the U.S. Constitution. Fortunately, the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) has met the threshold for its ratification, with approval from 38 states and passage by 2/3 of Congress. Now all we need is President Biden to act by directing the U.S. Archivist to certify and publish the ERA now. [**Add your name to ask President Biden to publish the Equal Rights Amendment now, in order to protect our rights and freedoms before Trump’s second term.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38bacrXqz-CH_FIlv0-54amMMH6jRAbDa2EaVhLmyFMpsiTk08mLvlULo8mbgKpm5DJm6gMkcETu9i9a72_3wuUnI42ULFe6Fy_Di2OY65Qe5HlZGp5Axm5Akbn7V87sgqvfYACdofQTIe420L4g1RN3ckMRgsVXICxqN7RhRNv9d4WAz3-p-vb4cmNaLef-YytzfaQDM0J2nTizbhIm4KQ097Bss7Uvr4Djp-0Cnm4T_lHZfngDAzHXgDf6TE84pjk019L8y_0QxXkwrcgCrcCob5MAMBBIpXNeNU1GkGKdwxDrVe9rvhvfy66zE9grY19g80oGt1VSrgnKmeIpjANCca-MiNOwsZeFBCQnDeZmw/4cz/2RkwAHOTTC-cLfz37PPkQg/h2/h001.6G2saahYFQgRRq-rjD6IOvIy-KtvTuCrq-TGcFehvqE) Thank you for continuing to take action for equity and justice for all. We’ll continue pushing together. In solidarity, Rashida P.S. This coming weekend, activists are planning banner drops in their communities in support of the Equal Rights Amendment. You can find out more and sign up [here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRzYCVuTTIlAmBt_sSycOSgBtG8UMtrxQeyNITCWR9nQZjyWylCNhu5KKZpYpvi1tZN22JhIIgLfnY8T_5VlVVByJQM3a1baz5mZTQ21XwCM_CVGzE9jK2UON7a4y6egeNgCFTE8Z9L-6-BdN0vLvvwwsUFpmM9h8VOpjI6mcvA6LKeMH8hxXdEUo5aijCEr__4k5acatG6qT9fGd82_uM0g3wWXmRFZ1G94H_gBAJQrVFidQBSWXiof_TmB7qoQV7jl1F096PsXfp-GTAq_76FeMr7bEpkNPwMzbI0WMudccD0xpKPOo__u5MACkpwhggcWxtWnyxBcD5V2GyQdWuA/4cz/2RkwAHOTTC-cLfz37PPkQg/h3/h001.OZ9tTyweJXpwQcfA6fNkFSMNCb931dmc3sYhhQREnBY). clean_body: Biden can protect women and LGBTQ+ people before he leaves the White House. | | | Friend, Joe Biden is still president until January 20, and in his final weeks he has the power to publish the Equal Rights Amendment to the Constitution, which is one of our best tools to protect women and LGBTQ+ people from Trump and Republican attacks. This simple amendment proclaims that: “Equality of rights under the law shall not be denied or abridged by the United States or by any state on account of sex.” If officially part of the Constitution, this 28th Amendment would help eliminate the gender pay gap and fight back against other discrimination based on sex, gender identity, and sexuality—including protecting access to abortion, birth control, and gender-affirming healthcare. At the state level, Equal Rights Amendments to state constitutions have successfully established a legal basis for protecting reproductive rights. We urgently need this at the federal level before Trump occupies the White House again and follows through on his promises to ban abortion and attack queer and trans people, women, sexual assault survivors, and more marginalized people. Last month, I joined more than 120 of my colleagues in the U.S. House of Representatives who sent a letter urging the president to publish the Equal Rights Amendment. Thousands of activists around the country have also taken action in the past month to demand this key tool to save lives and protect women, LGBTQ+ people, sexual assault survivors, abortion rights, Black maternal health, workers’ rights, our bodily autonomy, and more. Feminists have fought for this for over 100 years, and it’s past time for all of us to be written directly into the U.S. Constitution. Fortunately, the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) has met the threshold for its ratification, with approval from 38 states and passage by 2/3 of Congress. Now all we need is President Biden to act by directing the U.S. Archivist to certify and publish the ERA now. Thank you for continuing to take action for equity and justice for all. We’ll continue pushing together. In solidarity, Rashida P.S. This coming weekend, activists are planning banner drops in their communities in support of the Equal Rights Amendment. You can find out more and sign up . Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Donald Trump has not even been sworn into office yet and already we're out here dealing with his threats against... landmasses and water body names.
Trump has been leaning into the role "Chief Troll" by inciting threats against the sovereignty of[ Canada](https://substack.com/redirect/c5f8d5b7-1613-4cae-a97f-6b1c19f25711?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Greenland](https://substack.com/redirect/c03c39a2-139c-49ac-a9a3-07f7c63e3a29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [Panama](https://substack.com/redirect/2d8c7d1f-dfbe-4fd4-9bf1-c2360f3e4bba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (all US-allied nations). His newest bit is to threaten to rename the Gulf of Mexico to the "Gulf of America."
It's rage bait at the executive level, meant to get people talking about him and fighting with each other.
As a geographer, I find it particularly unnerving, and triggering my insatiable need to correct public conspiracies and falsities about my field.
Instead of fighting with strangers online, let's take a look at how the Gulf of Mexico got its name, and what the process would hypothetically be in order to "change" it.
### Etymology of "Mexico"
The name "Mexico" comes from the Nahuatl language of the Aztec and predates European colonization by several hundred years...

body:
Help us fight back against MAGA-extremists |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100073922/521675323/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250108_f_2025Leg_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjAzOWZmYS0wYmNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OzKGgzVRKYL6bdcRV5qnYmcRtt-rWJs6A7mYi3POwJ0=&emci=833a77fe-efcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=2f039ffa-0bce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=1037277)

| | Georgia’s legislative session will start next Monday, January 13 — and we’re on high alert for anti-voter extremists making any attempt to suppress our votes. **We’re not backing down.** Fair Fight Action is mobilizing activists to counteract the expected harmful actions that will come from these extremists, and advocate for legislation that will protect our elections and our rights. [**Can you chip in today to help Fair Fight Action stop future legislative attacks on the freedom to vote?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100073925/521675326/11955565?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250108_f_2025Leg_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjAzOWZmYS0wYmNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OzKGgzVRKYL6bdcRV5qnYmcRtt-rWJs6A7mYi3POwJ0=) With Project 2025 threatening our federal government and rights, this year’s legislative session could see bills that further marginalize the voices and rights of our fellow Georgians. Voter suppression is already a major issue here in Georgia, and further attacks on our rights could prevent people from using their voice in future elections. In case you need a reminder, last year the MAGA-led legislature pushed through SB 189, which made mass voter challenges — a tactic used to disenfranchise Black and brown voters, seniors, students, rural voters, and Georgia's unhoused population — even easier. Fair Fight Action is ready to take on new challenges — but we’ll need your support in the face of mounting threats. clean_body: Help us fight back against MAGA-extremists | | | Georgia’s legislative session will start next Monday, January 13 — and we’re on high alert for anti-voter extremists making any attempt to suppress our votes. We’re not backing down. Fair Fight Action is mobilizing activists to counteract the expected harmful actions that will come from these extremists, and advocate for legislation that will protect our elections and our rights. = With Project 2025 threatening our federal government and rights, this year’s legislative session could see bills that further marginalize the voices and rights of our fellow Georgians. Voter suppression is already a major issue here in Georgia, and further attacks on our rights could prevent people from using their voice in future elections. In case you need a reminder, last year the MAGA-led legislature pushed through SB 189, which made mass voter challenges — a tactic used to disenfranchise Black and brown voters, seniors, students, rural voters, and Georgia's unhoused population — even easier. Fair Fight Action is ready to take on new challenges — but we’ll need your support in the face of mounting threats. = | = We’re keeping a close eye on this year’s session, tracking any proposed bills that could harm our community, because too much is at stake. name: DNC HQ
subject: A new Democratic Party chair:
body:
---
Derek, In just a few weeks, we’ll elect a new Democratic Party chair and leadership team. [**As one of our Party’s top supporters, your input in this moment is extremely valuable. Click here to share your thoughts on what issues are important to you in the DNC chair race.**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/democratic-party-chair-survey/?refcode=em_20250108_2518_so&t=1&akid=2520%2E22930333%2ECMkQbT) It’s no secret that we’ve got a lot of work ahead of us: Preventing the worst impulses of a second Trump administration and an emboldened Republican Party from becoming our reality. Continuing to invest in our Party’s infrastructure — organizing, volunteering, recruitment, training, and much more — the infrastructure that will help Democrats win in 2025. And set us up to take back Congress in 2026, and the White House in 2028. **The next DNC chair will play a huge role in driving those efforts forward.** That work is not going to be easy, Derek. So no matter who our next Democratic Party chair is, they’re going to need all of us to stay involved and committed to helping elect Democrats everywhere. That starts now. [**That’s why, if you have a few minutes, we’d love to get your feedback on what issues are important to you as we elect new Democratic Party leadership. Will you take our brief survey now?**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/democratic-party-chair-survey/?refcode=em_20250108_2518_so&t=2&akid=2520%2E22930333%2ECMkQbT) Thank you, The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Making history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=ylqrHWoh%2FkGK4D4Ka9mbiMYNE%2FsCjNJT4R9WMtOvjHe%2FttopUbOIYTLF2rKpF8B%2BTcVHqeHL0JdpNCMDyddIbFe7Z%2FNigkcw1U8gfQQ0JGLGhM6D573zAArqE45bZaqfnHsGJBLkn3YP5wFz3t9cV%2FTGs5inxoippQpjuoOfSrMnyQWkmyn0PEOcIMTrpEtOmPj%2FzvP%2FIKoH9lJKu9towcf192aw2E2c4bgSF6JwX93AHKA5I9qHR1m660dES17M1DuGr2SR7qmlEHjZVp0qStaILx30xYuUJmRR4mBUKgXlae0aDFmsmKoDuMQybRo5MetF6WqEl%2Bvko3a9fYMALuHqp7xSpG4i8lpbdSgrYqiDhhGdSSrOXaT0tDYV5fC525eOBkFOsyOQeo84wbO5N4a6MjTonQsRZeFNV7kTyl0%3D)
---
| |
---
Saludos, Just last week, I had the great honor of being sworn in for my second term in the U.S. House of Representatives. Serving the people of New Mexico’s 2nd has been the honor of a lifetime, and I couldn’t be more proud and grateful for the incredible work we’ve accomplished during these past two years. When we won in 2022, we made history by flipping this district blue on the promise of common-sense, bipartisan solutions for the people of New Mexico and Americans across the country. In November, we made history once more — holding NM-02 blue for two consecutive terms for the first time in four decades. And I couldn’t have done it without you. And now, as we begin the 119th Congress, I’m more determined than ever to continue our fight for progress. Whether working to lower costs, create good-paying jobs or secure resources for our rural and urban communities, I’m ready to fight for real solutions that make a difference in people’s lives — but I need to know that you’re with me. As we prepare for a Republican trifecta in Washington, laying the groundwork now will determine our ability to fend off MAGA attacks and defend our shared values. clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Saludos, Just last week, I had the great honor of being sworn in for my second term in the U.S. House of Representatives. Serving the people of New Mexico’s 2nd has been the honor of a lifetime, and I couldn’t be more proud and grateful for the incredible work we’ve accomplished during these past two years. When we won in 2022, we made history by flipping this district blue on the promise of common-sense, bipartisan solutions for the people of New Mexico and Americans across the country. In November, we made history once more — holding NM-02 blue for two consecutive terms for the first time in four decades. And I couldn’t have done it without you. And now, as we begin the 119th Congress, I’m more determined than ever to continue our fight for progress. Whether working to lower costs, create good-paying jobs or secure resources for our rural and urban communities, I’m ready to fight for real solutions that make a difference in people’s lives — but I need to know that you’re with me. As we prepare for a Republican trifecta in Washington, laying the groundwork now will determine our ability to fend off MAGA attacks and defend our shared values. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with me. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Who has 220 members and can’t agree on one simple thing? If you guessed the Republican House majority... you’d be correct! Peter, Republican Mike Johnson was forced to cut a back-room deal with members of his own party in order to secure his Speakership. Your guess is as good as mine as to what (or who!) he sold out to secure their votes. This is only a glimpse of what a Republican House majority will look like for the next two years. name: VoteVets.org
subject: NATO & Peace
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Denmark, which Greenland is a part of, is one of the original member states of NATO — the greatest force for peace in generations.
#
Peter —
Something we’re all going to have to do over the next four years is get better at parsing the noise from the substance, and responding to what really matters. Case in point: Trump’s threatening posture towards Greenland, the Panama Canal, and Canada.
For now, this is all just bluster. But even if it never moves to action it has consequences.
Denmark, which Greenland is a part of, is one of the original member states of NATO — the greatest force for peace in generations. Trump and his buddies in Moscow want people to think that NATO is pushing the world to the brink of conflict. But NATO’s first and most important objective is peace, and it maintains that peace through an iron-clad alliance: If one member state is attacked, every member state comes to their assistance.
For 75 years, NATO has kept the peace.
But now, Trump is openly threatening a NATO ally with Military aggression. It’s a far cry from the isolationist posture Trump took during his campaign, and this aggressive stance against Panama, Denmark, and Canada is already causing some of our oldest and most loyal allies to look at America not as a partner, but as a potential adversary.
We don’t know yet if these threats will be followed by action. But if they are, or if it even looks like they will be, we need to be ready. Never forget that — even in the opposition — we have agency, strength, and capability. It’s going to take a hell of a lot of organizing to stand against this administration, but we are up to the challenge.
And as we prepare for Trump’s inauguration and everything that comes after, we’re asking for your commitment to help us enter his second term in fighting shape.
[**Please, if you can afford to make a donation to VoteVets, chip in $5 or whatever you can afford right away. It adds up fast when everyone’s donating together.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.34Pqeh&refcode=em250108-1-120&t=1&akid=34068%2E3013755%2ECSDpNq)**

body:
Congress MUST PROTECT WOMEN'S SPORTS
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=47b4d4fe39df4f80a128ccd5e32e2dbf&_e=oGOhlqryt0oPGiR2GhgH09jLppFl0fRDD4rifcpPUJlIJP4RhFvn-AFNe_cm0_8j-cgqyhLg17VXU2LpiL2_Gd5IpnmYzGVkXdEEeVWoQE5wU14QmQBS0zDQ98vyHmCnnFC0TljTQnCr-rj6aCJuRiWpZf_RwIRR1xG-zAbJY0drC88SBBPXIpUxv7WxbptWUa77BEJ6HOwVWBWQMEepvsLBVx_mHyqi9C8Qa6pXYNpozCQfRgBRsoeg1yGlxUYJjqRuR36MSSi0GAz8rIasnukQDIYXCdCFwjkbThJD5EI12Ym-2Ow0xmN__-BbP4FuaT-MOCBr9CYP5vp81YIxIA%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

As a career-long College Football coach, I know all too well the importance of fair play in men's and women's sports.

_It 's obvious to anyone with two eyes - a biological male in women's sports compromises both the integrity of competition and the safety of athletes._

**That 's why I introduced the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act in the Senate.

It's time to BAN Trans athletes from competing in women's sports, and it's time for Congress to OFFICIALLY PROTECT our women and girls.**

The Radical Left is SURE to call me transphobic while putting every roadblock imaginable in our way. I need your help.

| [ **PASS THE PROTECTION OF WOMEN AND GIRLS IN SPORTS ACT** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=47b4d4fe39df4f80a128ccd5e32e2dbf&_e=oGOhlqryt0oPGiR2GhgH09jLppFl0fRDD4rifcpPUJlIJP4RhFvn-AFNe_cm0_8j-cgqyhLg17VXU2LpiL2_Gd5IpnmYzGVkXdEEeVWoQE5wU14QmQBS0zDQ98vyHmCnnFC0TljTQnCr-rj6aCJuRiWpZf_RwIRR1xG-zAbJY0drC88SBBPXIpUxv7WxbptWM6yURlVobslyooGSTiwFZJF55MJrr43HjUbboApo6s-so3VNvUVY6JCqFx6AvFvc8bcR6HJE57wC8TDGbvGARqSRGKsc6-T1LacoNReexChlndN9mBhgzTi4w67-JHjXXgD2BPxJv1SSpjZJ2-Cirw%3D%3D)
---

**I need 50 Patriots to stand with me by midnight so we can show Congress that we have grassroots support behind this bill.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=47b4d4fe39df4f80a128ccd5e32e2dbf&_e=oGOhlqryt0oPGiR2GhgH09jLppFl0fRDD4rifcpPUJlIJP4RhFvn-AFNe_cm0_8j-cgqyhLg17VXU2LpiL2_Gd5IpnmYzGVkXdEEeVWoQE5wU14QmQBS0zDQ98vyHmCnnFC0TljTQnCr-rj6aCJuRiWpZf_RwIRR1xG-zAbJY0drC88SBBPXIpUxv7WxbptWnJYmQNd2jyQ5AT5YKAz9rZ41Tig7z0pfRjwo0sWTGczWvtMn1fsTuoz6Chw53px4ooXIL1Jul3yXw3WBDXzoCa7qlgTwS7LH9hmQ7fKVBGHWmgm2ScRwzmrTEAPuv8-UaLuVSeOzoSsDIx-tuNkEPw%3D%3D)

There's no "I" in "team." It's going to take all of us to get this through the Senate.

[**I 'm humbly asking you to join our team in supporting and protecting women's sports by chipping in $15 before midnight.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=47b4d4fe39df4f80a128ccd5e32e2dbf&_e=oGOhlqryt0oPGiR2GhgH09jLppFl0fRDD4rifcpPUJlIJP4RhFvn-AFNe_cm0_8j-cgqyhLg17VXU2LpiL2_Gd5IpnmYzGVkXdEEeVWoQE5wU14QmQBS0zDQ98vyHmCnnFC0TljTQnCr-rj6aCJuRiWpZf_RwIRR1xG-zAbJY0drC88SBBPXIpUxv7WxbptWt8lEiEfJfxNekzYv3vghrrcWzo6xcqbIrWdNNpDXqGgHhm1s5yTzpLcsd4R694LzRs6IzeZSAxEZx12ZpdpZJ47I7mA6dtgqL_uchPEpO71Hg5-g1813zV-hBCeMnVaqGxIiymuXs7eRFPQTIRaIqQ%3D%3D)

Coach Tuberville

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=47b4d4fe39df4f80a128ccd5e32e2dbf&_e=oGOhlqryt0oPGiR2GhgH09jLppFl0fRDD4rifcpPUJlIJP4RhFvn-AFNe_cm0_8j-cgqyhLg17VXU2LpiL2_Gd5IpnmYzGVkXdEEeVWoQE5wU14QmQBS0zDQ98vyHmCnnFC0TljTQnCr-rj6aCJuRiWpZf_RwIRR1xG-zAbJY0drC88SBBPXIpUxv7WxbptW-UDZ3fNCl3D30ZX2gPNcxUAz1vx399lhAdXTWutuUPmFKDVXvonz3DJjMWImLLw7y0lzSBOC8-7EE-kMyxcG9Dt9DwLJ5BOi22ZAz3rnWVHhSKBpQEgCAQBl6UdXFJjggMpCcJnlSDPMI2PLmX5Udw%3D%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=47b4d4fe39df4f80a128ccd5e32e2dbf&_e=oGOhlqryt0oPGiR2GhgH09jLppFl0fRDD4rifcpPUJlIJP4RhFvn-AFNe_cm0_8j-cgqyhLg17VXU2LpiL2_Gd5IpnmYzGVkXdEEeVWoQE5wU14QmQBS0zDQ98vyHmCnnFC0TljTQnCr-rj6aCJuRiWpZf_RwIRR1xG-zAbJY0drC88SBBPXIpUxv7WxbptWXrQAyojSL6BtB-rVq2cXgVPJEij7t7Bkh1v-CwS_ADof28eT1QZv-11GiSULj29UCektg_PdC50tEVU9miXt-sR85iWGwdz09sbUWdekqJ4cMOdbwZvdi43dOn3baG4AvdkOpmfXzo4feR2MImp8vg%3D%3D)

name: JanePAC
subject: Here’s how you can support Southern California residents impacted by wildfires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100075103/521679357/1328794144?refcode=ea.0a3d1c1f-11ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.0a3d1c1f-11ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhM2QxYzFmLTExY2UtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cbtBKik9OJqo6pcZvl29N1QttZx0TlU9ylBqs4OPNxc=&emci=5584804c-05ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=0a3d1c1f-11ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)
---
Our hearts are with everyone impacted by the devastating wildfires in Southern California. We know this unprecedented devastation is creating hardship for countless residents across the region. For those facing the pain of displacement or loss, please know that we are holding you close in our thoughts — and we are committed to supporting you however we can. Right now, the focus is on safety and recovery.
* **Share Critical Resources:** If you know someone in the evacuation zone, share these tools to help:
* **Sign up for emergency alerts and stay updated on evacuation zones at _[lacounty.gov/emergency](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100075104/521679358/1740817045?refcode=ea.0a3d1c1f-11ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.0a3d1c1f-11ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhM2QxYzFmLTExY2UtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cbtBKik9OJqo6pcZvl29N1QttZx0TlU9ylBqs4OPNxc=&emci=5584804c-05ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=0a3d1c1f-11ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)_.**
* **For real-time updates on fire conditions, visit the _[LA Fire Department](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100075105/521679359/237875965?refcode=ea.0a3d1c1f-11ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.0a3d1c1f-11ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhM2QxYzFmLTExY2UtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cbtBKik9OJqo6pcZvl29N1QttZx0TlU9ylBqs4OPNxc=&emci=5584804c-05ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=0a3d1c1f-11ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)_.**

For those outside the immediate danger zone, this is a moment to come together and lend a hand. As the situation evolves, more and more families are going to need support to rebuild. If you’re not impacted by the fires and are able to help:
* **Support Relief Efforts:** Donate to trusted organizations providing direct aid, such as the **_[California Community Foundation’s Wildfire Relief Fund](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100075106/521679360/2062947115?refcode=ea.0a3d1c1f-11ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.0a3d1c1f-11ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhM2QxYzFmLTExY2UtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cbtBKik9OJqo6pcZvl29N1QttZx0TlU9ylBqs4OPNxc=&emci=5584804c-05ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=0a3d1c1f-11ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)_** or the **_[American Red Cross](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100075107/521679361/667048703?refcode=ea.0a3d1c1f-11ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.0a3d1c1f-11ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhM2QxYzFmLTExY2UtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cbtBKik9OJqo6pcZvl29N1QttZx0TlU9ylBqs4OPNxc=&emci=5584804c-05ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=0a3d1c1f-11ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)_.**

In moments like these, we’re reminded of the strength and resilience of Southern California’s communities. Firefighters, emergency responders, and neighbors are stepping up for one another — showing the power of collective action and care. Together, we can help these communities rebuild stronger. Thank you, Team JanePAC

CNN republican panelist Scott Jennings **[struck a nerve during a tense debate](https://substack.com/redirect/dc38a370-df44-41b0-a68f-b4b440f4bb04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on inflation, prompting the show's host to end the segment immediately.
"Stop talking!!" she told Jennings.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/dc38a370-df44-41b0-a68f-b4b440f4bb04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The CNN host claimed inflation has been decreasing recently under what is still Joe Biden's economy.
"Are prices gone down or not?!" Jennings asked with strong doubt. "Just to be clear, no, they're not!"
The host fired back, "It is decreasing in rate which is the entire goal!"
Inflation rates have risen for 2 consecutive months in October 2024 and November 2024, according to **[the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics.](https://substack.com/redirect/126c1c72-a85c-45a1-af43-830fce400ebf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** This after a gradual decline from an astronomical inflation rate spike in the first years of the Biden administration.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9783325e-ce4b-42c2-aca8-5cfcc1e34e53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Jennings continued to protest, repeating that prices have been going back up in recent months, which is true.
"Zip it!" The host snapped, "stop talking!"
**[Watch the fiery moment here:](https://substack.com/redirect/dc38a370-df44-41b0-a68f-b4b440f4bb04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

It's high-quality, made in the USA, none of that imported nonsense from India or China. They even handle the prescription for you and ship it straight to your door.
Don't sit back and wait for the system to decide what you can and can't have. And it's not just ivermectin, **[All Family Pharmacy offers over 200 medications.](https://substack.com/redirect/63ff88e9-8a37-4c1f-bb76-c8569fd0d932?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Whether you need ivermectin or something else, they've got you covered.
Make America Healthy Again. Visit **[AllFamilyPharma.com/brawl](https://substack.com/redirect/63ff88e9-8a37-4c1f-bb76-c8569fd0d932?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and **use coupon code BRAWL10 for 10% off your order.** Stock up today and secure your supply.

* * *
# Feminist CONFRONTS a smart Christian Man, she wasn't expecting this to happen...
A group of **[feminists confronted a christian preacher](https://substack.com/redirect/7116bd21-2235-49a7-814b-f650e9d40b11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from the Christ-Developed Youtube channel about an eyebrow-raising pro-life sign he was holding.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7116bd21-2235-49a7-814b-f650e9d40b11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You will NEVER change my mind on abortion," one of the feminists told the preacher.
He answered her saying that she probably just wasn't that educated on the topic of abortion and suggested that he could inform her.
She did not appreciate that...
"Oh! I'm a little more educated than you think!" she fired back.
"If you're educated on this, when does life begin?"the preacher asked the girl. "You can search it up right now, 'when does life begin scientifically?' it says 'fertilization!"

name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=784939a8e2bf4059a450bd9673c68f85&_e=C1GmaFdhtwnwKF0IHozOgw91VhmZ7ixRse4aApvXa77RwkZJa9Uu70yqzyllQ7_hHwORf11IyY0JPWvYHcViHmdReOeUraAF_25W_pFGST52bfpkFtvHmyaZyIObmKIOxn0B8gyLmPOi0HOrTd3JEIP9hyEYFQP8LOPjAmwbpqn2VykgZ1y8zAMzLK9B7_YuVAlZm6pYHD8tlZ65C_fRoPVwAE18LUopQXDowRv_tISLaQBPgOoTCeXsZGgTsMeOKffV9oQBwtHc-jZI1MC01HgpG9aYT22Zx60PIwVZTLB7QT4Nzd_4IehTuRD78Fc-8781VPXkGbL2oB3d2maMxYMCuANiEytV4uevhr9NoZuwIFmukDJkErMjWgamVsWBviZgsiAMcc7FiY1nVwcvGw%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=784939a8e2bf4059a450bd9673c68f85&_e=C1GmaFdhtwnwKF0IHozOgw91VhmZ7ixRse4aApvXa77RwkZJa9Uu70yqzyllQ7_hHwORf11IyY0JPWvYHcViHmdReOeUraAF_25W_pFGST52bfpkFtvHmyaZyIObmKIOxn0B8gyLmPOi0HOrTd3JEIP9hyEYFQP8LOPjAmwbpqn2VykgZ1y8zAMzLK9B7_YuVAlZm6pYHD8tlZ65C_fRoPVwAE18LUopQXDowRv_tISPRk_j6Y5EQPiEXoERhBN8LhYK5-bFcDtj-xpuALWhdynrHBp-w9COkfUqo-siGynAWUU119PTykCrhrE3kuafcyM4kFQjhfn_ZScyvaptYJs46RPIbmZK2j0VhdfBSgT3mIgNU7JiyGk0IJKXsSqmL3yHZB3WSpFkBYcp43aaOA%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=784939a8e2bf4059a450bd9673c68f85&_e=C1GmaFdhtwnwKF0IHozOgw91VhmZ7ixRse4aApvXa77RwkZJa9Uu70yqzyllQ7_hHwORf11IyY0JPWvYHcViHmdReOeUraAF_25W_pFGST52bfpkFtvHmyaZyIObmKIOxn0B8gyLmPOi0HOrTd3JEIP9hyEYFQP8LOPjAmwbpqn2VykgZ1y8zAMzLK9B7_YuVAlZm6pYHD8tlZ65C_fRoPVwAE18LUopQXDowRv_tITQ0m6eh4SHtZZo85sfmVB3aaNYbgJheHTWAUIxFHJab7CxYU0WpImy5ZK9bS-fW3L9nRTDPd29ZF3ZqW2ToaFSc7SyM1jKxiNN7zgDRDuH1jZc5qWTiLw-IRD9SahUQzYVL48vHOcKGPwNMpdMVpgNTpixf2CXLdDEJE1iT1lV2A%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=784939a8e2bf4059a450bd9673c68f85&_e=C1GmaFdhtwnwKF0IHozOgw91VhmZ7ixRse4aApvXa77RwkZJa9Uu70yqzyllQ7_hHwORf11IyY0JPWvYHcViHmdReOeUraAF_25W_pFGST52bfpkFtvHmyaZyIObmKIOxn0B8gyLmPOi0HOrTd3JEIP9hyEYFQP8LOPjAmwbpqn2VykgZ1y8zAMzLK9B7_YuVAlZm6pYHD8tlZ65C_fRoPVwAE18LUopQXDowRv_tITnrr4eH_qEwzCmMO94e7OBlL7UwDRGQ4AcsGowbQeHtN-o5YBfO3wBa8JKNjjmo6G6KFsPealDtkdas2Vm91xDTWscHFx84lwMoDF4x-4l8_RZK2ew4reLGe4cpYciCsNwo5rsTAIRSEBmjjUnrA2rxEKg9cAGpvghyIh4XLemAQ%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=784939a8e2bf4059a450bd9673c68f85&_e=C1GmaFdhtwnwKF0IHozOgw91VhmZ7ixRse4aApvXa77RwkZJa9Uu70yqzyllQ7_hHwORf11IyY0JPWvYHcViHmdReOeUraAF_25W_pFGST52bfpkFtvHmyaZyIObmKIOxn0B8gyLmPOi0HOrTd3JEIP9hyEYFQP8LOPjAmwbpqn2VykgZ1y8zAMzLK9B7_YuVAlZm6pYHD8tlZ65C_fRoPVwAE18LUopQXDowRv_tIQjDxr9kTpv9gTDN4hM9b4tyz14xuF5Y3zQ6y1CzTviR01ZihVDZ9fFRnp98r_URIpCW8zfC5dRmGlcqc6fLR2C1jYg1nWec8rNxSeBk4LKyGrgc7iX1oZy_VsE3BRk1j7iSyU44UEZlFsrkFzZpglNCHVxBcVJsjiNAEjjKdK7kA%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=784939a8e2bf4059a450bd9673c68f85&_e=C1GmaFdhtwnwKF0IHozOgw91VhmZ7ixRse4aApvXa77RwkZJa9Uu70yqzyllQ7_hHwORf11IyY0JPWvYHcViHmdReOeUraAF_25W_pFGST52bfpkFtvHmyaZyIObmKIOxn0B8gyLmPOi0HOrTd3JEIP9hyEYFQP8LOPjAmwbpqn2VykgZ1y8zAMzLK9B7_YuVAlZm6pYHD8tlZ65C_fRoPVwAE18LUopQXDowRv_tITZ2dAskFbTF7ZVtktEdMXSuiRnUXeyEW2jODel2LdPY3JBnxjVYjzcTBXk3Tx6285HWMt7QcY8gR4AmqJFhicGZECiTt8aBSEN0mT9ERFODnaKodCxVN4fSyXHx7XP5qi_W6IcX4NnuwBfZ81pacvxQAGetxQr3c1dO6zqpc-gEA%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=784939a8e2bf4059a450bd9673c68f85&_e=C1GmaFdhtwnwKF0IHozOgzcUpf099R6Y6U8W27nETHSomifBJFmIYbaHIhDo-Pq0Q7yU3L0a-BGQpJnmMzUCfk9akEk3QfjlSCzuwoMlPcLGV4cRhGoVbpxrK6pIbBzGjXLnXrBOXlMRg0dOxaPSgTPUybx5_c5E7mUHIotclkdy0zXSIORzitHG2hMOAE50wM90WTWcbnGAi39wm5zLpQ%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click here to [Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=784939a8e2bf4059a450bd9673c68f85&_t=sSVUXulChKbuGHWCJ18FR94LS5T3DsUqX0eGgpgTY7B1GuAt2aILaJg6_Sox30EyOuP8HTrHG1NDAyeaT02I5Buj2G1xzbVHvpHnok5UczIeXiQVZ_NB2tDKl86ZoWaS)

body:
outcompete, out message, & win

| Peter, it’s Congressman Takano.

Donald Trump is gearing up to pass another huge handout and cash windfall for billionaires, mega-millionaires, and his corporate sponsors. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100075725/521681887/312147918?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20250108_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmFiMTM3Ni0xNmNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hWffm6kfJ2yi29t15j0ZGQDDgUgWxJ1HO_K12Lk9LIo=) **An extension of Trump’s tax “cuts” will add $5 trillion to the national debt over the next 5 years, which gives Trump the perfect pretext for slashing critical Social Security benefits, Medicare, Medicaid, and other critical social safety nets.**

But Peter, don’t throw your hands up in a panic. That’s not what you elected me to do, and I don’t expect you to either. **We need to fight.**

**Donald Trump has an EXTREMELY vulnerable Majority in Congress, and with special elections coming up in the next 90 days, we need the resources to out message him on the airwaves and outcompete him at the ballot box.**

We have 12 days left before the circus officially arrives for its encore in Washington. We can’t just lay down and let Trump roll over us. _I’m fighting back now_ for working people in this country, and I’m not waiting to take action.

[**That’s why I’m counting on you today, Peter: Your donation won’t stop Trump overnight, but it will lay the groundwork for incremental wins over the next four years. name: Team Pramila
subject: Trump has already lost interest in working people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
If we’re remembering correctly, Donald Trump ran on promises to lower costs and end wars.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250108-4655-footer&t=1&akid=4655%2E420207%2EK9cJA4)
Peter, if we’re remembering correctly, Donald Trump ran on promises — whether you believed them or not (we did not) — to lower costs and end wars.
**So we’re not surprised that his current priorities seem to be renaming the Gulf of Mexico and taking over Greenland and Panama!**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250108?refcode=em20250108-4655&amount=3&refcode2=4655_420207_K9cJA4&akid=4655%2E420207%2EK9cJA4)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250108?refcode=em20250108-4655&amount=3&refcode2=4655_420207_K9cJA4&akid=4655%2E420207%2EK9cJA4)
Jokes aside, none of this is actually surprising. Donald Trump has *never* had the best interests of working people at heart — it’s always been about satisfying his own massive ego.
So while Trump is distracted by deranged and dangerous fantasies of global conquest, Pramila will be working alongside Democrats in Congress to keep the focus where it belongs: on lifting up working people throughout this country.
**But with powerful voices calling for Democrats to move to the right, we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us rebuild our party around a bold, populist agenda that can win back the working class instead.**
[**If you’re ready to fight back against Donald Trump and lift up transformative policies like Medicare for All, paid leave, and more, will you pitch in $3 to support Pramila’s campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250108?refcode=em20250108-4655&amount=3&refcode2=4655_420207_K9cJA4&akid=4655%2E420207%2EK9cJA4)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250108?amount=3&refcode=em20250108-4655&refcode2=4655_420207_K9cJA4&akid=4655%2E420207%2EK9cJA4)**

Team Pramila

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: BREAKING: Alexandria’s new committee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This is a critical position for Alexandria to go head-to-head against a Trump trifecta.
#
Some exciting news: Alexandria has been assigned to one of the most sought after panels in Congress, the **Energy and Commerce Committee!**
This powerful committee steers House jurisdiction on energy, technology, healthcare, and more. When Alexandria first came to Congress, she pushed hard to join this committee, but was outranked by establishment members.
Now, as Republicans take control of the House, Senate, and White House, **it’s critical for our progressive movement that Alexandria is in a position to keep fighting** for renewable energy infrastructure, regulations on oil and gas permitting, and guaranteed healthcare for all.
[This term, Alexandria is going head-to-head with a Trump trifecta to improve the lives of working families everywhere. Will you make a $5 contribution today to hold the GOP accountable to everyday people, not a far-right agenda?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250108.pVO8wJ&refcode=em20250108-7872-P_FND_RES_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7872%2E2526796%2ECApfXH)

Whether or not you can give today, thank you for standing with our movement. We will keep you updated on Alexandria's activies in committee.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

In solidarity, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
Disgrace!
| [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7c028370ec7e48ba87c9b664d43d1b81&_e=TCOo72ogrHVEVBKXIwhxzpgfvC7hNFO83GJq_LegPyDdQMG10nys-vgtzuit6G_fV5WzLluDYz1CJ0aLGM8u_UvAfhVpLnHlnZJveMw9d2UAol-aWy4BzNIXiveoAuWVxOyenjQsOReYqeKcaHaZ77xlWaXMIvh-Xx3aE3tUzRFIZaygwdSMOh2AOQzMAP6rL96QJrZXFEPNwMoV3FMdJcufHwS6e8fgCk99sE6BWMFjoL1-RPmPbGgMu3Wsk2E2860q8IIsGJWXMg8XHxuW_h838BL-ZuyutaETZ7fyi9VmzXWhvQOt7YQt8cH3W-Lv1mdCzyW0o_Y1YrzAWRBABQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

****George Soros was awarded the Presidential Medal of Freedom.

****[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7c028370ec7e48ba87c9b664d43d1b81&_e=TCOo72ogrHVEVBKXIwhxzpgfvC7hNFO83GJq_LegPyDdQMG10nys-vgtzuit6G_fV5WzLluDYz1CJ0aLGM8u_UvAfhVpLnHlnZJveMw9d2UAol-aWy4BzNIXiveoAuWVxOyenjQsOReYqeKcaHaZ77xlWaXMIvh-Xx3aE3tUzRFIZaygwdSMOh2AOQzMAP6raQopMWPYewcXFTy327smgYI2UMC94g9CanDwE5AENTC_kAnUuQWqBAmycZ3I-cK8A_WM1XKfc1iaXCCaaUs-fM1FW0oIqNqjH0tyfVn2EelXiOke0JwlYAwQ-KCMwPZwR6u1Bwj1VDYX1FUnTRIOEQ%3D%3D)**
Screw you, Joe Biden, George Soros, and the rest of you globalist, traitorous cowards.**

I'm running for U.S. Senate again in 2026, so this can come to a stop for good.

George Soros and Joe Biden are a DISGRACE to Democracy.

Apparently, if you fund Radical Leftist candidates with MILLIONS OF DOLLARS and buy elections for communists, socialists, and neocons, you can win a Presidential Medal of Freedom.

| [ **DEFEND MAGA & AMERICA** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7c028370ec7e48ba87c9b664d43d1b81&_e=TCOo72ogrHVEVBKXIwhxzpgfvC7hNFO83GJq_LegPyDdQMG10nys-vgtzuit6G_fV5WzLluDYz1CJ0aLGM8u_UvAfhVpLnHlnZJveMw9d2UAol-aWy4BzNIXiveoAuWVxOyenjQsOReYqeKcaHaZ77xlWaXMIvh-Xx3aE3tUzRFIZaygwdSMOh2AOQzMAP6rNG4fluvXa0A8mgdtn4Ah0eit8IBMIUSl-9LwN-SGdIO7DmYhMNlxIEZKQ52ZFEdVhzg7fPsDKgSi77_RqXMFLr_RU5VcOtRY6nbgjzNEYBsV58gYOjcJm_dBMKC2BJh_idKrQcfe-3hl5dcAa-yqQQ%3D%3D)
---

_The most ironic thing about it is that Soros FAILED! America WOKE UP and elected Trump in a LANDSLIDE VICTORY._

Now, on his way out of office, Joe Biden is handing out Medals of Freedom to his allies, unless, of course, he's so unaware that he doesn't even know he's giving some of the worst people in the country these honors.

**I need your help. We have a full-court press on the Radical Left, but we need resources to win once and for all. Our majorities in both chambers of Congress are too slim to protect Trump and the MAGA Movement.**

I'm running for Senate in Minnesota to become the first black Republican to represent the state in Washington, D.C. My opponent, Tina Smith, is a Radical Leftist who has and will continue to comply with and engage in witch hunt after witch hunt.

_If I can beat her in 2026, we 'll give President Trump a MUCH-NEEDED ally in the Senate to protect him and support his America-First Agenda._

[**Can you chip in just $15 before midnight to give me the resources I need to get a head start on WINNING?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7c028370ec7e48ba87c9b664d43d1b81&_e=TCOo72ogrHVEVBKXIwhxzpgfvC7hNFO83GJq_LegPyDdQMG10nys-vgtzuit6G_fV5WzLluDYz1CJ0aLGM8u_UvAfhVpLnHlnZJveMw9d2UAol-aWy4BzNIXiveoAuWVxOyenjQsOReYqeKcaHaZ77xlWaXMIvh-Xx3aE3tUzRFIZaygwdSMOh2AOQzMAP6rrK8EK2fR2f8UuSo4cfrf_Tj05NTw-HZYW8322Y5eBglgScJBdVhxUeYhGnQ44ohfkXbLyamvUROdRi9aoafcAoJ2jMx3pCFWBldkv9RgdM3U7DRihNs7HY1cfvw72SmSXnWmBzoehS3Tuu4bOYbqTQ%3D%3D)

Thank you,
Royce White

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7c028370ec7e48ba87c9b664d43d1b81&_e=TCOo72ogrHVEVBKXIwhxzpgfvC7hNFO83GJq_LegPyDdQMG10nys-vgtzuit6G_fV5WzLluDYz1CJ0aLGM8u_UvAfhVpLnHlnZJveMw9d2UAol-aWy4BzNIXiveoAuWVxOyenjQsOReYqeKcaHaZ77xlWaXMIvh-Xx3aE3tUzRFIZaygwdSMOh2AOQzMAP6rsQOe3LnF0SmaiaqCqKkcqjrv5v0zdwfZ8Zg10RwevgQLN9I_ae1xnM42QDD3_CQxJTE-9tLTrjNTNDDXdhebWNx4wlwa5B0_opGijyAsEjX8wP6-Ldmy3we1HBVmEZoRzdiIz6BMauNiC3_uIMODSg%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7c028370ec7e48ba87c9b664d43d1b81&_e=TCOo72ogrHVEVBKXIwhxzpgfvC7hNFO83GJq_LegPyDdQMG10nys-vgtzuit6G_fV5WzLluDYz1CJ0aLGM8u_UvAfhVpLnHlnZJveMw9d2UAol-aWy4BzNIXiveoAuWVxOyenjQsOReYqeKcaHaZ77xlWaXMIvh-Xx3aE3tUzRFIZaygwdSMOh2AOQzMAP6rCu1UV8wUd_E96-bEUxu3klMl7GZ5KnmhhF0c-myfi8zYR5-MMPuBedphXu7YEB28zepGDIs_HGyIZLMHPRTJ25zBQ3dMjJaP56hVTKCQk2fLR-fSGw4NbMgG-sW7hAGUBa0Ly0oroy9OCdpQJ-ynqw%3D%3D)

P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343

Peter, I'm not afraid to make enemies. From the moment I became New York's attorney general in 2019, I got to work holding the wealthy, corrupt, and manipulative accountable. I went after Big Pharma, Big Polluters, gun rights activists, landlords – and now, I'm holding some of the most powerful and corrupt men in the nation accountable.
But to be honest, when my fundraising numbers go public, these corrupt (and well-funded) enemies of mine are going to dive deep into my fundraising numbers to find any weaknesses they're able to. They're going to want a fight, and I need to show that I have a powerful team standing with me. That's where you come in, Peter.

body:
| | | | Dear Peter,

Jimmy Patronis and Randy Fine are running for the **TWO MOST CRITICAL SEATS** in Florida that will determine whether we hold the line against the Woke Left’s radical agenda—or lose **EVERYTHING.**

**If these seats fall, our majority is _gone._**

And with it, any chance to stop:
* The left’s open-border invasion
* Skyrocketing inflation crushing working families
* Radical indoctrination in our schools

_**The fight for America comes down to YOU.**_

---
[](https://link.support.mike4congress.)
[STAND WITH FINE & PATRONIS>>](https://link.support.mike4congress.)
The stakes couldn’t be higher. Jimmy Patronis and Randy Fine are ready to fight, but they need YOU on their team to secure victory.

**This is about saving the House—and saving America.**

Don’t sit this one out.

__**[Add Your Name TODAY and DEFEND OUR MAJORITY>>](https://link.support.mike4congress.)**__

[ADD YOUR NAME>>](https://link.support.mike4congress.)

Thank you patriot,
Congressman Mike Haridopolos

subject: Time to get in the boat and start rowing, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
Our work is cut out for us!

| |
---
| | | Republicans are united across the country behind one mission: to enact the mandate the American people gave us in November. With President Trump at the helm, we are going to undo all of the damage the Left has done to the nation we love and make America great again!

We have the House, the Senate, and the White House. Now, Republicans are ready to start rowing the boat together.

I'm 100% committed to this mission, which means that the radical Left and the mainstream media will do whatever it takes to smear my name and destroy me. __They even named my race one of their top targets to take back in 2026 already!__

But I served our country for over 25 years as a Navy SEAL, so I'm not scared of their threats, Peter. But that doesn't mean I'm not taking them seriously. **The fact is, if the Democrats take this seat, we _WILL_ lose the House Majority, and Trump won't be able to get anything done!**

**[So today, I'm asking you to send in any amount you can to help me and my Team defend this CRITICAL seat and make America great again! Peter, we also wanted to be sure you saw what Attorney General Eric Holder had to say about the importance of these results:
“This election underscores the continuing historical fact that the fight for our democracy is never over — as long as the people continue to participate.

By using their power at the ballot box, Virginians have voted to protect pro-democracy majorities in the General Assembly and to stop Governor Youngkin’s attempts to roll back their fundamental rights.

I want to congratulate — and was proud to endorse — Kannan Srinivasan and JJ Singh on their victories. In these Democracy Defenders, Virginians will have dedicated public servants who will put their communities first and protect the rights of the people.”
— Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States
